item:
關於乾癬的致病機轉及臨床表現，下列敘述何者正確？
①指甲出現oil spotting是屬於乾癬的特異性表現，主要是乾癬影響distal nail matrix所造成的。
②患者產生myocardial infarction 的風險增加，但不包括較年輕的族群。
③目前推測的機轉為dendritic cells 表面上的HLA-Cw6會呈現peptides抗原，並和T 細胞接受器(T-cell receptor)接合，進而活化CD8+ T 細胞，分泌細胞激素等發炎物質。
④IL-13維持Th17和Th22細胞的功能，這兩種T細胞所分泌的IL-17和IL-22在維持乾癬發炎反應扮演重要的角色。
A. ①　　B. ②　　C. ③　　D. ④
item2:
Regarding the pathogenesis and clinical manifestations of psoriasis, which of the following statements is correct?
①Oil spotting on nails is a specific manifestation of psoriasis, which is mainly caused by psoriasis affecting the distal nail matrix.
②Patients have an increased risk of developing myocardial infarction, but this does not include younger groups.
③The currently speculated mechanism is that HLA-Cw6 on the surface of dendritic cells will present peptides antigens and engage with T-cell receptors, thereby activating CD8+ T cells and secreting inflammatory substances such as cytokines.
④IL-13 maintains the function of Th17 and Th22 cells. IL-17 and IL-22 secreted by these two T cells play an important role in maintaining the inflammatory response of psoriasis.
A. ① B. ② C. ③ D. ④

item:
關於miliaria，下列敘述何者錯誤？
①容易發生在悶熱潮濕的狀況。
②miliaria crystallina的汗腺阻塞發生在角質層，臨床上呈現細小、清澈、易破的水泡。
③miliaria rubra的汗腺阻塞發生在真皮層，臨床上呈現會癢的紅色丘疹。
④miliaria profunda臨床上的表現為白色丘疹。
A. ①　　B. ②　　C. ③　　D. ④
item2:
Regarding miliaria, which of the following statements is incorrect?
①Easy to occur in hot and humid conditions.
②The sweat gland obstruction of miliaria crystallina occurs in the stratum corneum, and clinically appears as small, clear, and easily broken blisters.
③The sweat gland obstruction of miliaria rubra occurs in the dermis, clinically presenting as itchy red papules.
④The clinical manifestations of miliaria profunda are white papules.
A. ① B. ② C. ③ D. ④

item:
下列孕婦出現的皮膚變化何者較可能增加對胎兒的風險 (fetal risk)？
①甲孕婦在第三懷孕期開始全身發癢，並有全身黃疸現象。
②乙孕婦有異位性皮膚炎病史，在第二懷孕期開始在脖子及四肢屈側出現濕疹樣變化。
③丙孕婦在第三懷孕期在軀幹開始出現urticarial plaques，並開始產生水泡。
④丁孕婦在第三懷孕期開始在肚皮妊娠紋上出現會癢的丘疹，之後擴散至整個軀幹。
A. ①③　　B. ②④　　C. ①②③　　D. ④　　E. ①②③④
item2:
Which of the following skin changes in pregnant women is more likely to increase the risk to the fetus?
① Pregnant woman A began to feel itchy and jaundice all over her body in her third trimester.
② Pregnant woman B has a history of atopic dermatitis. During the second trimester, she began to develop eczema-like changes on her neck and flexors of her limbs.
③ In the third trimester of pregnancy, urticarial plaques begin to appear on the trunk of pregnant women, and blisters begin to form.
④In the third trimester of pregnancy, pregnant women start to develop itchy pimples on stretch marks on their belly, which then spread to the entire trunk.
A. ①③ B. ②④ C. ①②③ D. ④ E. ①②③④

item:
下列何者不是皮膚的抗氧化 (anti-oxidation)系統的一部分？
①superoxide dismutase
②glutathione peroxidase
③flavonoids
④tyrosinase
A. ①　　B. ②　　C. ③　　D. ④
item2:
Which of the following is not part of the skin's anti-oxidation system?
①superoxide dismutase
②glutathione peroxidase
③flavonoids
④tyrosinase
A. ① B. ② C. ③ D. ④

item:
一位28歲體重75公斤的女性患者罹患中重度乾癬(病灶佔全身體表面積35%)且合併有inflammatory bowel disease，因為近期要結婚，所以決定來門診治療，對於此患者的治療計畫，下列敘述何者正確？
①照光治療建議使用在病灶體表面積小於20%的患者，所以不是此女性患者的治療選擇。
②建議優先施打ixekizumab 和secukinumab 等IL-17抑制劑。
③患者有懷孕計畫，口服藥物包括acitretin, methotrexate以及cyclosporine都有致畸胎性(teratogenic)，需要避免使用。
④患者如果接受ustekinumab治療，每次施打劑量建議為45mg。
A. ①③　　B. ②④　　C. ①②③　　D. ④　　E. ①②③④
item2:
A 28-year-old female patient weighing 75 kg suffers from moderate to severe psoriasis (the lesions occupy 35% of the body surface area) and inflammatory bowel disease. Because she is getting married soon, she decided to come for outpatient treatment. Regarding this patient's treatment plan, which of the following statements is correct?
① Light therapy is recommended for patients with lesions whose body surface area is less than 20%, so it is not a treatment option for this female patient.
② It is recommended to give priority to IL-17 inhibitors such as ixekizumab and secukinumab.
③If the patient is planning to become pregnant, oral drugs including acitretin, methotrexate and cyclosporine are teratogenic and need to be avoided.
④If the patient receives ustekinumab treatment, the recommended dose for each injection is 45mg.
A. ①③ B. ②④ C. ①②③ D. ④ E. ①②③④

item:
關於vascular tumors，下列敘述何者錯誤？
①Kasabach-Merritt phenomenon為紅血球滯留於腫瘤內造成之現象，可見於tufted angioma及kaposiform hemangioendothelioma。
②spindle-cell hemangioma常出現於Maffucci syndrome。
③infantile hemangioma可使用systemic beta-blocker治療，topical beta-blocker則無效。
④congenital hemangioma於出生時就會出現。
A. ①③　　B. ②④　　C. ①②③　　D. ④　　E. ①②③④
item2:
Regarding vascular tumors, which of the following statements is incorrect?
①The Kasabach-Merritt phenomenon is caused by the retention of red blood cells in tumors and can be seen in tufted angioma and kaposiform hemangioendothelioma.
②Spindle-cell hemangioma often occurs in Maffucci syndrome.
③Infantile hemangioma can be treated with systemic beta-blocker, but topical beta-blocker is not effective.
④Congenital hemangioma appears at birth.
A. ①③ B. ②④ C. ①②③ D. ④ E. ①②③④

item:
有關oral hairy leukoplakia，下列敘述何者錯誤？
①需積極治療，否則易malignant transformation。
②在免疫力低下的病患，可能是由Epstein-Barr virus感染黏膜上皮引起。
③此疾病必需使用antiretroviral藥物治療才能改善。
④常發生於舌頭側面，以壓舌板不易刮下。
A. ①③　　B. ②④　　C. ①②③　　D. ④　　E. ①②③④
item2:
Regarding oral hairy leukoplakia, which of the following statements is incorrect?
①Active treatment is required, otherwise it is easy to malignant transformation.
②In patients with low immunity, it may be caused by Epstein-Barr virus infection of mucosal epithelium.
③This disease must be treated with antiretroviral drugs to improve it.
④It often occurs on the side of the tongue and is difficult to remove with a tongue depressor.
A. ①③ B. ②④ C. ①②③ D. ④ E. ①②③④

item:
長期服用下列藥物之男性若近期準備生育，下列建議何者正確？
①methotrexate：先停用三個月。
②cyclosporine：無影響，可繼續服用。
③finasteride：無影響，可繼續服用。
④acitretin：因會對精蟲有影響，需停用。
A. ①③　　B. ②④　　C. ①②③　　D. ④　　E. ①②③④
item2:
If a man who has been taking the following drugs for a long time is planning to have a baby in the near future, which of the following suggestions is correct?
①Methotrexate: Stop using it for three months.
②Cyclosporine: No effect, you can continue to take it.
③Finasteride: No effect, can continue to be taken.
④Acitretin: Because it will affect sperm, it needs to be discontinued.
A. ①③ B. ②④ C. ①②③ D. ④ E. ①②③④

item:
有關eosinophilic pustular folliculitis，下列敘述何者正確？
①確診患者應排除是否有HIV感染。
②病理切片可見毛囊及其周邊eosinophils浸潤，但周邊血液之eosinophils通常不會增加。
③三型中以infantile type預後最好，其餘兩型則病程慢性且易復發。
④第一線治療選擇外用類固醇或calcineurin inhibitor，或口服tetracycline。
A. ①③　　B. ②④　　C. ①②③　　D. ④　　E. ①②③④
item2:
Regarding eosinophilic pustular folliculitis, which of the following statements is correct?
①Confirmed patients should be ruled out for HIV infection.
② Pathological sections show infiltration of eosinophils in hair follicles and their surroundings, but eosinophils in the peripheral blood usually do not increase.
③Among the three types, the infantile type has the best prognosis, while the other two types have a chronic course and are prone to recurrence.
④The first-line treatment options are topical steroids or calcineurin inhibitor, or oral tetracycline.
A. ①③ B. ②④ C. ①②③ D. ④ E. ①②③④

item:
關於慢性自發性蕁麻疹(chronic spontaneous urticaria)，下列敘述何者正確？
①大約1/3到1/2的患者可以在血液中偵測出和IgE或high-affinity IgE受體(FcεRI)拮抗
的IgG autoantibodies。
②治療首選為第二代非啫睡抗組織胺，治療反應不佳可以提高到四倍標準劑量，若仍無效則可考慮使用omalizumab。
③同時存在有thyroglobulin 和thyroid peroxidase (TPO) 等autoantibodies的患者，大多甲狀腺功能正常。
④autologous serum skin test (ASST) 陽性患者相較於陰性患者，病情更容易控制，對於omalizumab 的治療反應更快。
A. ①③　　B. ②④　　C. ①②③　　D. ④　　E. ①②③④
item2:
Regarding chronic spontaneous urticaria, which of the following statements is correct?
①About 1/3 to 1/2 of patients can detect IgE or high-affinity IgE receptor (FcεRI) antagonism in the blood
IgG autoantibodies.
②The first choice for treatment is the second generation non-somalant antihistamine. If the treatment response is poor, the dose can be increased to four times the standard dose. If it is still ineffective, omalizumab can be considered.
③In patients with autoantibodies such as thyroglobulin and thyroid peroxidase (TPO), most of them have normal thyroid function.
④Compared with patients with negative autologous serum skin test (ASST), patients with autologous serum skin test (ASST) are easier to control and respond faster to omalizumab treatment.
A. ①③ B. ②④ C. ①②③ D. ④ E. ①②③④

item:
關於表皮癌前病變，下列敘述何者正確？
①日光性角化症 (actinic keratoses) 絕大部分都會進展為鱗狀上皮細胞癌。
②使用光動力療法治療表皮癌前病變，其優點為預後及外觀較佳。
③與epidermodysplasia verruciformis最相關的人類乳突病毒(HPV)為type 16, 18
④erythroplasia of Queyrat和genital Bowen disease相比，前者轉變為鱗狀上皮細胞癌的風險較低。
A. ①　　B. ②　　C. ③　　D. ④
item2:
Regarding epidermal precancerous lesions, which of the following statements is correct?
①Most cases of actinic keratoses will progress to squamous cell carcinoma.
②The advantage of using photodynamic therapy to treat epidermal precancerous lesions is better prognosis and appearance.
③The human papillomavirus (HPV) most related to epidermodysplasia verruciformis is type 16, 18
④Compared with genital Bowen disease, erythroplasia of Queyrat has a lower risk of transforming into squamous cell carcinoma.
A. ① B. ② C. ③ D. ④

item:
關於藥物所引起的皮膚反應，下列敘述何者錯誤？
①acute generalized exanthematous pustulosis的發生，常和macrolide及β-lactam等抗生素有相關，會在軀幹及對磨部位(intertriginous region)出現膿泡，也常會引發關節炎。
②amiodarone會引起sun-exposed areas的色素沈著，而tetracycline 主要是引起粘膜的色素沈著，不會發生在sun-exposed areas。
③最常引起subacute cutaneous lupus erythematosus 的藥物包括terbinafine，thiazide diuretics 等。通常在用藥後平均一週內，就會引發此皮膚症狀。
④sorafenib較常引起hand-foot syndrome，而非hand-foot skin reaction。
A. ①③　　B. ②④　　C. ①②③　　D. ④　　E. ①②③④
item2:
Regarding skin reactions caused by drugs, which of the following statements is incorrect?
①The occurrence of acute generalized exanthematous pustulosis is often related to antibiotics such as macrolide and β-lactam. Pustules will appear on the trunk and intertriginous region, and it often causes arthritis.
②Amiodarone will cause pigmentation in sun-exposed areas, while tetracycline mainly causes pigmentation in mucous membranes and will not occur in sun-exposed areas.
③The drugs that most commonly cause subacute cutaneous lupus erythematosus include terbinafine, thiazide diuretics, etc. This skin symptom usually occurs within an average of one week after taking the drug.
④Sorafenib more commonly causes hand-foot syndrome, rather than hand-foot skin reaction.
A. ①③ B. ②④ C. ①②③ D. ④ E. ①②③④

item:
下列哪一些外用藥物有去角質(keratolysis)的作用？
①40% salicylic acid
②40% α-hydroxy acids
③40% urea
④40% propylene glycol
A. ①③　　B. ②④　　C. ①②③　　D. ④　　E. ①②③④
item2:
Which of the following topical drugs have the effect of exfoliation (keratolysis)?
①40% salicylic acid
②40% α-hydroxy acids
③40% urea
④40% propylene glycol
A. ①③ B. ②④ C. ①②③ D. ④ E. ①②③④

item:
關於Muir-Torre syndrome，下列敘述何者錯誤？
①是DNA mismatch repair功能異常造成。
②遺傳模式為autosomal dominant。
③sebaceous carcinoma中，ocular type與Muir-Torre syndrome的關聯性遠高於extraocular type。
④病人可能出現大腸癌、子宮內膜癌等。
A. ①　　B. ②　　C. ③　　D. ④
item2:
Regarding Muir-Torre syndrome, which of the following statements is incorrect?
① It is caused by abnormal DNA mismatch repair function.
②The inheritance mode is autosomal dominant.
③In sebaceous carcinoma, the correlation between ocular type and Muir-Torre syndrome is much higher than that of extraocular type.
④Patients may develop colorectal cancer, endometrial cancer, etc.
A. ① B. ② C. ③ D. ④

item:
川崎氏症(Kawasaki disease)是兒童最常見的後天性心臟病。關於川崎氏症(Kawasaki disease)，下列敘述何者正確？
①病人通常持續高燒5天以上，常伴有廣泛皮疹表現(generalized exanthem)。
②一旦確診，應盡速給予每日2mg/kg之靜脈注射免疫球蛋白(intravenous immunoglobulin)共三日及合併阿斯匹靈(aspirin)治療。
③全身血管都可能會受影響，但最主要以中型動脈(medium-sized muscular arteries)，如冠狀動脈(coronary arteries)受損為主。
④病人可有黏膜病灶表現，例如草莓舌(strawberry tongue)和雙側之滲出性結膜炎(exudative conjunctivitis)，很少發生畏光情形(photophobia)。
A. ①③　　B. ②④　　C. ①②③　　D. ④　　E. ①②③④
item2:
Kawasaki disease is the most common acquired heart disease in children. Regarding Kawasaki disease, which of the following statements is correct?
①Patients usually have high fever for more than 5 days, often accompanied by generalized exanthem.
② Once confirmed, intravenous immunoglobulin (intravenous immunoglobulin) at 2 mg/kg per day should be given as soon as possible for three days and combined with aspirin treatment.
③ All blood vessels throughout the body may be affected, but medium-sized muscular arteries, such as coronary arteries, are most commonly damaged.
④Patients may have mucosal lesions, such as strawberry tongue and bilateral exudative conjunctivitis, and rarely photophobia.
A. ①③ B. ②④ C. ①②③ D. ④ E. ①②③④

item:
關於傷口癒合的分期，下列何者正確？
①coagulation phase時纖維蛋白栓(fibrin plug)形成，血小板凝集，並釋出促進發炎介質。
②inflammatory phase可在數小時到數天內發生，血球移入傷口，主要參與的細胞為neutrophils, monocytes, macrophages。
③proliferative phase時程為數天至數週，上皮再形成(reepithelialization)在此時期發生。④remodeling phase可長達數月，myofibroblasts經phenotypic switch變為fibroblasts進行傷口重塑，同時促進type 1 collagen轉變為較穩定的type 3 collagen。
A. ①③　　B. ②④　　C. ①②③　　D. ④　　E. ①②③④
item2:
Regarding the staging of wound healing, which of the following is correct?
①During the coagulation phase, fibrin plugs form, platelets aggregate, and release mediators that promote inflammation.
②The inflammatory phase can occur within hours to days. Blood cells move into the wound. The main cells involved are neutrophils, monocytes, and macrophages.
③The proliferative phase lasts from days to weeks, and re-epithelialization occurs during this period. ④The remodeling phase can last for several months. Myofibroblasts undergo phenotypic switch into fibroblasts for wound remodeling, while promoting the transformation of type 1 collagen into the more stable type 3 collagen.
A. ①③ B. ②④ C. ①②③ D. ④ E. ①②③④

item:
有關平滑肌錯構瘤(smooth muscle hamartoma)，下列敘述何者錯誤？
①病灶處可合併色素及毛髮增加。
②摩擦病灶後可以更清楚看見其上的丘疹及豎毛肌收縮(piloerection)的現象，稱為pseudo-Darier sign。
③臨床及病理與Becker nevus有相似之處。
④有惡性變化之風險。
A. ①③　　B. ②④　　C. ①②③　　D. ④　　E. ①②③④
item2:
Regarding smooth muscle hamartoma, which of the following statements is incorrect?
①The lesions may be combined with increased pigmentation and hair.
② After rubbing the lesion, you can see the papules on it more clearly and the contraction of the arrector pili muscle (piloerection), which is called pseudo-Darier sign.
③There are clinical and pathological similarities with Becker nevus.
④ There is a risk of malignant changes.
A. ①③ B. ②④ C. ①②③ D. ④ E. ①②③④

item:
有關黴菌感染，下列敘述何者正確？
①非發炎型態的頭癬的致病原常為親人的(anthropophilic)真菌，如Microsporum ferrugineum感染，在伍氏燈(Wood lamp)下可見到黃綠色或灰綠色螢光。
②汗斑及皮屑芽孢菌毛囊炎(Malassezia folliculitis)最常分離出的菌種是Malassezia furfur，以伍氏燈(Wood lamp)照射有可能見到黃綠色螢光。
③親動物(zoophilic)或親土性(geophilic)的真菌，如Microsporum canis和Microsporum gypseum較易發展成發炎型態的頭癬，在伍氏燈(Wood lamp)下可見到黃綠色或灰綠色螢光。
④若頭癬具有許多黑點(black dots)需考慮毛內癬菌(endothrix)，如Trichophyton tonsurans或Trichophyton violaceum感染，在伍氏燈(Wood lamp)下可見到黃綠色或灰綠色螢光。
A. ①③　　B. ②④　　C. ①②③　　D. ④　　E. ①②③④
item2:
Regarding fungal infections, which of the following statements is correct?
①The causative agent of non-inflammatory tinea capitis is often anthropophilic fungi, such as Microsporum ferrugineum infection, and yellow-green or gray-green fluorescence can be seen under a Wood lamp.
②The most commonly isolated species of malassezia folliculitis (Malassezia folliculitis) is Malassezia furfur. It is possible to see yellow-green fluorescence when illuminated with a Wood lamp.
③ Zoophilic or geophilic fungi, such as Microsporum canis and Microsporum gypseum, are more likely to develop inflammatory forms of tinea capitis, and yellow-green or gray-green fluorescence can be seen under a Wood lamp.
④ If tinea capitis has many black dots, endothrix, such as Trichophyton tonsurans or Trichophyton violaceum infection, should be considered. Yellow-green or gray-green fluorescence can be seen under a Wood lamp.
A. ①③ B. ②④ C. ①②③ D. ④ E. ①②③④

item:
傷口的處理是門診重要的處置，下列有關傷口照顧的敘述何者錯誤？
①傷口的癒合應觀察期為4週，如超過4週未癒合，則應考慮調整傷口照顧與處理方法。
②lipodermatosclerosis於急性期可以使用stanozolol加以控制。
③急性傷口的組織液對於傷口癒合有幫助，但慢性傷口的組織液反而會抑制傷口的癒合。
④水凝膠(hydrogel)對傷口癒合有幫助，適合使用在車禍創傷後的傷口。
A. ①③　　B. ②④　　C. ①②③　　D. ④　　E. ①②③④
item2:
Wound management is an important treatment in the outpatient clinic. Which of the following statements about wound care is incorrect?
① The wound healing period should be observed for 4 weeks. If it does not heal after 4 weeks, you should consider adjusting the wound care and treatment methods.
② Lipodermatosclerosis can be controlled with stanozolol in the acute stage.
③The tissue fluid in acute wounds is helpful for wound healing, but the tissue fluid in chronic wounds will inhibit wound healing.
④Hydrogel helps in wound healing and is suitable for use in wounds after car accidents.
A. ①③ B. ②④ C. ①②③ D. ④ E. ①②③④

item:
有關amyloidosis，下列敘述何者正確？
①immunoglobulin light chain、serum amyloid A、lysozyme、cystatin C、galectin 7等皆可能是precursor protein。
②systemic AL amyloidosis可能會出現periorbital purpura, macroglossia, lingual nodules等皮膚表現。
③nodular amyloidosis大部分是AL amyloid，可能進展為systemic AL amyloidosis。
④局部注射insulin或enfuvirtide都可能造成注射部位amyloid沈積。
A. ①③　　B. ②④　　C. ①②③　　D. ④　　E. ①②③④
item2:
Regarding amyloidosis, which of the following statements is correct?
①Immunoglobulin light chain, serum amyloid A, lysozyme, cystatin C, galectin 7, etc. may all be precursor proteins.
②Systemic AL amyloidosis may cause skin manifestations such as peripheral purpura, macroglossia, and lingual nodules.
③Nodular amyloidosis is mostly AL amyloid and may progress to systemic AL amyloidosis.
④ Local injection of insulin or enfuvirtide may cause amyloid deposition at the injection site.
A. ①③ B. ②④ C. ①②③ D. ④ E. ①②③④

item:
有關乳房外柏哲德氏病extrammamary Paget’s disease (EMPD)，下列敘述何者正確？
①EMPD與mammary Paget’s disease 相比，大約只有20-30%的人會合併內臟器官腫瘤。
②primary EMPD 其mucin core protein 2 (MUC2) 染色通常為陽性。
③前哨淋巴結的檢查對於CEA陽性反應的EMPD病人較有幫助。
④secondary EMPD的CK20比較常呈現陰性，而GCDFP-15則是比較容易呈現陽性。
A. ①③　　B. ②④　　C. ①②③　　D. ④　　E. ①②③④
item2:
Regarding extramammary Paget’s disease (EMPD), which of the following statements is correct?
①Compared with mammary Paget’s disease, only about 20-30% of people with EMPD will develop internal organ tumors.
②Primary EMPD usually stains positive for mucin core protein 2 (MUC2).
③The examination of sentinel lymph nodes is more helpful for EMPD patients with CEA-positive reaction.
④The CK20 of secondary EMPD is more likely to be negative, while GCDFP-15 is more likely to be positive.
A. ①③ B. ②④ C. ①②③ D. ④ E. ①②③④

item:
35歲男性患者小腿出現疼痛潰瘍病灶已有兩個月的時間，臨床懷疑是壞疽膿皮症(pyoderma gangrenosum)，關於此患者進一步的評估，下列敘述何者正確？
①即使患者有pathergy的現象，以切片作為輔助診斷時，仍舊必需切到潰瘍的發炎部位和正常組織。
②此患者如果同時合併有關節痛和痤瘡(acne)病灶，則可能是罹患PAPA syndrome (pyogenic arthritis, pyoderma gangrenosum and acne)，這是autosomal recessive的遺傳性疾病。
③患者可能合併其他疾病，其中大約有1/3患者罹患inflammatory bowel disease。
④所有的患者都需要檢驗full blood cell count, autoantibody (antinuclear antibodies)。血清protein electrophoresis 和immunofixation studies 則不需要檢驗。
A. ①③　　B. ②④　　C. ①②③　　D. ④　　E. ①②③④
item2:
A 35-year-old male patient has had painful ulcers on his lower legs for two months. The clinical suspicion is pyoderma gangrenosum. Regarding the further evaluation of this patient, which of the following statements is correct?
① Even if the patient has pathology, when using biopsy as an auxiliary diagnosis, it is still necessary to cut into the inflamed part of the ulcer and the normal tissue.
②If this patient has joint pain and acne lesions at the same time, he may be suffering from PAPA syndrome (pyogenic arthritis, pyoderma gangrenosum and acne), which is an autosomal recessive hereditary disease.
③Patients may be complicated by other diseases, and about 1/3 of them suffer from inflammatory bowel disease.
④All patients need to test full blood cell count, autoantibody (antinuclear antibodies). Serum protein electrophoresis and immunofixation studies do not need to be tested.
A. ①③ B. ②④ C. ①②③ D. ④ E. ①②③④

item:
有關法布瑞氏症(Fabry disease)，下列敘述何者錯誤？
➀是一罕見X-linked lysosomal storage disorder，主要和𝛼-galactosidase A deficiency導致glycosphingolipids沈積有關。
➁酵素製劑(agalsidase alfa及agalsidase beta)可用來治療此疾病所造成的代謝障礙及連帶導致的多種器官病變。
➂不論性別，若出現皮膚血管病灶如telangiectases, angiokeratoma較易有major organ involvement。
➃高達1/3男性病患和2/3女性病患會出現angiokeratoma的皮膚表現。
A. ①　　B. ②　　C. ③　　D. ④
item2:
Regarding Fabry disease, which of the following statements is incorrect?
➀It is a rare X-linked lysosomal storage disorder, mainly related to the deposition of glycosphingolipids caused by 𝛼-galactosidase A deficiency.
➁Enzyme preparations (agalsidase alfa and agalsidase beta) can be used to treat the metabolic disorders caused by this disease and the associated multiple organ lesions.
➂Regardless of gender, if skin vascular lesions such as telangiectases occur, angiokeratoma is more likely to have major organ involvement.
➃Up to 1/3 of male patients and 2/3 of female patients will develop cutaneous manifestations of angiokeratoma.
A. ① B. ② C. ③ D. ④

item:
關於類天疱瘡(bullous pemphigoid)，下列敘述何者正確？
①臨床上可表現為局限於手腳掌部位之汗疱疹樣(dyshidrotic dermatitis-like)病灶。
②黏膜型類天疱瘡(mucous membrane pemphigoid)會影響眼睛或口腔黏膜，但不會造成禿髮。
③近年研究發現癌症免疫療法藥物anti–programmed cell death receptor 1 (anti–PD-1) antibody或降血糖藥物dipeptidyl peptidase 4 (DPP4)抑制劑均有可能誘發類天疱瘡。
④藉由NaCl-split 處理後之免疫螢光染色可見類天疱瘡(bullous pemphigoid)抗體結合在裂隙底部。
A. ①③　　B. ②④　　C. ①②③　　D. ④　　E. ①②③④
item2:
Regarding bullous pemphigoid, which of the following statements is correct?
①Clinical manifestations include dyshidrotic dermatitis-like lesions limited to the soles of the hands and feet.
② Mucous membrane pemphigoid can affect the eyes or oral mucosa, but does not cause baldness.
③Recent studies have found that the cancer immunotherapy drug anti-programmed cell death receptor 1 (anti-PD-1) antibody or the hypoglycemic drug dipeptidyl peptidase 4 (DPP4) inhibitor may induce pemphigoid.
④Using immunofluorescence staining after NaCl-split treatment, bullous pemphigoid antibodies can be seen bound to the bottom of the fissure.
A. ①③ B. ②④ C. ①②③ D. ④ E. ①②③④

item:
關於nocardiosis，下列敘述何者正確？
①nocardiosis感染臨床上若以蜂窩性組織炎表現，比較好發於上肢。
②nocardiosis感染其染色呈現革蘭氏陽性絲狀菌外，並無弱抗酸性反應。
③治療以磺胺類抗生素(sulfonamide)為主。
④nocardiosis感染若以sporotrichoid形式表現，位置以下肢最常見。
A. ①　　B. ②　　C. ③　　D. ④
item2:
Regarding nocardiosis, which of the following statements is correct?
① If nocardiosis infection manifests clinically as cellulitis, it is more likely to occur in the upper limbs.
② Nocardiosis infection shows no weak acid-resistant reaction except for Gram-positive filamentous bacteria.
③The main treatment is sulfonamide antibiotics.
④If nocardiosis infection manifests in the form of sporotrichoid, the most common location is the lower limbs.
A. ① B. ② C. ③ D. ④

item:
關於皮膚外科手術，下列敘述何者錯誤？
①Mohs micrographic surgery(MMS)在處理切下來的手術樣本時，是採用bread-loaf fashion。
②臉部靜脈有靜脈瓣，可使靜脈血往單一方向流動避免回流。
③服用aspirin, warfarin, rivaroxaban或apixaban是進行Mohs micrographic surgery(MMS)的contraindication。
④Cupid’s bow是指位於人中(philtrum)下緣上嘴唇隆起的弧度輪廓區域，是美容手術的重要landmark之一。
A. ①③　　B. ②④　　C. ①②③　　D. ④　　E. ①②③④
item2:
Regarding dermatological surgery, which of the following statements is incorrect?
①Mohs micrographic surgery (MMS) uses bread-loaf fashion when processing cut surgical samples.
② Facial veins have venous valves that allow venous blood to flow in one direction to avoid backflow.
③Taking aspirin, warfarin, rivaroxaban or apixaban is a contraindication for Mohs micrographic surgery (MMS).
④Cupid’s bow refers to the convex curved contour area of the upper lip located at the lower edge of the philtrum. It is one of the important landmarks of cosmetic surgery.
A. ①③ B. ②④ C. ①②③ D. ④ E. ①②③④

item:
關於異位性皮膚炎(atopic dermatitis)患者的臨床表徵和治療，下列何者正確？
①皮膚病灶分布的區域會隨著患者的年齡不同有所改變，在嬰兒時期，最常發生在頭皮，臉部和尿布包覆處。
②因為組織胺不是造成異位性皮膚炎癢感的主要物質，目前沒有足夠證據顯示抗組織胺可以有效改善異位性皮膚炎的癢感。
③用來治療異位性皮膚炎的生物製劑dupilumab，是作用在IL-4 receptor α subunit 的單株抗體，常見的副作用是感染性結膜炎。
④患者皮膚症狀的嚴重程度，和其產生其他過敏疾病包括氣喘(asthma)，食物過敏(food allergy)，過敏性鼻炎(allergic rhinitis)的風險是有相關的。
A. ①③　　B. ②④　　C. ①②③　　D. ④　　E. ①②③④
item2:
Regarding the clinical presentation and treatment of patients with atopic dermatitis, which of the following is correct?
①The distribution area of skin lesions will change with the age of the patient. In infancy, they most commonly occur on the scalp, face and diaper area.
②Because histamine is not the main substance that causes itching in atopic dermatitis, there is currently insufficient evidence to show that antihistamines can effectively improve the itching in atopic dermatitis.
③Dupilumab, a biological agent used to treat atopic dermatitis, is a monoclonal antibody that acts on the IL-4 receptor α subunit. A common side effect is infective conjunctivitis.
④The severity of the patient's skin symptoms is related to the risk of developing other allergic diseases, including asthma, food allergy, and allergic rhinitis.
A. ①③ B. ②④ C. ①②③ D. ④ E. ①②③④

item:
關於granuloma inguinale，下列敘述何者正確？
①其致病菌為Klebsiella granulomatis為gram-negative bacteria。
②其臨床主要可分為四個型態：ulcerogranulomatous, hypertrophic, necrotic和sclerotic type。
③診斷主要是組織學上可見intracellular Donovan body。
④治療藥物第一線建議為azithromycin。
A. ①③　　B. ②④　　C. ①②③　　D. ④　　E. ①②③④
item2:
Regarding granuloma inguinale, which of the following statements is correct?
①The causative bacteria are Klebsiella granulomatis and gram-negative bacteria.
②It can be mainly divided into four clinical types: ulcerogranulomatous, hypertrophic, necrotic and sclerotic type.
③The diagnosis is mainly based on histological findings of intracellular Donovan body.
④The first line of treatment drug is recommended to be azithromycin.
A. ①③ B. ②④ C. ①②③ D. ④ E. ①②③④

item:
關於laser and light-based treatments，下列敘述何者錯誤？
①1980年Anderson and Parrish提出selective photothermolysis理論，若選用合適的雷射光波長且pulse duration長於thermal relaxation time，將大幅降低周遭組織受到無辜熱傷害的情形。
②thermal relaxation time與雷射target chromophore直徑大小成反比。
③雷射治療時，使用的波長越長及spot size越大，穿透越淺、越容易發散。
④黃色刺青可以使用Q-switched alexandrite (755 nm)雷射移除。
A. ①③　　B. ②④　　C. ①②③　　D. ④　　E. ①②③④
item2:
Regarding laser and light-based treatments, which of the following statements is incorrect?
①In 1980, Anderson and Parrish proposed the selective photothermolysis theory. If a suitable laser wavelength is selected and the pulse duration is longer than the thermal relaxation time, innocent thermal damage to surrounding tissues will be greatly reduced.
②Thermal relaxation time is inversely proportional to the diameter of the laser target chromophore.
③In laser treatment, the longer the wavelength and the larger the spot size used, the shallower the penetration and the easier it is to diverge.
④Yellow tattoos can be removed using Q-switched alexandrite (755 nm) laser.
A. ①③ B. ②④ C. ①②③ D. ④ E. ①②③④

item:
關於皮膚紅斑性狼瘡(lupus erythematosus, LE)，下列敘述何者錯誤？
①急性皮膚紅斑性狼瘡(acute cutaneous lupus erythematosus, ACLE)常合併系統性疾病。
②亞急性皮膚紅斑性狼瘡(subacute cutaneous lupus erythematosus, SCLE)會出現環形紅斑或類似乾癬之病灶。
③盤狀紅斑性狼瘡(discoid lupus erythematosus, DLE)有Koebner's phenomenon與carpet tack sign。
④toxic epidermal necrolysis (TEN)-like skin lesions是屬於LE的非特異性皮膚表現。
A. ①　　B. ②　　C. ③　　D. ④
item2:
Regarding cutaneous lupus erythematosus (LE), which of the following statements is incorrect?
①Acute cutaneous lupus erythematosus (ACLE) is often complicated by systemic diseases.
②Subacute cutaneous lupus erythematosus (SCLE) will cause annular erythema or lesions similar to psoriasis.
③ Discoid lupus erythematosus (DLE) has Koebner's phenomenon and carpet tack sign.
④toxic epidermal necrolysis (TEN)-like skin lesions are non-specific skin manifestations of LE.
A. ① B. ② C. ③ D. ④

item:
糖尿病人的皮膚表現多樣，包含diabetic dermopathy，granuloma annulare (GA)以及necrobiosis lipoidica (NL)等等，下列敘述何者正確？
①diabetic dermopathy的出現和retinopathy, nephropathy, neuropathy有相關。
②糖尿病較常出現的GA type為generalized或perforating GA。
③cyclosporine有助於NL潰瘍的癒合。
④糖尿病患血糖控制的好壞和NL的出現並無關聯。
A. ①③　　B. ②④　　C. ①②③　　D. ④　　E. ①②③④
item2:
Diabetic patients have various skin manifestations, including diabetic dermopathy, granuloma annulare (GA) and necrobiosis lipoidica (NL), etc. Which of the following statements is correct?
①The occurrence of diabetic dermopathy is related to retinopathy, nephropathy, and neuropathy.
②The GA type that is more common in diabetes is generalized or performing GA.
③Cyclosporine helps in the healing of NL ulcers.
④ There is no correlation between the quality of blood sugar control in patients with diabetes and the occurrence of NL.
A. ①③ B. ②④ C. ①②③ D. ④ E. ①②③④

item:
有關vascular malformation的表現與治療，下列敘述何者正確？
①arteriovenous malformation觸診及聽診不會有震顫(thrill)或雜音(bruit)。
②lymphatic malformation外觀顏色可為正常膚色或黃紫色，病理組織學D2-40之染色為陰性。
③capillary malformation外觀顏色為膚色，在都卜勒超音波(Doppler ultrasound)檢查呈現快流速(fast flow)。
④venous malformation的治療方式包括硬化劑、手術或sirolimus。
A. ①③　　B. ②④　　C. ①②③　　D. ④　　E. ①②③④
item2:
Regarding the manifestations and treatment of vascular malformation, which of the following statements is correct?
①arteriovenous malformation will not cause tremor or bruit during palpation and auscultation.
②The appearance color of lymphatic malformation can be normal skin color or yellow-purple, and the histopathological D2-40 staining is negative.
③The appearance color of capillary malformation is skin color, and it shows fast flow during Doppler ultrasound examination.
④Treatment methods for venous malformation include sclerotherapy, surgery or sirolimus.
A. ①③ B. ②④ C. ①②③ D. ④ E. ①②③④

item:
關於ANCA-associated vasculitis，下列敘述何者錯誤？
①microscopic polyangiitis的患者常有腎絲球腎炎(glomerulonephritis)及肺部出血的表現。
②granulomatosis with polyangiitis患者大多有上呼吸道的慢性發炎病史，開洞之肺部結節(cavitary pulmonary nodules)也是重要的臨床表現。
③eosinophilic granulomatosis with polyangiitis有大約90%的人血中可檢驗出ANCA。
④以上三者ANCA-associated vasculitis中，以eosinophilic granulomatosis with polyangiitis最常見有伴隨皮膚表現。
A. ①　　B. ②　　C. ③　　D. ④
item2:
Regarding ANCA-associated vasculitis, which of the following statements is incorrect?
①Patients with microscopic polyangiitis often present with glomerulonephritis and pulmonary hemorrhage.
②Most patients with granulomatosis with polyangiitis have a history of chronic inflammation of the upper respiratory tract, and cavitary pulmonary nodules are also important clinical manifestations.
③ANCA can be detected in the blood of approximately 90% of people with eosinophilic granulomatosis with polyangiitis.
④ Among the above three ANCA-associated vasculitis, eosinophilic granulomatosis with polyangiitis is the most common with accompanying skin manifestations.
A. ① B. ② C. ③ D. ④

item:
有關白斑症vitiligo，下列敘述何者正確？
①白斑症是可以治療的疾病，但如病灶的毛髮變白，則預後較差。
②口服tofacitinib可用來治療白斑。
③白斑的病理機轉，主要是透過CD8+ T cells所分泌的IFN-gamma作用在角質細胞，使角質細胞分泌更多的CXCL-10來吸引更多的melanocyte reactive CD8+ T cells進行黑色素細胞的破壞。
④分節型白斑呈現條狀分佈，常會合併自體免疫疾病，且與神經末梢的毒性相關。
A. ①③　　B. ②④　　C. ①②③　　D. ④　　E. ①②③④
item2:
Regarding vitiligo, which of the following statements is correct?
①Vitiligo is a treatable disease, but if the hair in the lesions turns white, the prognosis is poor.
②Oral tofacitinib can be used to treat vitiligo.
③The pathological mechanism of white spots is mainly through the IFN-gamma secreted by CD8+ T cells acting on keratinocytes, causing keratinocytes to secrete more CXCL-10 to attract more melanocyte reactive CD8+ T cells to destroy melanocytes.
④ Segmented white spots are distributed in strips, are often associated with autoimmune diseases, and are related to the toxicity of nerve endings.
A. ①③ B. ②④ C. ①②③ D. ④ E. ①②③④

item:
關於原發性雷諾氏現象(primary Raynaud phenomenon)的敘述，下列何者錯誤？
①發生原發性雷諾氏現象時，皮膚的顏色變化會與正常皮膚出現明顯分界，病人血清抗核抗體(ANA)通常會呈現陽性。
②通常會侵犯雙側肢體，且出現nailfold capillary microscopy檢查異常。
③發生原發性雷諾氏現象時，若有三色變化(triphasic color changes)，皮膚會依序出現紅、白、藍三個階段的變色現象。
④皮膚在遇冷或情緒變化時，會出現血管異常收縮反應。
A. ①③　　B. ②④　　C. ①②③　　D. ④　　E. ①②③④
item2:
Regarding primary Raynaud phenomenon, which of the following is incorrect?
① When primary Raynaud's phenomenon occurs, the color change of the skin will be clearly separated from normal skin, and the patient's serum antinuclear antibody (ANA) will usually be positive.
② Usually it affects both limbs, and abnormal nailfold capillary microscopy examination occurs.
③When primary Raynaud's phenomenon occurs, if there are triphasic color changes, the skin will appear in three stages of red, white, and blue discoloration in sequence.
④When the skin is exposed to cold or emotional changes, abnormal vasoconstriction will occur.
A. ①③ B. ②④ C. ①②③ D. ④ E. ①②③④

item:
關於臨床上不同類型之天疱瘡(pemphigus)，下列敘述何者正確？
①pemphigus vulgaris可用rituximab (monoclonal anti-CD20 antibody)來治療，建議初始劑量為1000mg隔週(Q2W)施打，共2次。
②IgA pemphigus病理可見表皮內嗜中性球聚集之膿皰(intraepidermal neutrophilic pustule)，常會合併疼痛性口炎(painful stomatitis)。
③pemphigus foliaceus與pemphigus erythematosus病人血清中皆有對抗desmoglein 1之抗體。
④pemphigus vegetans鮮少侵犯口腔黏膜。
A. ①③　　B. ②④　　C. ①②③　　D. ④　　E. ①②③④
item2:
Regarding the different clinical types of pemphigus, which of the following statements is correct?
① Pemphigus vulgaris can be treated with rituximab (monoclonal anti-CD20 antibody). The recommended initial dose is 1000 mg administered every other week (Q2W) for a total of 2 times.
②The pathology of IgA pemphigus shows intraepidermal neutrophilic pustules (intraepidermal neutrophilic pustules), which are often accompanied by painful stomatitis.
③ Antibodies against desmoglein 1 are found in the serum of pemphigus foliaceus and pemphigus erythematosus patients.
④ pemphigus vegetans rarely invades the oral mucosa.
A. ①③ B. ②④ C. ①②③ D. ④ E. ①②③④

item:
關於漢生病(Hansen’s disease)，下列敘述何者正確？
①漢生病的抗菌治療以多藥物為原則，而非dapsone單一藥物治療。
②erythema nodosum leprosum 為第四型過敏反應，reversal reaction為第三型過敏反應。
③tuberculoid leprosy 以Th1反應為主，lepromatous leprosy以Th2反應為主。
④印度，巴西與印尼占全世界80%以上的漢生病例，台灣近年來已無新增本土病例。
A. ①③　　B. ②④　　C. ①②③　　D. ④　　E. ①②③④
item2:
Regarding Hansen’s disease, which of the following statements is correct?
①The antibacterial treatment of Han disease is based on the principle of multi-drug treatment, rather than single-drug treatment with dapsone.
②Erythema nodosum leprosum is a type 4 allergic reaction, and reversal reaction is a type 3 allergic reaction.
③Tuberculoid leprosy mainly responds to Th1, while lepromatous leprosy mainly responds to Th2.
④ India, Brazil and Indonesia account for more than 80% of Hansen cases in the world, and Taiwan has had no new local cases in recent years.
A. ①③ B. ②④ C. ①②③ D. ④ E. ①②③④

item:
有關calcium deposition disorder，下列敘述何者正確？
①chronic renal failure、milk-alkali syndrome、infections皆屬於metastatic calcification。
➁pilomatricoma是最常見calcification, ossification的皮膚腫瘤，機轉可能與𝛽-catenin signaling有關。
➂tumoral calcinosis屬metastatic calcification，好發於老人。
➃Albright hereditary osteodystrophy (AHO)為一體染色體顯性遺傳疾病，常見obesity, moon facies, short stature, mental retardation。
A. ①③　　B. ②④　　C. ①②③　　D. ④　　E. ①②③④
item2:
Regarding calcium deposition disorder, which of the following statements is correct?
①Chronic renal failure, milk-alkali syndrome, and infections all belong to metastatic calcification.
➁Pilomatricoma is the most common skin tumor with calcification and ossification, and its mechanism may be related to 𝛽-catenin signaling.
➂Tumoral calcinosis belongs to metastatic calcification and is more common in the elderly.
➃Albright hereditary osteodystrophy (AHO) is a chromosomally dominant genetic disease with common obesity, moon facies, short stature, and mental retardation.
A. ①③ B. ②④ C. ①②③ D. ④ E. ①②③④

item:
關於掌蹠角化症(palmoplantar keratodermas, PPK)，下列敘述何種錯誤？
①PPK患者可能合併聽力受損、眼睛病變、牙齒異常等皮膚外之症狀。
②Unna-Thost PPK與epidermolytic PPK在臨床與病理表現無法區別。
③Mal de Meleda PPK可導致鱗狀上皮細胞癌或黑色素瘤。
④pachyonychia congenita有趾甲變厚、足蹠疼痛且伴隨口腔黏膜病變之特徵。
A. ①　　B. ②　　C. ③　　D. ④
item2:
Regarding palmoplantar keratodermas (PPK), which of the following statements is incorrect?
① PPK patients may have hearing loss, eye lesions, dental abnormalities and other extracutaneous symptoms.
②The clinical and pathological manifestations of Unna-Thost PPK and epidermolytic PPK are indistinguishable.
③Mal de Meleda PPK can cause squamous cell carcinoma or melanoma.
④pachyonychia congenita is characterized by thickened toenails, pain in the soles of the feet, and is accompanied by oral mucosal lesions.
A. ① B. ② C. ③ D. ④

item:
關於乾癬性關節炎(psoriatic arthritis)，下列敘述何者錯誤？
①寡關節炎(oligoarthritis)是最常見之乾癬性關節炎。
②伴隨頭皮、指甲與臀溝之乾癬病灶者較容易併發乾癬性關節炎。
③疾病修飾藥物(DMARDs)對於接骨點炎(enthesitis)與中軸性(axial)乾癬關節炎的治療成效顯著。
④tofacitinib也可用於改善乾癬性關節炎。
A. ①　　B. ②　　C. ③　　D. ④
item2:
Regarding psoriatic arthritis, which of the following statements is incorrect?
① Oligoarthritis is the most common form of psoriatic arthritis.
② People with psoriasis lesions on the scalp, nails, and gluteal grooves are more likely to develop psoriatic arthritis.
③Disease-modifying drugs (DMARDs) are effective in the treatment of enthesitis and axial psoriatic arthritis.
④Tofacitinib can also be used to improve psoriatic arthritis.
A. ① B. ② C. ③ D. ④

item:
關於melanoma，下列敘述何者錯誤？
①若Breslow index ≥ 4 mm可考慮執行computed topography (CT)影像檢查。
②臨床第三期以上的melanoma若有BRAF V600突變，可申請健保雙標靶藥物dabrafenib/trametinib治療。
③血清lactate dehydrogenase (LDH)升高預後較差。
④病人的腫瘤若PD-L1呈陰性反應，則使用免疫檢查點阻斷劑(immune checkpoint inhibitor)會無效。
A. ①③　　B. ②④　　C. ①②③　　D. ④　　E. ①②③④
item2:
Regarding melanoma, which of the following statements is incorrect?
①If Breslow index ≥ 4 mm, computed topography (CT) imaging examination can be considered.
② If melanoma in clinical stage III or above has BRAF V600 mutation, you can apply for treatment with the dual-target drug dabrafenib/trametinib.
③The prognosis of patients with elevated serum lactate dehydrogenase (LDH) is poor.
④If the patient's tumor is PD-L1 negative, the use of immune checkpoint inhibitors will be ineffective.
A. ①③ B. ②④ C. ①②③ D. ④ E. ①②③④

item:
關於皮膚外科手術及相關解剖構造，下列敘述何者錯誤？
①bilobed flap, rhombic flap, V-to-Y flap都是屬於transposition flap。
②若可行，一般考慮將手術的incision line置於cosmetic units的交界處。
③理想的elliptical excision其長：寬的比列為3.5：1，但當周遭組織延展性差或凸起時可適當提高其比例。
④fusiform excision的長軸一般平行於relaxed skin tension lines但垂直於底下肌肉拉動的方向。
A. ①　　B. ②　　C. ③　　D. ④
item2:
Regarding skin surgery and related anatomy, which of the following statements is incorrect?
①bilobed flap, rhombic flap, V-to-Y flap are all transposition flaps.
② If feasible, it is generally considered to place the surgical incision line at the junction of cosmetic units.
③The ideal elliptical excision has a length:width ratio of 3.5:1, but when the surrounding tissue has poor ductility or is convex, the ratio can be increased appropriately.
④The long axis of fusiform excision is generally parallel to relaxed skin tension lines but perpendicular to the direction of underlying muscle pulling.
A. ① B. ② C. ③ D. ④

item:
關於指(趾)甲手術，下列敘述何者錯誤？
①執行指(趾)甲手術前的局部麻醉時合併使用epinephrine並非absolute contraindication。
②在局部麻醉時，proximal block procedure比distal digital block procedure帶來較大的疼痛感但麻醉起效較快。
③指(趾)甲手術時，若在distal matrix 進行小於3 mm的punch biopsy一般不會造成嚴重的nail dystrophy。
④當考慮是否為發炎性病灶侵犯指(趾)甲時要執行切片時，lateral longitudinal biopsy是個好選擇。
A. ①　　B. ②　　C. ③　　D. ④
item2:
Regarding nail surgery, which of the following statements is incorrect?
① The combined use of epinephrine when performing local anesthesia before nail surgery is not an absolute contraindication.
②During local anesthesia, proximal block procedure causes greater pain than distal digital block procedure but the anesthesia takes effect faster.
③During finger (toe) nail surgery, if a punch biopsy less than 3 mm is performed in the distal matrix, it will generally not cause serious nail dystrophy.
④When considering whether an inflammatory lesion is invading the nail (toe) and performing a biopsy, lateral longitudinal biopsy is a good choice.
A. ① B. ② C. ③ D. ④

item:
關於QuantiFERON-TB Gold (QFT-G)測試，下列敘述何者正確？
①QFT-G測試中的抗原以合成的胜肽來代表二種Mycobacterium tuberculosis蛋白：EAST-6及CEP-10。
②此項測試是檢驗病患的白血球中所釋放出的interferon(IFN)-α。
③在年輕的兒童QFT-G可能會呈現偽陰性。
④現在常規實施QFT-G測試可以在1小時內完成。
A. ①③　　B. ②④　　C. ①②③　　D. ④　　E. ①②③④
item2:
Regarding the QuantiFERON-TB Gold (QFT-G) test, which of the following statements is correct?
①The antigens in the QFT-G test use synthetic peptides to represent two Mycobacterium tuberculosis proteins: EAST-6 and CEP-10.
②This test tests the interferon (IFN)-α released by the patient’s white blood cells.
③QFT-G may show false negatives in young children.
④Now the routine implementation of QFT-G test can be completed within 1 hour.
A. ①③ B. ②④ C. ①②③ D. ④ E. ①②③④

item:
關於azathioprine，下列敘述何者錯誤？
①azathioprine在人體內會被代謝為xanthine。
②azathioprine與allopurinol合併使用時有可能提高藥物毒性的機率。
③服用azathioprine時必須注意是否導致骨髓抑制(myelosuppression)，近年來的研究發現此副作用可能與thiopurine methyltransferase (TPMT) 或NUDT15基因變異有關。
④服用azathioprine時必須定期追蹤肝功能。
A. ①　　B. ②　　C. ③　　D. ④
item2:
Regarding azathioprine, which of the following statements is incorrect?
①azathioprine will be metabolized into xanthine in the human body.
②The combined use of azathioprine and allopurinol may increase the probability of drug toxicity.
③When taking azathioprine, you must pay attention to whether it may cause myelosuppression. Recent studies have found that this side effect may be related to thiopurine methyltransferase (TPMT) or NUDT15 gene mutations.
④ Liver function must be tracked regularly when taking azathioprine.
A. ① B. ② C. ③ D. ④

item:
關於水疱性表皮鬆解症(epidermolysis bullosa, EB)之臨床特徵，下列敘述何者錯誤？
①此疾病之診斷可藉由免疫螢光檢查、穿透式電子顯微鏡與DNA分析來確認。
②單純型EB simplex水泡之病理檢查可發現表皮內分裂 (intraepidermal separation)。
③此疾病中最有可能引起肌肉無力症狀的突變基因是LAMB3。
④嚴重之隱性遺傳dystrophic EB (RDEB)會增加鱗狀上皮細胞癌的機會。
A. ①　　B. ②　　C. ③　　D. ④
item2:
Regarding the clinical features of epidermolysis bullosa (EB), which of the following statements is incorrect?
①The diagnosis of this disease can be confirmed by immunofluorescence examination, transmission electron microscopy and DNA analysis.
② Pathological examination of simplex EB simplex blisters can reveal intraepidermal separation.
③The mutated gene most likely to cause muscle weakness symptoms in this disease is LAMB3.
④Severe recessive dystrophic EB (RDEB) will increase the chance of squamous cell carcinoma.
A. ① B. ② C. ③ D. ④

item:
50歲男性患者因為臉部有黃棕色的丘疹來就診，經切片診斷為non-caseating granuloma，疑似sarcoidosis(肉芽腫)，關於進一步評估患者是否有systemic involvement，下列敘述何者錯誤？
①需要做胸部X光檢查(chest radiograph)，來評估是否有肺門淋巴結腫大。
②建議所有的患者應該接受心電圖檢查，做為評估心臟影響的工具。
③葡萄膜炎是眼睛最常發現的問題，只發生在前段虹膜和睫狀體。
④血液生化檢查出現高血鈣和高尿鈣，須考慮腎臟受到影響。
A. ①　　B. ②　　C. ③　　D. ④
item2:
A 50-year-old male patient came to see a doctor because of yellow-brown papules on his face. The biopsy was diagnosed as non-caseating granuloma and suspected sarcoidosis. Regarding further evaluation of the patient for systemic involvement, which of the following statements is wrong?
① A chest X-ray is required to evaluate whether there is hilar lymphadenopathy.
② It is recommended that all patients should receive an electrocardiogram as a tool to assess the impact on the heart.
③Uveitis is the most common problem found in the eyes, and it only occurs in the anterior segment of the iris and ciliary body.
④ If blood biochemical tests show hypercalcemia and hypercalciuria, it is necessary to consider that the kidneys are affected.
A. ① B. ② C. ③ D. ④

item:
關於photodermatoses，下列敘述何者錯誤？
①polymorphic light eruption好發於男性，通常在每年春天或夏天第一次接受較強的陽光照射後30分鐘內發生。
②actinic prurigo好發在兒童期，和UVA的相關性比UVB高。
③hydroa vacciniforme 可能和慢性EBV 感染有關，phototest 無法和其他photodermatoses區分。
④chronic actinic dermatitis 有可能合併皮膚T細胞淋巴癌(cutaneous T cell lymphoma)。
A. ①　　B. ②　　C. ③　　D. ④
item2:
Regarding photodermatoses, which of the following statements is incorrect?
①Polymorphic light eruption is more common in men and usually occurs within 30 minutes after receiving strong sunlight for the first time every spring or summer.
② Actinic prurigo is more likely to occur in childhood and is more closely related to UVA than UVB.
③Hydroa vacciniforme may be related to chronic EBV infection, and phototest cannot distinguish it from other photodermatoses.
④Chronic actinic dermatitis may be combined with cutaneous T cell lymphoma.
A. ① B. ② C. ③ D. ④

item:
關於棘狀層鬆解疾病(acantholytic disorders)之鑑別診斷，下列敘述何者錯誤？
①Darier disease會影響指甲但無黏膜侵犯。
②Hailey-Hailey disease好發於頸部、腋窩、鼠蹊與會陰部等容易摩擦之部位。
③Grover disease與ATP2B2基因突變有關。
④Darier disease、Hailey-Hailey disease、Grover disease發作之年齡(age at onset)依前列順序而遞增。
A. ①　　B. ②　　C. ③　　D. ④
item2:
Regarding the differential diagnosis of acantholytic disorders, which of the following statements is incorrect?
①Darier disease affects nails but does not invade mucous membranes.
②Hailey-Hailey disease commonly occurs in areas prone to friction such as the neck, armpits, groin, and perineum.
③Grover disease is related to ATP2B2 gene mutations.
④The age at onset of Darier disease, Hailey-Hailey disease, and Grover disease increases in order.
A. ① B. ② C. ③ D. ④

item:
有關ectodermal dysplasia (ED)，下列敘述何者錯誤？
①由一群遺傳性疾病所組成，包含至少2種之胚胎外胚層發展缺陷。
②hidrotic ED為體染色體隱性遺傳，突變基因為GJB6基因。
③診斷及分類ED時，第一個步驟為區分是否排汗。
④hypohydrotic ED的症狀包含hypotrichosis, hypohidrosis, hypodontia，指甲通常是正常的。
A. ①　　B. ②　　C. ③　　D. ④
item2:
Regarding ectodermal dysplasia (ED), which of the following statements is incorrect?
① Consists of a group of genetic diseases, including at least 2 defects in the development of embryonic ectoderm.
②hidrotic ED is recessively inherited on somatic chromosomes, and the mutated gene is the GJB6 gene.
③When diagnosing and classifying ED, the first step is to distinguish whether sweating occurs.
④The symptoms of hypohydrotic ED include hypotrichosis, hypohidrosis, hypodontia, and nails are usually normal.
A. ① B. ② C. ③ D. ④

item:
關於prurigo nodularis (結節性癢疹)的敘述，下列何者正確？
①此病症除了和異位性皮膚炎(atopic dermatitis)相關外，患者也可能有腎功能不全，甲狀腺機能亢進，甲狀腺機能低下及肝衰竭等病症。
②結節性癢疹的病灶下有表皮神經纖維增生，神經肽(neuropeptide)例如calcitonin gene-related peptide (CGRP)，substance P的表現也會增強。
③臨床鑑別診斷需要考慮perforating disease， bullous pemphigoid 或疥瘡(scabies)。
④可以使用外用類固醇或局部施打類固醇來做治療，NBUVB及308 nm excimer light 則不建議使用。
A. ①③　　B. ②④　　C. ①②③　　D. ④　　E. ①②③④
item2:
Regarding prurigo nodularis (prurigo nodularis), which of the following is correct?
① In addition to being related to atopic dermatitis, patients may also have renal insufficiency, hyperthyroidism, hypothyroidism and liver failure.
② There is proliferation of epidermal nerve fibers under the lesions of nodular prurigo, and neuropeptides such as calcitonin gene-related peptide (CGRP), and the expression of substance P will also be enhanced.
③Perforating disease, bullous pemphigoid or scabies need to be considered in clinical differential diagnosis.
④Topical steroids or localized steroids can be used for treatment, but the use of NBUVB and 308 nm excimer light is not recommended.
A. ①③ B. ②④ C. ①②③ D. ④ E. ①②③④

item:
關於膿皰型乾癬(pustular psoriasis)的臨床表現，下列敘述何者錯誤？
① Generalized pustular psoriasis 的膿皰可以發生在四肢軀幹，並且合併發燒。患者可能伴有低血鉀，細菌感染或敗血症等合併症。
② Pustulosis palmaris et plantaris好發在女性，和抽菸有很強的相關。
③ Acrodermatitis continua of Hallopeau的膿皰發生在手指和腳趾，可能造成遠端指節的骨質溶解。
④ Impetigo herpetiformis，通常發生在懷孕第三個週期（trimester），患者通常會有個人及乾癬家族史。
A. ①③　　B. ②④　　C. ①②③　　D. ④　　E. ①②③④
item2:
Regarding the clinical manifestations of pustular psoriasis, which of the following statements is incorrect?
① Pustules of Generalized pustular psoriasis can occur on the limbs and trunk, and are accompanied by fever. Patients may be accompanied by complications such as hypokalemia, bacterial infection, or sepsis.
② Pustulosis palmaris and plantaris are more common in women and are strongly related to smoking.
③ Pustules of Acrodermatitis continua of Hallopeau occur on the fingers and toes, which may cause osteolysis of the distal phalanx.
④ Impetigo herpetiformis usually occurs in the third trimester of pregnancy, and patients usually have a personal and family history of psoriasis.
A. ①③ B. ②④ C. ①②③ D. ④ E. ①②③④

item:
關於pityriasis rubra pilaris的敘述，下列何者錯誤？
①發病型態可分類成遺傳型和後天型，也可能和HIV感染有相關性。
②成人患者除了分布在軀幹，也可能發生在手掌腳掌，呈現淡黃色的角化症(keratoderma)。
③目前發現第五型(atypical juvenile) pityriasis rubra pilaris和CARD14 gene 的gain-of-function mutations有關。
④第一線口服用藥的建議選擇為retinoids，methotrexate和cyclosporine。
A. ①　　B. ②　　C. ③　　D. ④
item2:
Regarding pityriasis rubra pilaris, which of the following is incorrect?

item:
關於phototoxicity和photoallergy的比較，下列何者正確？
① Vesicular and bullous eruptions較常見於phototoxicity，而eczematous eruption較常見於photoallergy。
② Phototoxicity較常有灼熱感，photoallergy較常有癢感。
③病理下，phototoxicity較容易呈現表皮角質細胞壞死，photoallergy較容易呈現spongiotic dermatitis。
④兩者的治療原則都為找出並避免引發phototoxicity或photoallergy的物質，防曬以及症狀治療。
A. ①③　　B. ②④　　C. ①②③　　D. ④　　E. ①②③④
item2:
Regarding the comparison between phototoxicity and photoallergy, which of the following is correct?
① Vesicular and bullous eruptions are more common in phototoxicity, while eczematous eruptions are more common in photoallergy.
② Phototoxicity is more common with burning sensation, and photoallergy is more common with itching.
③Pathologically, phototoxicity is more likely to cause epidermal keratinocyte necrosis, and photoallergy is more likely to cause spongiotic dermatitis.
④The treatment principles of both are to find and avoid substances that cause phototoxicity or photoallergy, use sun protection and treat symptoms.

item:
有關結節性紅斑(erythema nodosum; EN)及硬節性紅斑(erythema induratum; EI)，下列敘述何者正確？

② EN常出現於小腿前側，且較不會合併皮膚潰瘍。
③ EI可能與肥胖及靜脈循環不佳有關。
④ EN及 EI 的首選治療皆為 systemic corticosteroids。
A. ①③　　B. ②④　　C. ①②③　　D. ④　　E. ①②③④
item2:
Regarding erythema nodosum (EN) and erythema induratum (EI), which of the following statements is correct?
①Both may be caused by mycobacterium tuberculosis.
② EN often appears on the front of the calf and is less likely to be associated with skin ulcers.
③ EI may be related to obesity and poor venous circulation.
④ The preferred treatment for both EN and EI is systemic corticosteroids.

item:
有關痤瘡(Acne)的治療，下列何者錯誤？
①如同時使用口服四環黴素（tetracyclines）和口服A酸（isotretinoin）治療，會增加pseudotumor cerebri的風險。
②Acne fulminans第一線治療應為系統性或病灶內注射類固醇，且要盡早使用高劑量的口服A酸（isotretinoin）來快速控制病情，以減少併發症發生。
③Topical dapsone為近年FDA核准治療痤瘡（Acne）的藥物，可以在G6PD deficiency的病人身上使用，但不建議和topical benzoyl peroxide一起使用，因為會造成皮膚變橘色。
④吃口服A酸（isotretinoin）的男性在服藥同時和停藥後1個月皆需要嚴格避孕，因為口服A酸有teratogenic的效果。
A. ①③　　B. ②④　　C. ①②③　　D. ④　　E. ①②③④
item2:
Regarding the treatment of acne (Acne), which of the following is incorrect?
① If oral tetracyclines and oral A acid (isotretinoin) are used simultaneously, the risk of pseudotumor cerebri will increase.
②The first-line treatment for Acne fulminans should be systemic or intralesional steroid injection, and high-dose oral A acid (isotretinoin) should be used as early as possible to quickly control the disease to reduce the occurrence of complications.
③Topical dapsone is an FDA-approved drug for the treatment of acne (Acne) in recent years. It can be used on patients with G6PD deficiency, but it is not recommended to be used together with topical benzoyl peroxide because it will cause the skin to turn orange.
④ Men who take oral A acid (isotretinoin) need strict contraception while taking the drug and for 1 month after stopping the drug, because oral A acid has a teratogenic effect.
A. ①③ B. ②④ C. ①②③ D. ④ E. ①②③④

item:
關於白斑，下列敘述何者錯誤？
①如病人目前白斑病灶包含trichrome lesions和confetti-like depigmentation，可以建議病人接受白斑色素移植手術。
②白斑為皮膚自體免疫疾病，主要由CD8+ T cell產生interferon-gamma 破壞黑色素細胞，也會有比較高的比例合併自體免疫疾病，包含圓禿、自體免疫甲狀腺疾病（autoimmune thyroiditis）。
③相較於一般人，白化病患者(albino)及白斑因為色素脫失的關係，罹患皮膚鱗狀細胞癌及基底細胞癌的機率上升。
④分布在無毛囊區域的白斑預後比較差。
A. ①③　　B. ②④　　C. ①②③　　D. ④　　E. ①②③④
item2:
Regarding vitiligo, which of the following statements is incorrect?
①If the patient’s current white spot lesions include trichrome lesions and confetti-like depigmentation, the patient may be recommended to undergo white spot pigment transplantation surgery.
②Vitiligo is an autoimmune disease of the skin, mainly caused by interferon-gamma produced by CD8+ T cells that destroys melanocytes. There is also a relatively high rate of combined autoimmune diseases, including alopecia areata and autoimmune thyroiditis.
③ Compared with the general population, patients with albinism (albino) and vitiligo have an increased chance of suffering from squamous cell carcinoma and basal cell carcinoma of the skin due to loss of pigment.
④The prognosis of white spots distributed in areas without hair follicles is poor.
A. ①③ B. ②④ C. ①②③ D. ④ E. ①②③④

item:

②此類病患傷口癒合的能力較差，故手術傷口相較於一般人需較久才能拆線。
③可能合併肺氣腫（pulmonary emphysema）、心瓣膜異常、疝氣等表現。
④與皮膚中collagen組成異常有關。
A. ①③　　B. ②④　　C. ①②③　　D. ④　　E. ①②③④
item2:
Regarding cutis laxa, which of the following statements is correct?
①After the skin is stretched, it will take a long time to return to its original state.
②The wound healing ability of these patients is poor, so the surgical wound will take longer to remove the sutures than the average person.
③ May be complicated by symptoms such as pulmonary emphysema, abnormal heart valves, and hernia.
④Related to abnormal collagen composition in the skin.
A. ①③ B. ②④ C. ①②③ D. ④ E. ①②③④

item:
30歲男性因為慢性斑塊型乾癬(chronic plaque psoriasis)來就診，病灶佔全身體表面積35%。患者身高190公分，體重100公斤，BMI (body mass index)為28，請問對此患者的評估和治療，下列敘述何者正確？
①此患者雖罹患乾癬，但因為BMI未達30且屬於年輕族群，metabolic syndrome 和myocardial infarction的風險可被排除。
②因為體重超過90公斤，使用secukinumab治療不佳時，可考慮提高治療劑量到450mg，以達最佳療效。
③外用藥物以1 finger tip unit= 0.5g = covering 2 adult palms (佔2% body surface area)這個原則來做估算，此患者每天早晚使用兩次外用calcipotriene，塗抹兩週是安全的。
④若腎功能正常，無其他禁忌症，患者每天服用500 mg的cyclosporine是合理的最高有效劑量。
A. ①③　　B. ②④　　C. ①②③　　D. ④　　E. ①②③④
item2:
A 30-year-old man comes to see a doctor because of chronic plaque psoriasis. The lesions account for 35% of the total body surface area. The patient is 190 cm tall, weighs 100 kg, and has a BMI (body mass index) of 28. Regarding the evaluation and treatment of this patient, which of the following statements is correct?
①Although this patient suffers from psoriasis, because his BMI is less than 30 and he belongs to a young group, the risk of metabolic syndrome and myocardial infarction can be ruled out.
② If the body weight exceeds 90 kilograms and the treatment with secukinumab is not good, you may consider increasing the treatment dose to 450 mg to achieve the best effect.
③The estimation of external medicines is based on the principle that 1 finger tip unit = 0.5g = covering 2 adult palms (accounting for 2% body surface area). This patient uses topical calcipotriene twice a day, morning and evening, and it is safe to apply it for two weeks.
④If the renal function is normal and there are no other contraindications, 500 mg of cyclosporine per day is the highest reasonable effective dose for the patient.
A. ①③ B. ②④ C. ①②③ D. ④ E. ①②③④

item:
下列敘述何者錯誤？
① TRM(resident memory T cell)是不重複循環的T細胞，存在表皮的屏障組織。
②人類的皮膚也存在著重複循環的記憶T細胞TMM(migratory memory T cell)與TCM (central memory T cell)。
③ TCM主要製造IL-2，增生後會分化為TEM(effector T cell)。
④乾癬或是固定性藥物疹的病兆，常發生於同一位置，應與TEM有關。
A. ①　　B. ②　　C. ③　　D. ④
item2:
Which of the following statements is wrong?
① TRM (resident memory T cell) is a T cell that does not circulate repeatedly and exists in the barrier tissue of the epidermis.
② Human skin also contains repeatedly circulating memory T cells TMM (migratory memory T cells) and TCM (central memory T cells).
③ TCM mainly produces IL-2 and differentiates into TEM (effector T cells) after proliferation.
④ Symptoms of psoriasis or fixed drug eruption often occur in the same location and should be related to TEM.
A. ① B. ② C. ③ D. ④

item:
有關緩發性皮膚病變紫質症(Porphyria cutanea tarda，PCT)，下列敘述何者正確？
①是最常見紫質症，與肝臟uroporphyrinogen decarboxylase(UROD)活性下降有關。
②若病人合併末期腎功能不全，會加重其臨床之嚴重度，洗腎可有效降低其血中之porphyrins。
③可藉由放血(phlebotomy)或低劑量hydroxychloroquine治療PCT。
④臉部皮膚常伴隨有毛髮減少與色素增多之現象。
A. ①③　　B. ②④　　C. ①②③　　D. ④　　E. ①②③④
item2:
Regarding Porphyria cutanea tarda (PCT), a tardive skin disease, which of the following statements is correct?
① It is the most common porphyria and is related to the decreased activity of uroporphyrinogen decarboxylase (UROD) in the liver.
②If the patient is combined with end-stage renal insufficiency, the clinical severity will be aggravated. Kidney dialysis can effectively reduce the porphyrins in the blood.
③ PCT can be treated by phlebotomy or low-dose hydroxychloroquine.
④Facial skin is often accompanied by hair loss and pigmentation.
A. ①③ B. ②④ C. ①②③ D. ④ E. ①②③④

item:
有關慢性植體抗宿主病(Chronic graft-versus-host disease GVHD)，下列敘述何者正確？
①中、重度慢性GVHD的第一線治療為systemic steroid，而輕症以局部藥物治療。
②慢性GVHD可呈現類似扁平苔蘚、硬皮症、乾癬、圓形禿與白斑等皮膚表現。
③除了皮膚與口腔粘膜外，慢性GVHD也常侵犯眼睛、腸胃道與肺臟。
④骨髓移植者比周邊血液幹細胞移植者容易罹患慢性GVHD。
A. ①③　　B. ②④　　C. ①②③　　D. ④　　E. ①②③④
item2:
Regarding chronic graft-versus-host disease GVHD, which of the following statements is correct?
①The first-line treatment for moderate and severe chronic GVHD is systemic steroids, while mild cases are treated with topical drugs.
②Chronic GVHD can present skin manifestations similar to lichen planus, scleroderma, psoriasis, alopecia areata, and vitiligo.
③In addition to the skin and oral mucosa, chronic GVHD also often invades the eyes, gastrointestinal tract and lungs.
④ Bone marrow transplant recipients are more likely to suffer from chronic GVHD than peripheral blood stem cell transplant recipients.
A. ①③ B. ②④ C. ①②③ D. ④ E. ①②③④

item:
關於皮膚屏障，下列敘述何者錯誤？
① Loricrin是cornified cell envelope的主要成分。
②在角質層中的keratinocytes會通過corneodesmosomes相互連結在一起，由於其lateral adhesion比apicobasal adhesion來的更穩定，所以在病理切片下角質層會呈現basket-wave structure。
③ Kallikrein proteases (KLKs)在角質層底部偏酸性的環境下會被lymphoepithelial Kazal-type-related inhibitor (LEKTI)所抑制；而在往角質層頂部的分化過程中，pH值逐漸偏中性讓KLKs脫離LEKTI的抑制，從而對corneodesmosomes進行降解而發生desquamation。
④ Netherton syndrome 是由於SPINK5 mutation 造成缺乏LEKTI去抑制KLKs group，導致desquamation不斷發生而出現皮膚病灶。
A. ①　　B. ②　　C. ③　　D. ④
item2:
Regarding the skin barrier, which of the following statements is incorrect?
① Loricrin is the main component of cornified cell envelope.
②The keratinocytes in the stratum corneum are connected to each other through corneodesmosomes. Since their lateral adhesion is more stable than apicobasal adhesion, the stratum corneum will show a basket-wave structure under pathological sections.
③ Kallikrein proteases (KLKs) will be inhibited by lymphoepithelial Kazal-type-related inhibitor (LEKTI) in the acidic environment at the bottom of the stratum corneum; during the differentiation process to the top of the stratum corneum, the pH value gradually becomes neutral, allowing KLKs to escape the inhibition of LEKTI, thereby degrading corneodesmosomes and causing desquamation.
④ Netherton syndrome is due to the SPINK5 mutation resulting in the lack of LEKTI to inhibit the KLKs group, resulting in the continuous occurrence of desquamation and the appearance of skin lesions.
A. ① B. ② C. ③ D. ④

item:
關於糖尿病與皮膚疾病的相關性，下列敘述何者錯誤？
① Bullous diabeticorum可發生在上肢，其形成與局部外傷或先前感染密切有關。
② Scleredema diabeticorum 好發於罹患糖尿病的孩童之背部。
③出現Necrobiosis lipoidica與血糖高低與糖尿病控制有明顯關聯。
④糖尿病患者的皮膚表現可包括環形肉芽腫(granuloma annulare)及後天穿透性皮膚病(acquired perforating dermatosis)。
A. ①③　　B. ②④　　C. ①②③　　D. ④　　E. ①②③④
item2:
Regarding the correlation between diabetes and skin diseases, which of the following statements is incorrect?
① Bullous diabeticorum can occur in the upper limbs, and its formation is closely related to local trauma or previous infection.
② Scleredema diabeticorum often occurs on the back of children with diabetes.
③The occurrence of Necrobiosis lipoidica is significantly related to the level of blood sugar and diabetes control.
④Skin manifestations in patients with diabetes may include granuloma annulare and acquired perforating dermatosis.
A. ①③ B. ②④ C. ①②③ D. ④ E. ①②③④

item:
關於鋅(Zinc)與皮膚的相關性，下列敘述何者錯誤？
①鋅與傷口癒合有關，其含量在全身剝落性皮膚炎(generalized exfoliative dermatoses)患者會流失。
②在配方牛奶或穀類中，鋅的生物可利用率(bioavailability)皆較母奶為高。
③屬自體隱性遺傳之腸病性肢端皮膚炎(Acrodermatitis enteropathica)為SLC39A4 基因突變造成。
④鋅過量引起中毒不會有皮膚表徵，但會造成噁心、嘔吐、虛弱等症狀且血中銅離子偏低。
A. ①　　B. ②　　C. ③　　D. ④
item2:
Regarding the relationship between zinc (Zinc) and skin, which of the following statements is incorrect?
① Zinc is related to wound healing, and its content will be lost in patients with generalized exfoliative dermatoses.
②In formula milk or cereals, the bioavailability of zinc is higher than that in breast milk.
③Acrodermatitis enteropathica, which is an autologous recessive inheritance, is caused by mutations in the SLC39A4 gene.
④Poisoning caused by excessive zinc will not cause skin symptoms, but it will cause symptoms such as nausea, vomiting, weakness, and low copper ions in the blood.
A. ① B. ② C. ③ D. ④

item:
關於capillary malformation，下列敘述何者錯誤？
①是一種slow-flow malformation，又名Port wine stain。

④Capillary malformation一出生就有，可能慢慢隨時間regression。

item2:
Regarding capillary malformation, which of the following statements is wrong?
①It is a slow-flow malformation, also known as Port wine stain.
②Capillary malformation occurring in CN V2/V3 and extremities is often complicated by soft tissue or hard tissue hypertrophy.
③Capillary malformation in Sturge-Weber syndrome is related to CN V1.
④Capillary malformation is present at birth and may slowly regress over time.

item:
關於vascular disease，下列敘述何者錯誤？

item2:

item:
關於乾癬性關節炎，下列敘述何者錯誤？

②中軸型乾癬性關節炎的治療首選藥物為DMARDs，包括methotrexate及sulfasalazine。
③中軸型乾癬性關節炎發生的危險因子包括甲床分離、HLA-B27陽性及發炎性腸道疾病(inflammatory bowel disease)。
④三分之一的乾癬性關節炎患者有眼睛的問題，乾癬性皮膚發炎的併發症可導致眼瞼炎和乾眼。

Regarding psoriatic arthritis, which of the following statements is incorrect?

②The preferred drugs for the treatment of axial psoriatic arthritis are DMARDs, including methotrexate and sulfasalazine.

item:
關於異位性皮膚炎，下列敘述何者正確？
①和皮膚屏障(skin barrier)功能下降有關，相關表現包括ceramide level下降，transepidermal water loss增加及proteolytic enzyme活性上升。
②Crisaborole是外用phosphodiesterase 4 (PDE4)抑制劑，目前台灣FDA核准使用在輕中度異位性皮膚炎患者。
③在急性期，IL-4，IL-5，IL-31等type 2 (Th2)細胞激素的表現會出現在皮膚病灶處；在慢性期的皮膚病灶中，type 1 (Th1)的細胞激素例如INF-會上升。
④異位性皮膚炎之病人血液常會有eosinophil及IgE上升，目前台灣FDA核准生物製劑dupilumab及omalizumab使用在中重度異位性皮膚炎患者。

item2:
Regarding atopic dermatitis, which of the following statements is correct?
①Related to the decrease in skin barrier function. Related manifestations include decreased ceramide levels, increased transepidermal water loss, and increased proteolytic enzyme activity.
②Crisaborole is a topical phosphodiesterase 4 (PDE4) inhibitor that is currently approved by the Taiwan FDA for use in patients with mild to moderate atopic dermatitis.
③In the acute phase, the expression of type 2 (Th2) cytokines such as IL-4, IL-5, and IL-31 will appear in skin lesions; in the chronic phase of skin lesions, type 1 (Th1) cytokines such as INF- will increase.
④Patients with atopic dermatitis often have elevated levels of eosinophil and IgE in their blood. Currently, the Taiwan FDA has approved the use of the biological agents dupilumab and omalizumab in patients with moderate to severe atopic dermatitis.
A. ①③ B. ②④ C. ①②③ D. ④ E. ①②③④

item:
關於漢生病(Hansen’s disease)，下列敘述何者錯誤？
①根據菌量、神經侵犯、宿主免疫等因素，臨床表現包含從高菌量的tuberculoid leprosy 到低菌量lepromatous leprosy。
②Tuberculoid leprosy以antibody-mediated immune response為主，而lepromatous leprosy以cell-mediated immune response為主。
③Type 1 reaction 多數發生在tuberculoid leprosy，Type 2 reaction多數發生在lepromatous leprosy。
④治療藥物主要為dapsone，clofazimine，rifampicin，其他治療選項包含ofloxacin，minocycline， clarithromycin。
A. ①③　　B. ②④　　C. ①②③　　D. ④　　E. ①②③④
item2:
Regarding Hansen’s disease, which of the following statements is incorrect?
①Based on factors such as bacterial load, nerve invasion, and host immunity, clinical manifestations range from tuberculoid leprosy with high bacterial load to lepromatous leprosy with low bacterial load.
②Tuberculoid leprosy is dominated by antibody-mediated immune response, while lepromatous leprosy is dominated by cell-mediated immune response.
③Type 1 reaction mostly occurs in tuberculoid leprosy, and Type 2 reaction mostly occurs in lepromatous leprosy.
④The main treatment drugs are dapsone, clofazimine, and rifampicin. Other treatment options include ofloxacin, minocycline, and clarithromycin.
A. ①③ B. ②④ C. ①②③ D. ④ E. ①②③④

item:

③If you observe a patient talking too much, reporting a metallic taste, or feeling anxious, be alert to the possibility of central nervous system poisoning.

item:
關於Frontalis-associated lipoma，下列敘述何者正確？
①Frontalis-associated lipoma可能位於frontalis肌肉層之中或位於肌肉和肌肉下筋膜之間。

③切除較大且較深的lipoma前，可使用影像如超音波、MRI、CT來評估大小以及深度。
④移除frontalis-associated lipoma時，需平行relaxed skin tension line切開皮膚，並平行relaxed skin tension line將肌肉層慢慢剝開取出lipoma。

item:

dissection後，安排Adjuvant radiotherapy有助於避免之後產生metastasis。

After dissection, scheduling Adjuvant radiotherapy can help avoid subsequent metastasis.

item:
關於全身性硬化症(systemic sclerosis(SSc))，下列敘述何者正確？
