③Autoantibody centromere occurs in 20 to 30% of SSc, is related to HLA-DRB1 HLA-DQB1, and may clinically manifest severe intestinal disease, isolated pulmonary arterial hypertension (isolated PAH), and calcinosis.
④In patients with limited SSc and diffuse SSc, the lungs are the most commonly affected internal organs.
A. ①③ B. ②④ C. ①②③ D. ④ E. ①②③④

item:
關於藥物造成之皮膚表現，下列敘述何者正確？
①Drug-induced lupus多數為ANA陽性，且dsDNA、ssDNA也為陽性。
②藥物造成之Serum sickness like reactions常出現urticaria，eosinophilia，vasculitis及hypocomplementemia等表現。
③Drug-induced pemphigus常見為Penicillamine，captopril等藥物，且極少比例（小於10%）病人ANA值為陽性。
④Naproxen，NSAIDs，diuretics皆可能是造成pseudoporphyria的藥物。
A. ①　　B. ②　　C. ③　　D. ④
item2:
Regarding skin manifestations caused by drugs, which of the following statements is correct?
①Drug-induced lupus are mostly positive for ANA, and dsDNA and ssDNA are also positive.
② Serum sickness like reactions caused by drugs often manifest as urticaria, eosinophilia, vasculitis and hypocomplementemia.
③Drug-induced pemphigus is commonly caused by drugs such as Penicillamine and captopril, and a very small proportion (less than 10%) of patients have positive ANA values.
④Naproxen, NSAIDs, and diuretics may all be drugs that cause pseudoporphyria.
A. ① B. ② C. ③ D. ④

item:
關於梅毒（syphilis），下列敘述何者正確？
①神經梅毒（Neurosyphilis）和眼梅毒（ophthalmic syphilis）可發生在梅毒之任何階段。
②在硬性下疳（chancre）消失之後才會進入二期梅毒，梅毒疹（syphilids）不會與硬性下疳同時出現。
③二期梅毒之掌蹠皮膚病灶和軀幹斑狀丘疹性皮疹（maculopapular rash）通常不包含足夠具有傳染性的梅毒螺旋菌（treponemes），因此對於接觸此兩種梅毒皮膚病灶的人不需要做預防性治療。
④具感染性的梅毒病灶包括硬性下疳、扁平濕疣（condyloma lata）和黏膜斑（mucous patch），可出現的位置包括生殖器、肛門或口腔區域內或周圍，不會出現在身體的其他部位。
A. ①③　　B. ②④　　C. ①②③　　D. ④　　E. ①②③④
item2:
Regarding syphilis, which of the following statements is correct?
①Neurosyphilis and ophthalmic syphilis can occur at any stage of syphilis.
② Secondary syphilis will enter after the hard chancre disappears, and syphilids will not appear at the same time as the hard chancre.
③ Palmoplantar skin lesions and maculopapular rash of the trunk (maculopapular rash) of secondary syphilis usually do not contain enough contagious Treponemes, so preventive treatment is not required for people exposed to these two types of syphilis skin lesions.
④ Infectious syphilis lesions include hard chancre, condyloma lata and mucosal patches. They can appear in or around the genitals, anus or oral area, but will not appear in other parts of the body.
A. ①③ B. ②④ C. ①②③ D. ④ E. ①②③④

item:
關於Epidermal necrolysis(Stevens–Johnson syndrome/toxic epidermal necrolysis)，下列敘述何者正確？
①對於keratinocyte所造成的Cell-medicated cytotoxic reaction，以往均認為是Fas-L所造成，但近年來發現Granzyme B 於其中扮演關鍵角色，其於水泡中之濃度高於perforin，Granulysin及Fas-L之數值。
②IL-15與Epidermal necrolysis的嚴重度及死亡率有相關性。
③Cyclosporine、TNF-α inhibitor(如Etanercept)及Thalidomide可作為Steroid sparing之有效治療藥物。
④在遺傳的層面上，華人漢族的HLA-B*1502和Allopurinol所造成的Epidermal necrolysis有高度相關性。
A. ①　　B. ②　　C. ③　　D. ④
item2:
Regarding Epidermal necrolysis (Stevens–Johnson syndrome/toxic epidermal necrolysis), which of the following statements is correct?
① The Cell-medicated cytotoxic reaction caused by keratinocytes was previously thought to be caused by Fas-L, but in recent years it has been found that Granzyme B plays a key role in it, and its concentration in the vesicles is higher than the values of perforin, Granulysin and Fas-L.
②IL-15 is related to the severity and mortality of Epidermal necrolysis.
③Cyclosporine, TNF-α inhibitor (such as Etanercept) and Thalidomide can be used as effective treatments for Steroid sparing.
④At the genetic level, there is a high correlation between HLA-B*1502 of the Han Chinese and Epidermal necrolysis caused by Allopurinol.
A. ① B. ② C. ③ D. ④

item:
關於顏面表淺肌肉腱模系統(SMAS，superficial musculoaponeurotic system)，下列敘述何者正確？
①與前額肌(frontalis)、咀嚼肌(masseter)與頸闊肌(plastysma)相綿延為同一層結構。
②越靠近臉外側，SMAS的筋膜部分越厚越形成片狀；越靠近臉鼻側，越分散越薄，與面部表情肌（如顴大肌）相混合。
③顏面神經與顏面動靜脈層多位於SMAS淺面。
④是形成顏面表情構造之一。
A. ①③　　B. ②④　　C. ①②③　　D. ④　　E. ①②③④
item2:
Regarding the superficial musculoaponeurotic system (SMAS), which of the following statements is correct?
①It extends into the same layer of structure as the frontalis, masseter and platysma muscles.
② The fascia part of SMAS becomes thicker and forms a sheet as it approaches the outside of the face; it becomes dispersed and thinner as it approaches the nose of the face, and is mixed with facial expression muscles (such as zygomaticus major).
③The facial nerve and facial arteriovenous layer are mostly located superficially to the SMAS.
④It is one of the structures that form facial expressions.
A. ①③ B. ②④ C. ①②③ D. ④ E. ①②③④

item:
關於雷射光與組織交互作用(laser – tissue interaction)，下列敘述何者正確？
①雷射光與組織交互作用主要有反射(reflection)、穿透(transmission)、散射(scattering)與吸收(absorption)。
②我們戴雷射防護眼鏡，即是保護操作者被雷射光照射皮膚後散射所傷。
③雷射進入組織後的吸收效應，將造成組織溫度上升。
④雷射的穿透效應，指的是雷射光射入組織後的焦點發生改變，射入組織後光徑發生分散或轉向，增加治療標的鄰近組織受到熱傷害的機會。
A. ①③　　B. ②④　　C. ①②③　　D. ④　　E. ①②③④
item2:
Regarding laser – tissue interaction, which of the following statements is correct?
①The interaction between laser light and tissue mainly includes reflection, penetration, scattering and absorption.
② We wear laser protective glasses to protect the operator from injuries caused by laser light irradiating the skin and scattering.
③The absorption effect after the laser enters the tissue will cause the tissue temperature to rise.
④The penetration effect of laser means that the focus of the laser light changes after it enters the tissue, and the light path disperses or turns after it enters the tissue, which increases the chance of thermal damage to adjacent tissues of the treatment target.
A. ①③ B. ②④ C. ①②③ D. ④ E. ①②③④

item:
關於vasculitis，下列敘述何者正確？
①Type I cryoglobulinemia和multiple myeloma相關，常引發leukocytoclastic vasculitis。
②Erythema elevatum diutinum是一種chronic leukocytoclastic vasculitis，dapsone為第一線治療。
③Acute hemorrhagic edema of infancy也是一種IgA vasculitis，通常需給予systemic steroids治療。
④Urticarial vasculitis 合併monoclonal IgMk M component又稱為Schnitzler syndrome。
A. ①③　　B. ②④　　C. ①②③　　D. ④　　E. ①②③④
item2:
Regarding vasculitis, which of the following statements is correct?
①Type I cryoglobulinemia is related to multiple myeloma and often causes leukocytoclastic vasculitis.
②Erythema elevatum diutinum is a chronic leukocytoclastic vasculitis, and dapsone is the first-line treatment.
③Acute hemorrhagic edema of infancy is also a type of IgA vasculitis, which usually requires systemic steroids for treatment.
④Urticarial vasculitis combined with monoclonal IgMk M component is also called Schnitzler syndrome.
A. ①③ B. ②④ C. ①②③ D. ④ E. ①②③④

item:
關於抗組織胺，下列敘述何者錯誤？
①比起第一代H1抗組織胺，第二代H1抗組織胺較不會和其他藥物有交互作用。
②由於藥物會分泌到乳汁，建議哺乳婦女使用第二代抗組織胺。
③沒有證據顯示第一代H1抗組織胺或第二代H1抗組織胺會有tolerance或tachyphylaxis。
④Fexofenadine在腎功能異常者不需調整劑量。
A. ①　　B. ②　　C. ③　　D. ④
item2:
Regarding antihistamines, which of the following statements is incorrect?
①Compared with the first generation H1 antihistamines, the second generation H1 antihistamines are less likely to interact with other drugs.
②Since the drug will be secreted into breast milk, it is recommended that breastfeeding women use second-generation antihistamines.
③There is no evidence that first-generation H1 antihistamines or second-generation H1 antihistamines have tolerance or tachyphylaxis.
④Fexofenadine does not require dose adjustment in patients with abnormal renal function.
A. ① B. ② C. ③ D. ④

item:
關於filaggrin，下列敘述何者錯誤？
① Filaggrin是stratum corneum中主要的蛋白質。
② Profilaggrin在stratum granulosum表現，並在細胞內聚集形成 keratohyalin granules
③在stratum granulosum中，filaggrin被蛋白質酶分解為自由氨基酸與衍生物，形成natural moisturizing factors。
④絲聚蛋白(filaggrin)基因的缺陷是尋常性魚鱗癬及異位性皮膚炎的發病原因之一。
A. ①　　B. ②　　C. ③　　D. ④
item2:
Regarding filaggrin, which of the following statements is incorrect?
① Filaggrin is the main protein in stratum corneum.
② Profilaggrin is expressed in stratum granulosum and aggregates in cells to form keratohyalin granules
③In stratum granulosum, filaggrin is decomposed into free amino acids and derivatives by protein enzymes, forming natural moisturizing factors.
④ Defects in the filaggrin gene are one of the causes of ichthyosis vulgaris and atopic dermatitis.
A. ① B. ② C. ③ D. ④

item:
關於皮肌炎，下列敘述何者錯誤？
①皮肌炎是一種全身性自體免疫疾病呈雙峰分佈影響兒童和成人。
②皮肌炎相關的肌炎特異性自體抗體(myositis-specific autoantibodies)，其中TIF1-γ抗體陽性的患者治療反應較好，預後較佳。
③Anti-MDA5抗體陽性的患者併皮膚潰瘍，較容易出現間質性肺病(interstitial lung disease)，是死亡或嚴重後遺症的原因之一。
④在成人中大約10%到20%皮肌炎可能與惡性腫瘤共存。
A. ①　　B. ②　　C. ③　　D. ④
item2:
Regarding dermatomyositis, which of the following statements is incorrect?
① Dermatomyositis is a systemic autoimmune disease with a bimodal distribution affecting children and adults.
② Dermatomyositis-related myositis-specific autoantibodies, among which patients with positive TIF1-γ antibodies have a better response to treatment and a better prognosis.
③ Anti-MDA5 antibody-positive patients with skin ulcers are more likely to develop interstitial lung disease, which is one of the causes of death or serious sequelae.
④In approximately 10% to 20% of adults, dermatomyositis may coexist with malignant tumors.
A. ① B. ② C. ③ D. ④

item:
關於天疱瘡(pemphigus)，下列敘述何者錯誤？
①用免疫螢光和免疫化學的方式一般難以區分藥物引起或是偶發性的天疱瘡。
②尋常性天疱瘡患者使用rituximab治療時，必需先篩檢病毒性肝炎，若要接受新冠肺炎疫苗注射時不需停藥。
③腫瘤伴生性天疱瘡(paraneoplastic pemphigus)是惡性腫瘤的罕見併發症。患有良性或包被性腫瘤如Castleman腫瘤或胸腺瘤的病人，腫瘤完全切除後有可能緩解。
④疼痛性口腔炎和多形性皮疹是腫瘤伴生性天疱瘡的典型特徵(defining features)。
A. ①　　B. ②　　C. ③　　D. ④
item2:
Regarding pemphigus, which of the following statements is incorrect?
① It is generally difficult to distinguish drug-induced or sporadic pemphigus using immunofluorescence and immunochemistry methods.
② When patients with pemphigus vulgaris are treated with rituximab, they must first be screened for viral hepatitis. If they want to receive the COVID-19 vaccine, they do not need to stop taking the drug.
③ Tumor-associated pemphigus (paraneoplastic pemphigus) is a rare complication of malignant tumors. Patients with benign or encapsulated tumors such as Castleman tumor or thymoma may be relieved after complete tumor resection.
④ Painful stomatitis and polymorphic rash are the defining features of tumor-associated pemphigus.
A. ① B. ② C. ③ D. ④

item:
關於組織免疫染色Immunohistochemical stain，以下染色陽性者，需要考慮的相關疾病，下列敘述何者錯誤？
① CK20: Merkel cell carcinoma
② p63: Extramammary Paget’s disease
③ GLUT1: infantile hemangioma
④ CD34: Dermatofibrosarcoma protuberans
A. ①　　B. ②　　C. ③　　D. ④
item2:
Regarding tissue immunostaining, if the following staining is positive, there are related diseases that need to be considered. Which of the following statements is wrong?
① CK20: Merkel cell carcinoma
② p63: Extramammary Paget’s disease
③ GLUT1: infantile hemangioma
④ CD34: Dermatofibrosarcoma protuberans
A. ① B. ② C. ③ D. ④

item:
下列敘述何者錯誤？
①兒童及嬰幼兒出現全身性的紅疹伴隨trichorrhexis invaginata，則有可能是Netherton syndrome。
②Wooly hair syndrome的病人可能會出現cardiomyopathy和palmoplantar keratoderma。這些病人主要由desmosomal proteins的突變所造成。
③和discoid lupus erythematosus相比，lichen planopilaris的病灶通常較大且形狀較規則。
④部分的tinea capitis可能會造成永久的毛髮喪失，屬於一種secondary cicatricial alopecia。
A. ①　　B. ②　　C. ③　　D. ④
item2:
Which of the following statements is wrong?
① If children and infants develop generalized rash accompanied by trichorrhexis invaginata, it may be Netherton syndrome.
②Patients with Wooly hair syndrome may develop cardiomyopathy and palmoplantar keratoderma. These patients are mainly caused by mutations in desmosomal proteins.
③Compared with discoid lupus erythematosus, the lesions of lichen planopilaris are usually larger and more regular in shape.
④Some tinea capitis may cause permanent hair loss and is a type of secondary cicatricial alopecia.
A. ① B. ② C. ③ D. ④

item:
關於congenital syphilis，下列敘述何者錯誤？
①30%-40%胎死腹中。
②存活者中三分之二於出生時無症狀。
③若母親為primary syphilis，則傳染給胎兒的機會遠高於late latent syphilis。
④可能的症狀包括 chancre, secondary syphilis-like rash 或neurosyphilis。
A. ①　　B. ②　　C. ③　　D. ④
item2:
Regarding congenital syphilis, which of the following statements is incorrect?
①30%-40% of fetuses are stillborn.
②Two-thirds of survivors are asymptomatic at birth.
③If the mother is primary syphilis, the chance of infecting the fetus is much higher than that of late latent syphilis.
④Possible symptoms include chancre, secondary syphilis-like rash or neurosyphilis.
A. ① B. ② C. ③ D. ④

item:
許多sexually transmitted diseases 皆可出現陰部潰瘍(genital ulcer)及局部淋巴結(lymph node, LN)腫大，二者是否有疼痛感可為鑑別診斷之參考，下列敘述何者錯誤？
① Primary syphilis: painless ulcer (chancre), painless LN。
② Lymphogranuloma venereum: painful ulcer, painful LN。
③ Chancroid: painful ulcer, painful LN。
④ Granuloma inguinale: painless ulcer, rarely involve LN。
A. ①　　B. ②　　C. ③　　D. ④
item2:
Many sexually transmitted diseases can cause genital ulcers and local lymph node (LN) swelling. Whether there is pain in both can be used as a reference for differential diagnosis. Which of the following statements is wrong?
① Primary syphilis: painless ulcer (chancre), painless LN.
② Lymphogranuloma venereum: painful ulcer, painful LN.
③ Chancroid: painful ulcer, painful LN.
④ Granuloma inguinale: painless ulcer, rarely involving LN.
A. ① B. ② C. ③ D. ④

item:
一年輕男性於海邊衝浪時不慎被海膽(sea urchin)刺傷，下列敘述何者正確？
①若擔心海膽的spines傷及關節或骨頭，可接受X-ray檢查，因海膽之spines由calcium carbonate所組成。
② Spines刺入處可能因未拔除的刺或釋出的色素而出現black or purple discoloration，大多在48-72小時內消失。
③可因delayed-type hypersensitivity而在數天後造成紅疹及劇烈搔癢。
④為了緩解急性刺傷的疼痛反應，建議將患部浸泡在攝氏43-46度的水中。
A. ①③　　B. ②④　　C. ①②③　　D. ④　　E. ①②③④
item2:
A young man was accidentally stabbed by a sea urchin while surfing at the beach. Which of the following statements is correct?
① If you are worried that the spines of sea urchins may damage joints or bones, you can undergo X-ray examination because the spines of sea urchins are composed of calcium carbonate.
② Black or purple discoloration may appear at the spine piercing site due to unremoved spines or released pigments, which usually disappears within 48-72 hours.
③ May cause red rash and severe itching after a few days due to delayed-type hypersensitivity.
④In order to relieve the pain response of acute stab wounds, it is recommended to soak the affected area in water at 43-46 degrees Celsius.
A. ①③ B. ②④ C. ①②③ D. ④ E. ①②③④

item:
根據NCCN (National Comprehensive Center Network) guidelines，下列何者不是皮膚鱗狀上皮細胞癌產生局部復發或轉移的危險因子？
①腫瘤直徑2.3 cm位於背部。
②腫瘤直徑0.7 cm位於額頭。
③病理檢查顯示為poorly differentiated，腫瘤侵犯深度0.5cm。
④病人的腫瘤長在之前接受過放射線治療的部位。
A. ①　　B. ②　　C. ③　　D. ④
item2:
According to NCCN (National Comprehensive Center Network) guidelines, which of the following is not a risk factor for local recurrence or metastasis of cutaneous squamous cell carcinoma?
①The tumor is 2.3 cm in diameter and is located on the back.
②The tumor diameter is 0.7 cm and is located on the forehead.
③Pathological examination showed that the tumor was poorly differentiated and the depth of tumor invasion was 0.5cm.
④The patient’s tumor grows in the area that has been previously treated with radiation.
A. ① B. ② C. ③ D. ④

item:
關於congenital melanocytic nevus (CMN)以及melanoma，下列敘述何者錯誤？
①Giant CMN（直徑>40cm） with satellite nevi在病人一生當中(lifetime risk)發生melanoma的機會高達50%，需密切追蹤。
②位於頭部、身體中線或有許多衛星病灶(satellite lesion)的CMN有較高機會出現neurocutaneous melanosis，若合併神經學症狀則預後相當差。
③在melanoma分型當中最常與preexisting nevi相關的為superficial spreading melanoma。
④在melanoma分型當中最少與preexisting nevi相關的為lentigo maligna melanoma。
A. ①　　B. ②　　C. ③　　D. ④
item2:
Regarding congenital melanocytic nevus (CMN) and melanoma, which of the following statements is incorrect?
①Giant CMN (diameter >40cm) with satellite nevi has a chance of developing melanoma during the patient's lifetime (lifetime risk) as high as 50%, and needs to be followed closely.
② CMN located in the head, midline of the body or with many satellite lesions (satellite lesions) have a higher chance of developing neurocutaneous melanosis. If combined with neurological symptoms, the prognosis is quite poor.
③Among the melanoma classifications, the most commonly associated with preexisting nevi is superficial spreading melanoma.
④ Among the melanoma types, the one least related to preexisting nevi is lentigo maligna melanoma.
A. ① B. ② C. ③ D. ④

item:
下列敘述何者錯誤？
①女性如要檢測痤瘡患者是否有雄性賀爾蒙過多症（hyperandrogenism），建議在排卵期且沒有服用口服避孕藥1個月以上的時候做抽血檢查。
②新生兒痤瘡（Neonatal acne）主要分布在鼻子及臉頰，特徵為不會有comedones，會大約在2周大時出現，並在3個月內自行緩解。
③夏季痤瘡（Acne aestivalis）常見在肩膀、手臂、脖子以及前胸，主要由UVA產生的，且口服抗生素不會加速病灶緩解。
④關於猛爆型痤瘡（Acne fulminans）的治療，建議先使用口服或局部注射皮質類固醇，治療2~4週後再開始使用低劑量口服isotretinoin。
A. ①　　B. ②　　C. ③　　D. ④
item2:
Which of the following statements is wrong?
① If women want to detect whether acne patients have hyperandrogenism, it is recommended to do a blood test during the ovulation period and when they have not taken oral contraceptives for more than 1 month.
② Neonatal acne is mainly distributed on the nose and cheeks. It is characterized by the absence of comedones. It will appear at about 2 weeks of age and resolve itself within 3 months.
③ Summer acne (Acne aestivalis) is common on the shoulders, arms, neck and chest. It is mainly produced by UVA, and oral antibiotics will not accelerate the remission of the lesions.
④ Regarding the treatment of acne fulminans, it is recommended to use oral or local injection of corticosteroids first, and then start using low-dose oral isotretinoin after 2 to 4 weeks of treatment.
A. ① B. ② C. ③ D. ④

item:
虎頭蜂、蜜蜂和紅火蟻(fire ant)皆屬Hymenoptera，下列敘述何者正確 ？
①叮咬後的立即反應為灼熱、疼痛，大多數小時內緩解。
②最嚴重的反應為anaphylaxis，可使用epinephrine急救。
③紅火蟻分泌之毒素可使mast cell degranulation並可產生sterile pustules。
④蜂刺不應移除，待其自然脫落，以免引入更多venom進入皮膚。
A. ①③　　B. ②④　　C. ①②③　　D. ④　　E. ①②③④
item2:
Hornets, bees and fire ants all belong to the genus Hymenoptera. Which of the following statements is correct?
①The immediate reaction after the bite is burning and pain, which usually subside within hours.
②The most serious reaction is anaphylaxis, and epinephrine can be used for first aid.
③The toxin secreted by fire ants can cause mast cell degranulation and produce sterile pustules.
④ The bee stinger should not be removed and allowed to fall off naturally to avoid introducing more venom into the skin.
A. ①③ B. ②④ C. ①②③ D. ④ E. ①②③④

item:
關於UV和免疫反應，下列敘述何者錯誤？
①naked DNA吸收 UV的高峰波長在300nm，但是活化基底層角質細胞DNA最有效的波長是400nm。
② UV的免疫刺激作用主要是透過innate immunity和釋放發炎物質如prostaglandins, IL-1, IL-6, IL-8, TNF-α。
③ UV的免疫抑制作用主要是透過釋放IL-12, α- MSH，以及刺激antigen specific regulatory T 細胞來達成。
④ UV造成的免疫抑制，不限於日光曝曬之皮膚，也會出現在沒有日光曝曬之皮膚。
A. ①③　　B. ②④　　C. ①②③　　D. ④　　E. ①②③④
item2:
Regarding UV and immune responses, which of the following statements is incorrect?
①The peak wavelength of UV absorbed by naked DNA is 300nm, but the most effective wavelength to activate the DNA of basal layer keratinocytes is 400nm.
② The immune stimulating effect of UV is mainly through innate immunity and the release of inflammatory substances such as prostaglandins, IL-1, IL-6, IL-8, and TNF-α.
③ The immunosuppressive effect of UV is mainly achieved through the release of IL-12, α-MSH, and stimulation of antigen specific regulatory T cells.
④ Immunosuppression caused by UV is not limited to sun-exposed skin, but can also occur in skin without sun exposure.
A. ①③ B. ②④ C. ①②③ D. ④ E. ①②③④

item:
關於冷凍治療，下列敘述何者錯誤？
①冷凍要確實符合病灶的區域，切勿超過範圍。
②黑色素細胞對低溫特別敏感，可能造成永久性色素脱失。
③除了液態氮，冷凍治療也可以採用二氧化碳乾冰。
④除了皮膚良性腫瘤及病毒疣，波文氏症、日光性角化症也可以採用冷凍治療。
A. ①　　B. ②　　C. ③　　D. ④
item2:
Regarding cryotherapy, which of the following statements is incorrect?
① The freezing should exactly fit the area of the lesion and do not exceed the range.
②Melanocytes are particularly sensitive to low temperatures, which may cause permanent depigmentation.
③In addition to liquid nitrogen, carbon dioxide dry ice can also be used for cryotherapy.
④In addition to benign skin tumors and viral warts, cryotherapy can also be used for Bowen's disease and actinic keratosis.
A. ① B. ② C. ③ D. ④

item:
關於UV造成的基因突變，下列敘述何者正確？
①cyclobutane pyrimidine dimer (CPD)主要是由UV光中的UVB造成的DNA破壞，其產生的光化產物(photoproduct)主要是 CC CPD。
②最主要的UV signature mutation 是T→ C 改變。
③造成xeroderma pigmentosa的基因缺陷主要是 transcription coupled repair (TCR)。
④UVA會造成類似氧化的突變(oxidation-like mutation)以及T→ G 改變，是所謂的UVA fingerprint。
註：C：cytosine，G：guanine，T：thymine。
A. ①　　B. ②　　C. ③　　D. ④
item2:
Regarding genetic mutations caused by UV, which of the following statements is correct?
①Cyclobutane pyrimidine dimer (CPD) is mainly caused by DNA damage caused by UVB in UV light, and the photoproduct (photoproduct) it produces is mainly CC CPD.
②The most important UV signature mutation is the T→C change.
③The gene defect causing xeroderma pigmentosa is mainly transcription coupled repair (TCR).
④ UVA can cause oxidation-like mutations and T→G changes, which is the so-called UVA fingerprint.
Note: C: cytosine, G: guanine, T: thymine.
A. ① B. ② C. ③ D. ④

item:
關於指甲治療，下列敘述何者錯誤？
①急性指甲下出血，冰敷可緩解疼痛，切勿引流造成感染。
②Nail matrix 使用大於3 mm的punch biopsy有非常高的比例會造成nail dystrophy。
③Melanonychia採用tangential matrix biopsy的方式可以得到最好的手術結果跟檢體的採樣。
④指甲手術的麻醉劑可以加epinephrine，減少手術視野出血。
A. ①　　B. ②　　C. ③　　D. ④
item2:
Regarding nail treatment, which of the following statements is incorrect?
① For acute bleeding under the nail, applying ice can relieve the pain. Do not allow drainage to cause infection.
②Nail matrix Using punch biopsy larger than 3 mm has a very high rate of causing nail dystrophy.
③Melanonychia uses tangential matrix biopsy to obtain the best surgical results and specimen sampling.
④Epinephrine can be added to the anesthetic for nail surgery to reduce bleeding in the surgical field.
A. ① B. ② C. ③ D. ④

item:
下列敘述何者錯誤？
①皮膚的表現像異位性皮膚炎，IgE>2000 IU/ml，反覆發生staphylococcal skin abscess, 且常以cold abscess表現，反覆肺炎，要考慮Hyper-IgE syndrome。
②Hyper-IgE syndrome的病人，發生mucocutaneous candidiasis之機率並不高。
③Hyper-IgE syndrome最常見的基因變異在STAT-3。
④Chronic mucocutaneous candidiasis臨床表現為recurrent, progressive candida infection of skin, nail 及mucous membrane; 也極易產生systemic candidiasis。主要是因T-helper 17 cell 對candida之 impaired responsiveness。
A. ①③　　B. ②④　　C. ①②③　　D. ④　　E. ①②③④
item2:
Which of the following statements is wrong?
① If the skin behaves like atopic dermatitis, IgE>2000 IU/ml, staphylococcal skin abscess occurs repeatedly, and often manifests as cold abscess, and pneumonia occurs repeatedly, Hyper-IgE syndrome should be considered.
②Patients with Hyper-IgE syndrome are less likely to develop mucocutaneous candidiasis.
③The most common genetic variation in Hyper-IgE syndrome is STAT-3.
④The clinical manifestations of Chronic mucocutaneous candidiasis are recurrent, progressive candida infection of skin, nail and mucous membrane; it is also very easy to produce systemic candidiasis. This is mainly due to the impaired responsiveness of T-helper 17 cell to candida.
A. ①③ B. ②④ C. ①②③ D. ④ E. ①②③④

item:
關於念珠菌造成的指甲相關疾病，下列敘述何者錯誤？
①念珠菌與慢性甲溝炎有關，表現為proximal nailfold area紅斑，伴有角質層脫落(loss of the cuticle)和皮膚破損，有時伴有onycholysis和nail dystrophy。
②念珠菌通常以甲溝炎開始，也可直接侵入指甲板並產生甲癬。
③念珠菌甲癬在腳趾甲比在手指甲更常見，通常與指甲板受壓時的疼痛有關。
④5%至10%的甲癬是由念珠菌引起的。
A. ①　　B. ②　　C. ③　　D. ④
item2:
Regarding nail-related diseases caused by Candida, which of the following statements is incorrect?
① Candida is related to chronic paronychia, which manifests as proximal nailfold area erythema, accompanied by loss of the cuticle and skin damage, sometimes accompanied by onycholysis and nail dystrophy.
② Candida usually starts as paronychia, but can also directly invade the nail plate and produce onychomycosis.
③ Candida onychomycosis is more common in toenails than fingernails and is usually related to pain when the nail plate is pressed.
④5% to 10% of onychomycosis is caused by Candida.
A. ① B. ② C. ③ D. ④

item:
關於表淺真菌感染(superficial fungal infection) ，下列敘述何者錯誤？
①毛癬菌屬的Trichophyton tonsurans感染頭髮可以用伍氏燈（Wood's lamp）檢查看到綠色的螢光來協助診斷。
②皮膚真菌感染最常見的致病菌是Trichophyton rubrum。
③Dermatophytid (or id) reaction發生率約4%至5%，一般認為機轉是人體對真菌抗原的局部延遲型過敏反應。
④灰黃黴素(griseofulvin)不再被認為是甲癬的標準治療方法，因為其療程長、潛在的不良反應和藥物相互作用且治癒率相對較低。
A. ①　　B. ②　　C. ③　　D. ④
item2:
Regarding superficial fungal infection, which of the following statements is incorrect?
① Hair infected by Trichophyton tonsurans can be examined with a Wood's lamp to see green fluorescence to assist in diagnosis.
②The most common causative bacterium of skin fungal infection is Trichophyton rubrum.
③The incidence rate of Dermatophytid (or id) reaction is about 4% to 5%. It is generally believed that the mechanism is a local delayed allergic reaction of the human body to fungal antigens.
④ Griseofulvin is no longer considered the standard treatment for onychomycosis due to its long course of treatment, potential adverse reactions and drug interactions, and relatively low cure rate.
A. ① B. ② C. ③ D. ④

item:
下列敘述何者錯誤？
① Café au lait spots 通常是Neurofibromatosis type 1 (NF-1 )最早出現的臨床表現，café au lait spots的數量越多，通常NF-1疾病的嚴重度也較高。
② Sphenoid dysplasia or thinning of long bone cortex是NF-1診斷的criteria之一；scoliosis是NF-1最常見的skeletal manifestation。
③ NF-1 病人的optic pathway tumors 多在6歲前發生。照顧此年齡層NF-1病人的醫師要有高度的警覺，定期詳細的眼睛檢查是很重要的。
④醫師需要注意NF-1病人的生長曲線，太快速的生長，代表precocious puberty，要注意是否有chiasmal tumors。
A. ①　　B. ②　　C. ③　　D. ④
item2:
Which of the following statements is wrong?
① Café au lait spots are usually the earliest clinical manifestation of Neurofibromatosis type 1 (NF-1). The greater the number of café au lait spots, the higher the severity of NF-1 disease.
② Sphenoid dysplasia or thinning of long bone cortex is one of the criteria for NF-1 diagnosis; scoliosis is the most common skeletal manifestation of NF-1.
③ Optic pathway tumors in NF-1 patients mostly occur before the age of 6. Physicians caring for NF-1 patients in this age group must be highly vigilant, and it is important to conduct regular and detailed eye examinations.
④Doctors need to pay attention to the growth curve of NF-1 patients. Too rapid growth represents precocious puberty, and they should pay attention to whether there are chiasmal tumors.
A. ① B. ② C. ③ D. ④

item:
下列敘述何者正確？
①Acute GVHD的immune pathway主要為Th-1及Th-17。細胞中cytotoxic T cells及natural killer cells扮演重要之角色，相關的發炎介質為tumor necrosis factor, interferon-α, IL-1, IL-2。
②Chronic GVHD的immune pathway主要為Th-2及Th-17。細胞中B cells扮演重要之角色，相關的發炎介質為B-cell activating factor, platelet-derived growth factor, transforming growth factor-β, IL-6, IL-21。
③Acute GVHD往往需要與engraftment syndrome, toxic erythema of chemotherapy, eruption of lymphocyte recovery, viral reactivation做鑑別診斷；疹子始於palms, soles, ear或者出現perifollicular erythema，比較可能是acute GVHD。
④Chronic GVHD之皮膚表現包括poikiloderma, lichen sclerosus-like lesions, lichen planus-like eruption, morphea-like lesions, depigmentation。
A. ①③　　B. ②④　　C. ①②③　　D. ④　　E. ①②③④
item2:
Which of the following statements is correct?
①The immune pathway of Acute GVHD is mainly Th-1 and Th-17. Cytotoxic T cells and natural killer cells play an important role in the cells. The relevant inflammatory mediators are tumor necrosis factor, interferon-α, IL-1, and IL-2.
②The immune pathway of Chronic GVHD is mainly Th-2 and Th-17. B cells play an important role in the cells, and the relevant inflammatory mediators are B-cell activating factor, platelet-derived growth factor, transforming growth factor-β, IL-6, and IL-21.
③Acute GVHD often requires differential diagnosis with engraftment syndrome, toxic erythema of chemotherapy, eruption of lymphocyte recovery, and viral reactivation; if the rash starts in the palms, soles, ears, or perifollicular erythema appears, it is more likely to be acute GVHD.
④Skin manifestations of Chronic GVHD include poikiloderma, lichen sclerosus-like lesions, lichen planus-like eruption, morphea-like lesions, and depigmentation.
A. ①③ B. ②④ C. ①②③ D. ④ E. ①②③④

item:
關於mastocytosis，下列敘述何者正確？
①Solitary mastocytoma常見於兒童，diffuse cutaneous mastocytosis則常見於成人。
②兒童之mastocytosis，若有肝脾腫大或淋巴結腫大時應安排bone marrow biopsy。
③Darier sign 在成人較兒童常見，是因成人病灶之mast cell concentration較高。
④c-KIT mutation 與兒童mastocytosis 之嚴重度無關。
A. ①③　　B. ②④　　C. ①②③　　D. ④　　E. ①②③④
item2:
Regarding mastocytosis, which of the following statements is correct?
①Solitary mastocytoma is common in children, while diffuse cutaneous mastocytosis is common in adults.
② For mastocytosis in children, bone marrow biopsy should be arranged if there is hepatosplenomegaly or lymphadenopathy.
③Darier sign is more common in adults than in children because the mast cell concentration of adult lesions is higher.
④c-KIT mutation has nothing to do with the severity of mastocytosis in children.
A. ①③ B. ②④ C. ①②③ D. ④ E. ①②③④

item:

下列insect bite可以藉使用N, N-diethyl-3-methylbenzamide (DEET) 加以預防。其相對應可藉以傳播的疾病，正確的包括：

item:
關於Dermatomyositis，下列敘述何者正確？
①與interstitial lung disease較有相關的是anti-MDA5抗體以及mechanic’s hand；而與cancer較有相關的抗體是anti-TIF1-γ及anti-NXP2，但有以上這兩種抗體的病人大部份仍無cancer。
②Periungual erythema在dermatomyositis及lupus erythematosus都可以出現，但以dermatomyositis較為明顯。
③Antimalaria是對dermatomyositis皮膚表現的第一線用藥。
④一般adult dermatomyositis較juvenile dermatomyositis易出現calcinosis cutis。
A. ①③　　B. ②④　　C. ①②③　　D. ④　　E. ①②③④
item2:
Regarding Dermatomyositis, which of the following statements is correct?
① The antibodies more related to interstitial lung disease are anti-MDA5 antibodies and mechanical’s hand; the antibodies more related to cancer are anti-TIF1-γ and anti-NXP2, but most patients with the above two antibodies still do not have cancer.
②Periungual erythema can appear in both dermatomyositis and lupus erythematosus, but it is more obvious in dermatomyositis.
③Antimalaria is the first-line drug for the skin manifestations of dermatomyositis.
④Adult dermatomyositis is generally more prone to calcinosis cutis than juvenile dermatomyositis.
A. ①③ B. ②④ C. ①②③ D. ④ E. ①②③④

item:
關於Merkel cell carcinoma(MCC)，下列敘述何者正確？
①大約八成的MCC與Merkel cell polyomavirus相關，此病毒為一double-stranded DNA virus。
②在MCC有復發的病人當中，約有八成發生於初次診斷兩年內。
③理學檢查以及影像學檢查若無發現淋巴結侵犯，建議進行sentinel lymph node biopsy同時切除皮膚原發病灶，多數病人於切除皮膚原發病灶後建議合併adjuvant radiation therapy。
④MCC在男性比女性更常見，然而女性病人的預後較差。
A. ①③　　B. ②④　　C. ①②③　　D. ④　　E. ①②③④
item2:
Regarding Merkel cell carcinoma (MCC), which of the following statements is correct?
①About 80% of MCCs are related to Merkel cell polyomavirus, which is a double-stranded DNA virus.
② Among patients with MCC recurrence, approximately 80% occur within two years of initial diagnosis.
③If no lymph node invasion is found in physical examination and imaging examination, it is recommended to perform sentinel lymph node biopsy and remove the primary skin lesions at the same time. For most patients, it is recommended to combine adjuvant radiation therapy after removing the primary skin lesions.
④MCC is more common in men than women, but female patients have a poorer prognosis.
A. ①③ B. ②④ C. ①②③ D. ④ E. ①②③④

item:
關於惡性黑色素細胞瘤，下列敘述何者正確？
①Superficial spreading melanoma以及nodular melanoma最常呈現的基因突變是BRAF。
②Desmoplastic melanoma多發生於日光曝曬的頭頸部，其中高達半數為amelanotic，且經常呈現NF1基因的突變。
③發生於sun-damaged skin之lentigo maligna melanoma，c-KIT基因突變較BRAF基因突變更為常見。
④Melanoma-associated retinopathies為melanoma的併發症之一，較常見於男性。
A. ①③　　B. ②④　　C. ①②③　　D. ④　　E. ①②③④
item2:
Regarding malignant melanocytoma, which of the following statements is correct?
①The most common genetic mutation in Superficial spreading melanoma and nodular melanoma is BRAF.
②Desmoplastic melanoma mostly occurs on the sun-exposed head and neck, up to half of which are amelanotic, and often exhibit mutations in the NF1 gene.
③ In lentigo maligna melanoma that occurs in sun-damaged skin, c-KIT gene mutations are more common than BRAF gene mutations.
④Melanoma-associated retinopathies are one of the complications of melanoma and are more common in men.
A. ①③ B. ②④ C. ①②③ D. ④ E. ①②③④

item:
下列敘述何者正確？
①Striae distensae比較好發於年紀大的經產婦女。
②跟anetoderma相關的疾病包含antiphospholipid syndrome、autoimmune thyroiditis以及lupus erythematosus。
③青春期的女生好發striae distensae的位置為大腿、肩膀及腰。
④Linear focal elastosis (elastotic striae)常見於老年男性的下背，為黃色突起且線狀分布之病灶。
A. ①③　　B. ②④　　C. ①②③　　D. ④　　E. ①②③④
item2:

item:

item2:

②Exanthematic pustular psoriasis is different from generalized pustular psoriasis in that it is not easy to relapse.

item:
關於Kimura disease (KD)及angiolymphoid hyperplasia with eosinophilia (ALHE)，下列敘述何者正確？
①病理下，ALHE常會有prominent lymphoid follicles with germinal centers，但KD通常沒有。
②KD超過九成的病人合併有nephropathy，ALHE則較不合併nephropathy。
③和KD相比，ALHE病灶較小、較表淺，且較有overlying erythema。
④ALHE抽血較常見serum IgE 升高，KD則較少有IgE升高之情形。

item2:
Regarding Kimura disease (KD) and angiolymphoid hyperplasia with eosinophilia (ALHE), which of the following statements is correct?
① Pathologically, ALHE often has prominent lymphoid follicles with germinal centers, but KD usually does not.
② More than 90% of patients with KD are complicated by nephropathy, while ALHE is less likely to be complicated by nephropathy.
③Compared with KD, ALHE lesions are smaller, more superficial, and have more overlying erythema.

item:
關於photosensitivity，下列敘述何者正確？
①造成大多數由外源性物質引發的phototoxicity和photoallergy的光源是UVA。
②造成phototoxicity需要暴露的物質劑量通常比較大，造成photoallergy需要暴露的物質劑量通常比較小。
③Psoralen plus UVA (PUVA)和大部分phototoxicity出現症狀的時候不同。PUVA的急性反應通常在24小時後出現。
④Naproxen可能引發pseudoporphyria，doxycycline可能引起photo-onycholysis。
A. ①③　　B. ②④　　C. ①②③　　D. ④　　E. ①②③④
item2:
Regarding photosensitivity, which of the following statements is correct?
①The light source that causes most phototoxicity and photoallergy caused by exogenous substances is UVA.
② The dose of substances required to cause phototoxicity is usually relatively large, and the dose of substances required to cause photoallergy is usually relatively small.
③The onset of symptoms of Psoralen plus UVA (PUVA) is different from that of most phototoxicities. The acute reaction of PUVA usually appears after 24 hours.
④Naproxen may cause pseudoporphyria, and doxycycline may cause photo-onycholysis.
A. ①③ B. ②④ C. ①②③ D. ④ E. ①②③④

item:
關於granuloma annulare，下列敘述何者正確？
①可以分成localized, generalized, subcutaneous, perforating, and patch type，病灶通常伴隨劇癢。
② Generalized type建議要抽血檢查lipid profile。
③糖尿病病患容易出現granuloma annulare，尤其是non-insulin-dependent type。
④對頑固型的granuloma annulare，除了外用及系統性類固醇以外，可使用系統性TNF-alpha或JAK抑制劑。
A. ①③　　B. ②④　　C. ①②③　　D. ④　　E. ①②③④
item2:
Regarding granuloma annulare, which of the following statements is correct?
① It can be divided into localized, generalized, subcutaneous, perforating, and patch type. The lesions are usually accompanied by severe itching.
② For Generalized type, it is recommended to draw blood to check the lipid profile.
③Patients with diabetes are prone to granuloma annulare, especially non-insulin-dependent type.
④For refractory granuloma annulare, in addition to topical and systemic steroids, systemic TNF-alpha or JAK inhibitors can be used.
A. ①③ B. ②④ C. ①②③ D. ④ E. ①②③④

item:
關於扮演屏障角色之緊密連接(tight junction)，下列敘述何者錯誤？
① Tight junction分布於皮膚與腸胃道，可避免水分與養分喪失。
②在人類正常軀幹皮膚，tight junction分布於基底層、棘狀層與顆粒層的細胞間隙。
③活化之Langerhans cell可將其突觸延伸到tight junction之外，以獲取外來的抗原。
④是外層皮膚對於空氣與水介面(air-liquid interface)的重要屏障。
A. ①③　　B. ②④　　C. ①②③　　D. ④　　E. ①②③④
item2:
Regarding tight junctions that play a barrier role, which of the following statements is incorrect?
① Tight junction is distributed in the skin and gastrointestinal tract to avoid loss of water and nutrients.
②In normal human trunk skin, tight junctions are distributed in the intercellular spaces of the basal layer, spinous layer and granular layer.
③Activated Langerhans cells can extend their synapses beyond the tight junction to acquire foreign antigens.
④ It is an important barrier for the outer skin to the air-liquid interface.
A. ①③ B. ②④ C. ①②③ D. ④ E. ①②③④

item:
關於JAK/STAT訊息傳遞途徑之應用，下列敘述何者正確？
①有JAK1, JAK2, JAK3與TYK2等4個Janus family kinases，可與細胞質內轉錄因子STAT作用。
②JAK抑制劑可佔據ATP binding site。
③細胞激素與其接受器結合時，會使細胞內側的JAK進行磷酸化反應，而活化下游STAT蛋白且形成二聚體，進入細胞核進行轉錄作用，進而引起後續反應。
④Tofacitinib為選擇性JAK1抑制劑，對乾癬、乾癬性關節炎和圓禿等疾病有療效。
A. ①③　　B. ②④　　C. ①②③　　D. ④　　E. ①②③④
item2:
Regarding the application of the JAK/STAT messaging pathway, which of the following statements is correct?
①There are four Janus family kinases, including JAK1, JAK2, JAK3 and TYK2, which can interact with the cytoplasmic transcription factor STAT.
②JAK inhibitors can occupy the ATP binding site.
③When the cytokine binds to its receptor, it causes the JAK on the inside of the cell to undergo a phosphorylation reaction, activates the downstream STAT protein and forms a dimer, enters the nucleus for transcription, and then causes subsequent reactions.
④Tofacitinib is a selective JAK1 inhibitor and is effective in treating diseases such as psoriasis, psoriatic arthritis, and alopecia areata.
A. ①③ B. ②④ C. ①②③ D. ④ E. ①②③④

item:
下列哪些臨床狀況適合使用Mohs micrographic surgery？

②位於背上1.5cm大小的dermatofibrosarcoma protuberans。

④在右小腿後側無潰瘍的superficial spreading melanoma，病理切片顯示Breslow tumor thickness 2.3mm，有microsatellites。

item2:

item:

②Polymorphic light eruption通常出現在臉部和手部等陽光曝曬的地方。

④Polymorphic light eruption通常出現在春天或是初夏，在第一次暴露於強烈劑量的陽光後數小時至數天內發生。

item2:

②Polymorphic light eruption usually appears in sun-exposed areas such as the face and hands.

item:
關於皮膚手術，下列敘述何者正確？
①可吸收縫線的選擇上，如果希望皮膚組織反應較低，線材強度維持時間較長，polydioxanone (PDS)的選擇會優於polyglycolic acid (PGA)。
②眼周手術要使用不含酒精的chlorhexidine消毒，以避免消毒液不慎流入眼內時，造成角膜發炎或潰瘍。
③耳部手術若發生術後感染，常見病原菌要考慮Staphylococcus aureus及Pseudomonas。
④一般而言，在術後2週拆線時，傷口的強度上已恢復到最終強度的70%以上。
A. ①③　　B. ②④　　C. ①②③　　D. ④　　E. ①②③④
item2:
Regarding skin surgery, which of the following statements is correct?
① In the selection of absorbable sutures, if you want lower skin tissue reaction and longer wire strength maintenance, polydioxanone (PDS) will be better than polyglycolic acid (PGA).
② Alcohol-free chlorhexidine should be used for disinfection during eye surgery to prevent the disinfectant from accidentally flowing into the eyes, causing corneal inflammation or ulcers.
③If postoperative infection occurs after ear surgery, Staphylococcus aureus and Pseudomonas should be considered as common pathogens.
④ Generally speaking, when the sutures are removed 2 weeks after surgery, the strength of the wound has returned to more than 70% of its final strength.
A. ①③ B. ②④ C. ①②③ D. ④ E. ①②③④

item:
關於結節性癢疹(prurigo nodularis)致病機轉，下列敘述何者錯誤？
①研究指出IL-36在異位性皮膚炎的結節性癢疹中會大量表現，IL-36是由T細胞放出且直接與癢相關的發炎介質。
②Transient receptor potential cation channel subfamily V member 1 (TRPV1)受體在結節性癢疹中表現大量上升，TRPV1在感受癢、熱與疼痛扮演重要角色。
③病灶皮膚會釋放較多的發炎性細胞激素，例如：tumor necrosis factor-alpha、IL­1以及IL­8。
④病灶表現較多nerve growth factor以及neuropeptides，例如calcitonin gene­related peptide (CGRP)和substance P。
A. ①　　B. ②　　C. ③　　D. ④
item2:
Regarding the pathogenesis of prurigo nodularis, which of the following statements is incorrect?
① Studies have pointed out that IL-36 is expressed in large amounts in nodular prurigo of atopic dermatitis. IL-36 is an inflammatory mediator released by T cells and directly related to itch.
②Transient receptor potential cation channel subfamily V member 1 (TRPV1) receptors are significantly increased in nodular prurigo. TRPV1 plays an important role in sensing itch, heat and pain.
③The skin of the lesion will release more inflammatory cytokines, such as: tumor necrosis factor-alpha, IL1 and IL8.
④The lesions show more nerve growth factors and neuropeptides, such as calcitonin generelated peptide (CGRP) and substance P.
A. ① B. ② C. ③ D. ④

item:
關於刺激性接觸性皮膚炎(irritant contact dermatitis)與過敏性接觸性皮膚炎(allergic contact dermatitis)之比較，下列敘述何者錯誤？
①急性期時，刺激性接觸性皮膚炎可僅局限於暴露位置、界線分明；過敏性接觸性皮膚炎病灶則可從暴露位置往外散出至周圍，常常呈微小丘疹，甚至可擴散至全身。
②刺激性接觸性皮膚炎的進程較長，初次暴露後需要12至72小時發病；過敏性接觸性皮膚炎的進程則較短，初次暴露後僅需要數小時發病。
③刺激性接觸性皮膚炎是否發生，與接觸物質的濃度和皮膚屏障的狀態有關；過敏性接觸性皮膚炎是否發生，則相對較不受接觸物質的量影響，通常極少量就足以導致發病。
④不需要任何刺激物，濕到乾的重複循環(wet-to-dry cycles)就可引起irritant contact dermatitis。
A. ①　　B. ②　　C. ③　　D. ④
item2:
Regarding the comparison between irritant contact dermatitis and allergic contact dermatitis, which of the following statements is incorrect?
① In the acute stage, irritant contact dermatitis can be limited to the exposed location with clear boundaries; allergic contact dermatitis lesions can spread out from the exposed location to the surroundings, often appearing as tiny papules, and can even spread to the whole body.
②The course of irritant contact dermatitis is longer, and it takes 12 to 72 hours to develop after the initial exposure; the course of allergic contact dermatitis is shorter, and it only takes a few hours to develop after the initial exposure.
③Whether irritant contact dermatitis occurs is related to the concentration of the contact substance and the state of the skin barrier; whether allergic contact dermatitis occurs is relatively unaffected by the amount of the contact substance. Usually a very small amount is enough to cause the disease.
④ Irritant contact dermatitis can be caused by repeated wet-to-dry cycles without any irritant.
A. ① B. ② C. ③ D. ④

item:
關於執行皮膚外科處置時局部或外用麻醉藥物，下列敘述何者正確？
①外用麻藥EMLA含有prilocaine的成份，使用在嬰幼兒或有皮膚屏障缺損的位置可能導致methemoglobinemia。
②若患者在注射局部麻藥時因疼痛緊張，出現臉色蒼白、血壓降低、心跳加速等符合典型迷走神經反應(vasovagal reaction)的表徵，可讓患者以頭低腳高的Trendelenburg斜躺姿勢來治療。
③Amide類的局部麻醉藥物如lidocaine等在肝功能不佳，或是正在服用propranolol藥物的患者需小心使用，因為會延長藥物的半衰期而導致毒性的風險增加。
④由於混有epinephrine的局部麻醉藥物pH值偏酸性，會引起注射時的疼痛不適，故可以加入碳酸氫鈉(sodium bicarbonate)溶液來中和酸性，以減少注射時的疼痛，並可減緩epinephrine保存時的degradation。
A. ①③　　B. ②④　　C. ①②③　　D. ④　　E. ①②③④
item2:
Which of the following statements is correct regarding the use of local or topical anesthetics when performing dermatologic procedures?
① The topical anesthetic EMLA contains prilocaine, and its use in infants or in areas with skin barrier defects may cause methemoglobinemia.
② If the patient experiences pain and tension when injecting local anesthesia and develops symptoms such as paleness, lowered blood pressure, accelerated heartbeat, etc. that are consistent with a typical vagus reaction (vasovagal reaction), the patient can be treated in a Trendelenburg reclined position with the head down and the feet up.
③Amide-type local anesthetics such as lidocaine should be used with caution in patients with poor liver function or who are taking propranolol drugs, because they will prolong the half-life of the drug and increase the risk of toxicity.
④ Since the pH value of local anesthetic drugs mixed with epinephrine is acidic, which will cause pain and discomfort during injection, sodium bicarbonate solution can be added to neutralize the acidity to reduce pain during injection and slow down the degradation of epinephrine during storage.
A. ①③ B. ②④ C. ①②③ D. ④ E. ①②③④

item:
關於皮膚腫瘤切除術後傷口重建方式，下列敘述何者錯誤？
①一般而言，隨機局部皮瓣(random local flap)的設計，皮瓣的長寬比在臉部不超過3:1，以確保皮瓣的存活率。
②V-to-Y flap，或稱為island pedicle flap，是屬於advancement flaps的一種。
③若是植皮處的血流供應較不佳，如在骨頭或軟骨上，使用全層皮膚植皮(full-thickness skin graft, FTSG)的存活率會比裂層皮膚植皮(split-thickness skin graft, STSG)來的好。
④相較於FTSG，STSG的優點是可早期偵測腫瘤復發，但缺點是術後較常出現傷口攣縮。
A. ①　　B. ②　　C. ③　　D. ④
item2:
Regarding wound reconstruction methods after skin tumor resection, which of the following statements is incorrect?
① Generally speaking, in the design of random local flap, the aspect ratio of the flap does not exceed 3:1 on the face to ensure the survival rate of the flap.
②V-to-Y flap, or island pedicle flap, is a type of advancement flaps.
③If the blood flow supply of the skin graft is poor, such as on bone or cartilage, the survival rate of using a full-thickness skin graft (FTSG) will be better than that of a split-thickness skin graft (STSG).
④ Compared with FTSG, the advantage of STSG is that it can detect tumor recurrence early, but the disadvantage is that wound contracture is more common after surgery.
A. ① B. ② C. ③ D. ④

item:
關於頭頸部皮膚外科手術時危險區(danger zones)，下列敘述何者錯誤？
①絕大多數重要的神經及動脈走在表淺肌肉筋膜層(SMAS, superficial musculoaponeurotic system)之下，因此手術時盡量保持在SMAS層的上方相對較安全。
②胸鎖乳突肌(sternocleidomastoid muscle)後緣中點大約是spinal accessory nerve進入頸後三角(posterior triangle of the neck)的地方，這個地方的神經缺乏肌肉層的保護較易受傷，會造成其支配的提肩胛肌(levator scapulae muscle)無力，導致同側無法聳肩及呈現翼狀肩胛(winging of the scapula)。
③咬肌(masseter)前下緣附近為marginal mandibular branch of facial nerve 跨過下頜骨(mandible bone)的地方，此處神經較易受傷，受傷後會導致其支配的降嘴角肌(depressor anguli oris muscle)、降下唇肌(depressor labii inferioris muscle)、頦肌(mentalis muscle)等無力，導致在笑的時候同側下唇無法往下用力，會比對側上揚。
④Temporal branch of the facial nerve在跨過顴骨弓(zygomatic arch)後穿過顳側時相對表淺，若傷到此神經可能會導致同側額頭紋路減少，合併同側眉毛及眼皮下垂。
A. ①　　B. ②　　C. ③　　D. ④
item2:
Regarding the danger zones in head and neck skin surgery, which of the following statements is incorrect?
①The vast majority of important nerves and arteries run under the superficial musculoaponeurotic system (SMAS), so it is relatively safe to stay above the SMAS layer during surgery.
②The midpoint of the posterior edge of the sternocleidomastoid muscle is approximately where the spinal accessory nerve enters the posterior triangle of the neck. The nerves here lack the protection of the muscle layer and are more susceptible to injury. This will cause the levator scapulae muscle (levator scapulae muscle) it controls to be weak, resulting in the inability to shrug and winging of the scapula on the same side.
③ Near the front and lower edge of the masseter is the marginal mandibular branch of facial nerve that crosses the mandible (mandible bone). The nerve here is more susceptible to injury. After injury, the depressor anguli oris muscle, depressor labii inferioris muscle, mentalis muscle, etc. that it controls will be weak, resulting in the inability to push down the lower lip on the same side when smiling. It will rise higher than the opposite side.
④The Temporal branch of the facial nerve is relatively superficial when it crosses the zygomatic arch and passes through the temporal side. Injury to this nerve may lead to the reduction of forehead lines on the same side and the drooping of the eyebrows and eyelids on the same side.
A. ① B. ② C. ③ D. ④

item:

④PCT之治療，可以考慮放血(phlebotomy)，治療目標是ferritin 15 to 20 ng/mL；或低劑量之hydroxychloroquine (100mg, twice weekly )，可以避免full dose之side effect。
A. ①　　B. ②　　C. ③　　D. ④
item2:
Which of the following statements is wrong?
①Porphyria cutanea tarda (PCT) is related to the inhibition of hepatic uroporphyrinogen decarboxylase activity.
②The main clinical manifestations of PCT and erythropoietic protoporphyria are blistering photosensitivity.
③Patients undergoing PCT should pay attention to whether there are other susceptibility factors, such as alcohol consumption, estrogen use, smoking, hepatitis C, and HIV.
④For the treatment of PCT, phlebotomy can be considered. The treatment target is ferritin 15 to 20 ng/mL; or low-dose hydroxychloroquine (100mg, twice weekly) to avoid the side effect of full dose.
A. ① B. ② C. ③ D. ④

item:

item:
關於藥物不良反應/副作用，下列敘述何者正確？
①Fluorouracil和bleomycin皆可能是造成flagellated pattern skin pigmentation的藥物。
②Immune checkpoint point inhibitors可能引起lichen planus-like eruptions、bullous pemphigoid、Stevens-Johnson syndrome/ toxic epidermal necrolysis(SJS/TEN)等的皮膚不良反應。
③Allopurinol是國人引起的嚴重藥物過敏反應(如SJS/TEN)的常見藥物之一，台灣的研究發現和HLA-B*5801有強烈相關。
④常見引發fixed drug eruption的藥物，包括sulfonamide和tetracycline類抗生素、非類固醇抗發炎藥（NSAID），但不包含acetaminophen。
A. ①③　　B. ②④　　C. ①②③　　D. ④　　E. ①②③④
item2:
Regarding adverse drug reactions/side effects, which of the following statements is correct?
① Both Fluorouracil and bleomycin may be drugs that cause flagellated pattern skin pigmentation.
②Immune checkpoint point inhibitors may cause skin adverse reactions such as lichen planus-like eruptions, bullous pemphigoid, Stevens-Johnson syndrome/toxic epidermal necrolysis (SJS/TEN).
③Allopurinol is one of the common drugs that causes severe drug allergic reactions (such as SJS/TEN) in Chinese people. Research in Taiwan has found that it is strongly related to HLA-B*5801.
④ Common drugs that cause fixed drug eruption include sulfonamide and tetracycline antibiotics, and nonsteroidal anti-inflammatory drugs (NSAIDs), but do not include acetaminophen.
A. ①③ B. ②④ C. ①②③ D. ④ E. ①②③④

item:
關於下列有環形病灶皮膚表現之疾病，下列敘述何者正確？
①Infection在erythema multiforme、erythema annular centrifugum、erythema migrans、erythema gyratum repens和erythema marginatum皆有極高關聯性。
②Erythema marginatum 在90%以上的acute rheumatic fever病人可看到，且為診斷acute rheumatic fever的American Heart Association criteria之一。
③Lip involvement在erythema multiforme minus也可以看到。
④Rowell syndrome為呈現target-like lesion的一種lupus erythematosus (LE)，但和一般LE不同，其ANA通常為negative。
A. ①　　B. ②　　C. ③　　D. ④
item2:
Regarding the following diseases with cutaneous manifestations of ring-shaped lesions, which of the following statements is correct?
①Infection has extremely high correlation in erythema multiforme, erythema annular centrifugum, erythema migrans, erythema gyratum repens and erythema marginatum.
②Erythema marginatum can be seen in more than 90% of patients with acute rheumatic fever, and is one of the American Heart Association criteria for diagnosing acute rheumatic fever.
③Lip involvement can also be seen in erythema multiforme minus.
④Rowell syndrome is a type of lupus erythematosus (LE) that presents target-like lesions, but unlike general LE, its ANA is usually negative.

item:
關於scleroderma及systemic sclerosis，下列敘述何者正確？
①Scleroderma的病人，要注意有無環境因子，如vinyl chloride，epoxy resins，docetaxel。
②Systemic sclerosis病人，目前較有證據的治療是MTX，以及mycophenolate mofetil (MMF)，rituximab也可以使用在二線治療。
③Systemic sclerosis的病人，問診上要注意有無dysphagia及dyspnea。
④Morphea的光線治療，目前比較有證據的是UVA-1 and broad band UVB。
A. ①③　　B. ②④　　C. ①②③　　D. ④　　E. ①②③④
item2:
Regarding scleroderma and systemic sclerosis, which of the following statements is correct?
①Patients with Scleroderma should pay attention to the presence of environmental factors, such as vinyl chloride, epoxy resins, and docetaxel.
②For patients with Systemic sclerosis, the currently more evidence-based treatments are MTX and mycophenolate mofetil (MMF), and rituximab can also be used as second-line treatment.
③Patients with Systemic sclerosis should pay attention to the presence of dysphagia and dyspnea during consultation.
④Morphea’s light treatment, currently the ones with more evidence are UVA-1 and broad band UVB.

item:
關於自體免疫水疱病，下列敘述何者正確？
①Dermatitis herpetiformis大多很癢，以dapsone治療很快就會見效，可當成therapeutic diagnosis。
②Paraneoplastic pemphigus常有口腔潰瘍，且大多有anti-desmogleins抗體，同時要注意有無Castleman disease或lymphoma。
③可能導致bullous pemphigoid的藥物，包括furosemide, penicillin, ACE inhibitor等。
④Epidermolysis bullosa acquisita (EBA)，一般是發炎的水泡，在肢端為多，經常有scar及milium formation，salt-split skin DIF是在dermal floor的部份會有IgG deposition。
A. ①③　　B. ②④　　C. ①②③　　D. ④　　E. ①②③④
item2:
Regarding autoimmune blistering disease, which of the following statements is correct?
① Dermatitis herpetiformis is often very itchy, and treatment with dapsone will be effective soon, and can be regarded as a therapeutic diagnosis.
②Paraneoplastic pemphigus often have oral ulcers, and most of them have anti-desmogleins antibodies. At the same time, pay attention to whether there is Castleman disease or lymphoma.
③Drugs that may cause bullous pemphigoid, including furosemide, penicillin, ACE inhibitor, etc.
④Epidermolysis bullosa acquisita (EBA) is usually an inflamed blister, most often on the extremities, often with scar and milium formation. Salt-split skin DIF has IgG deposition on the dermal floor.
A. ①③ B. ②④ C. ①②③ D. ④ E. ①②③④

item:
關於hidradenitis suppurativa，下列敘述何者正確？
①Squamous cell carcinoma是hidradenitis suppurativa長期慢性發炎的少見併發症。
②Hidradenitis suppurativa的病因是源自於apocrine gland的發炎。
③抽菸和較低的body mass index都是hidradenitis suppurativa的危險因子。
④Hidradenitis suppurativa可以分成三個亞型："axillary–mammary"亞型、"follicular"亞型、及"inguinal"亞型。其中"axillary–mammary" 亞型的特徵是常伴隨epidermoid cysts、acne等病灶。
A. ①　　B. ②　　C. ③　　D. ④
item2:
Regarding hidradenitis suppurativa, which of the following statements is correct?
①Squamous cell carcinoma is a rare complication of long-term chronic inflammation of hidradenitis suppurativa.
②The cause of Hidradenitis suppurativa is inflammation of the apocrine gland.
③Smoking and lower body mass index are both risk factors for hidradenitis suppurativa.
④Hidradenitis suppurativa can be divided into three subtypes: "axillary–mammary" subtype, "follicular" subtype, and "inguinal" subtype. Among them, the "axillary–mammary" subtype is characterized by being often accompanied by epidermoid cysts, ACNE and other lesions.
A. ① B. ② C. ③ D. ④

item:
關於扁平苔癬(lichen planus)及其variant，下列敘述何者正確？
①臨床常見為對稱性病灶分佈在手腕屈側及手臂，比較少會出現在臉和手掌。
②Generalized lichen planus的病程通常比nongeneralized lichen planus來得久，也比較容易復發。
③Lichen planus的癢感與病灶範圍大小呈正比，但hypertrophic lichen planus除外。
④硬化性苔癬(lichen sclerosus)的病人有較高的機會合併oral lichen planus。

item2:

②The course of generalized lichen planus is usually longer than that of nongeneralized lichen planus, and it is easier to relapse.
③The itching sensation of Lichen planus is directly proportional to the size of the lesion, except for hypertrophic Lichen planus.
④Patients with lichen sclerosus have a higher chance of having oral lichen planus.
A. ①③ B. ②④ C. ①②③ D. ④ E. ①②③④

item:
關於radiotherapy引發之皮膚疾病，下列敘述何者錯誤？

②Radiation recall reaction屬於一種由systemic agents引起之hypersensitivity reaction，再次使用相同藥物不一定會導致復發。
③毛髮幹細胞屬於relatively high radio-sensitive cells，因此臨床上可能出現嚴重落髮之副作用。
④Radiation dermatitis僅出現在皮膚皺摺處屬於CTCAE Grade 4。
A. ①③　　B. ②④　　C. ①②③　　D. ④　　E. ①②③④
item2:
Regarding skin diseases caused by radiotherapy, which of the following statements is incorrect?
① Radiation dermatitis can be divided into five grades according to the Common Terminology Criteria for Adverse Events (CTCAE): Grade 5, the most serious, and Grade 1, the lightest.
②Radiation recall reaction is a hypersensitivity reaction caused by systemic agents. Using the same drug again will not necessarily lead to relapse.
③Hair stem cells are relatively high radio-sensitive cells, so clinical side effects of severe hair loss may occur.
④Radiation dermatitis only appears in skin folds and is CTCAE Grade 4.
A. ①③ B. ②④ C. ①②③ D. ④ E. ①②③④

item:
關於lupus erythematosus (LE)，下列敘述何者正確？
①LE的手部皮膚紅疹與dermatomyositis的紅疹比較，一般比較不影響knuckles。而dermatomyositis的手部紅疹Gottron papules較易在knuckles，比較會癢。
②Chilblain LE 較容易有anti-La抗體且與雷諾氏現象較為相關。
③Discoid LE 病理下比起lichen planus發炎浸潤更深，有perivascular and periadnexal infiltration。
④Bullous LE一般是以eosinophil為主的infiltrate在papillary dermis。

item2:

②Chilblain LE is more likely to have anti-La antibodies and is more related to Raynaud's phenomenon.
③Discoid LE pathologically has deeper inflammation and infiltration than Lichen planus, with perivascular and periadnexal infiltration.
④Bullous LE is usually eosinophil-based infiltrate in papillary dermis.

item:
關於radiotherapy，下列敘述何者正確？

②Radiation recall reaction可出現在任何器官，而gatifloxacin、isoniazid、levofloxacin、simvastatin等藥物皆可能造成radiation recall reactions。
③Radiotherapy可用於治療良性病兆，如keloids/hypertrophic scars，也可治療惡性腫瘤，如squamous carcinoma、basal cell carcinoma、及melanoma等。
④Radiotherapy造成secondary malignancy不少見，且大多在治療後三至五年內發生。

item2:
Regarding radiotherapy, which of the following statements is correct?
①Among the skin changes caused by Radiotherapy, acute effects include inflammation and peeling, while late effects include fibrosis and atrophy of skin appendages.
②Radiation recall reactions can occur in any organ, and drugs such as gatifloxacin, isoniazid, levofloxacin, and simvastatin may cause radiation recall reactions.
③Radiotherapy can be used to treat benign conditions, such as keloids/hypertrophic scars, and malignant tumors, such as squamous carcinoma, basal cell carcinoma, and melanoma, etc.
④ Secondary malignancy caused by Radiotherapy is not uncommon, and most occur within three to five years after treatment.

item:
關於皮膚外科手術傷口的處理，下列敘述何者正確？

③傳統Z形成術（Classical Z-plasty with 60° angles）可以改變疤痕的走向，並延長75%的傷口長度，以改善功能和外觀。

item2:

②Secondary healing (secondary intension) The contracture of surrounding normal skin can reduce the defect by 50-70%, and the remaining defect is filled with scar tissue.
③ Classical Z-plasty with 60° angles can change the direction of the scar and extend the wound length by 75% to improve function and appearance.
④ Full-thickness skin grafting needs to retain part of the subcutaneous fat to help blood supply.

③在A型肉毒桿菌素中，不同廠牌的肉毒桿菌素的單位效價不同。

item:
關於Bowen disease及Bowenoid papulosis之鑑別診斷，下列敘述何者錯誤？
①Digital/Periungual Bowen disease和HPV5感染較為相關；Bowenoid papulosis與HPV16,18,33感染較為相關。
②Bowen disease主要好發60歲以上老人；Bowenoid papulosis好發於年輕人及中年人。
③病理下Bowen disease不會侵犯basement membrane但有可能侵犯皮內之部分附屬構造；病理下Bowenoid papulosis的特徵為cellular atypia, disordered maturation, mitotic figures。
④長在生殖器附近的Bowen disease，合併cervical or anal cancer的機率較高；Bowenoid papulosis會提高cervical or vulvar SCC的機會。

item2:
Regarding the differential diagnosis of Bowen disease and Bowenoid papulosis, which of the following statements is incorrect?
①Digital/Periungual Bowen disease is more related to HPV5 infection; Bowenoid papulosis is more related to HPV16, 18, and 33 infection.
②Bowen disease mainly affects people over 60 years old; Bowenoid papulosis mainly affects young people and middle-aged people.
③ Pathologically, Bowen disease will not invade the basement membrane but may invade some accessory structures in the skin; pathologically, Bowenoid papulosis is characterized by cellular atypia, disordered maturation, and mitotic figures.
④ Bowen disease that grows near the genitals has a higher chance of being combined with cervical or anal cancer; Bowenoid papulosis will increase the chance of cervical or vulvar SCC.
A. ① B. ② C. ③ D. ④

item:
關於Epidermodysplasia verruciformis（EV），下列敘述何者正確？
①帶有EVER1, EVER2突變的細胞較容易感染beta-HPV，例如HPV-5和HPV-8。
②EV-plane warts常見的部位為頭頸部。
③Late-onset EV可能和細胞免疫缺損相關，如HIV或器官移植患者。
④大部分的患者在青春期時會從EV病灶長出皮膚癌，尤其是陽光曝曬的部位或肢端。
A. ①③　　B. ②④　　C. ①②③　　D. ④　　E. ①②③④
item2:
Regarding Epidermodysplasia verruciformis (EV), which of the following statements is correct?
① Cells with EVER1 and EVER2 mutations are more susceptible to beta-HPV infection, such as HPV-5 and HPV-8.
②The common site of EV-plane warts is the head and neck.
③Late-onset EV may be related to cellular immune deficiency, such as HIV or organ transplant patients.
④Most patients will develop skin cancer from EV lesions during adolescence, especially in sun-exposed areas or extremities.
A. ①③ B. ②④ C. ①②③ D. ④ E. ①②③④

item:
在診斷雷諾現象（Raynaud Phenomenon）時，哪一項檢查對預測其轉變為系統性硬化症（Systemic Sclerosis, SSc）最具預測性？
①全血計數。
②抗核抗體測試。
③甲床微血管鏡檢查。

item2:
When diagnosing Raynaud Phenomenon, which test is most predictive of its progression to systemic sclerosis (SSc)?
① Complete blood count.
②Antinuclear antibody test.
③Nail bed microvasculoscopy.
④Fingertip temperature measurement.

item:
關於色素性癢疹（prurigo pigmentosa，以下簡稱PP），下列敘述何者正確？
①PP的特徵是伴隨搔癢的對稱性紅斑點和丘疹，後期表現為網狀色素沉著。
②PP在20多歲的年輕女性最為常見。
③建議使用Minocycline或doxycycline或dapsone進行治療。
④PP與confluent reticulated papulomatosis（CRP）的差異在於CRP沒有前驅紅疹（preceding erythematous papules）。
A. ①③　　B. ②④　　C. ①②③　　D. ④　　E. ①②③④
item2:
Regarding prurigo pigmentosa (hereinafter referred to as PP), which of the following statements is correct?
①PP is characterized by symmetrical erythema and papules accompanied by itching, and later manifests as reticular pigmentation.
②PP is most common among young women in their 20s.
③It is recommended to use Minocycline or doxycycline or dapsone for treatment.
④The difference between PP and confluent reticulated papulomatosis (CRP) is that CRP does not have preceding erythematous papules.
A. ①③ B. ②④ C. ①②③ D. ④ E. ①②③④

item:
關於脂肪皮膚硬化症（lipodermatosclerosis），下列敘述何者正確？
①臨床特徵為下肢皮膚色素增加、疼痛、硬化合併傷口。
②大部分的病人體重都超出標準體重。
③假定被診斷為雙下肢蜂窩性組織炎，脂肪皮膚硬化症要列入鑑別診斷。
④pentoxifylline並不是適當的治療藥物。
A. ①③　　B. ②④　　C. ①②③　　D. ④　　E. ①②③④
item2:
Regarding lipodermatosclerosis, which of the following statements is correct?
①Clinical features include increased skin pigmentation, pain, hardening and wounds on the skin of the lower limbs.
②Most patients are overweight.
③ Assuming that cellulitis of both lower limbs is diagnosed, lipodermatosclerosis should be included in the differential diagnosis.
④Pentoxifylline is not an appropriate treatment drug.
A. ①③ B. ②④ C. ①②③ D. ④ E. ①②③④

item:
關於藥物所造成水疱病，以下敘述何者錯誤？
①癌症免疫療法藥物immune checkpoint inhibitor with anti–programmed cell death receptor 1（anti–PD-1），腫瘤壞死因子阻斷劑etanercept和利尿劑furosemide皆可能誘發bullous pemphigoid。
②攝入碘化物可能會加重或引發dermatitis herpetiformis的症狀，在以前可當作一種診斷的方式。
③在藥物引發的linear IgA bullous dermatosis中，vancomycin是最常見的誘發藥物。
④在藥物引發的pemphigus中，penicillin與captopril是最常見的誘發藥物。
A. ①③　　B. ②④　　C. ①②③　　D. ④　　E. ①②③④
item2:
Regarding blisters caused by drugs, which of the following statements is incorrect?
①Cancer immunotherapy drugs immune checkpoint inhibitor with anti-programmed cell death receptor 1 (anti-PD-1), tumor necrosis factor blocker etanercept and diuretic furosemide may induce bullous pemphigoid.
② Ingestion of iodide may aggravate or trigger the symptoms of dermatitis herpetiformis, which was used as a diagnostic method in the past.
③In drug-induced linear IgA bullous dermatosis, vancomycin is the most common inducing drug.
④ Among drug-induced pemphigus, penicillin and captopril are the most common inducing drugs.
A. ①③ B. ②④ C. ①②③ D. ④ E. ①②③④

item:
關於皮膚治療的描述，下列敘述何者錯誤？
①Deoxycholate是一種FDA認證可以做為chemical adipocytolysis使用的清潔劑（detergent）。
②當患者對刺青顏料產生過敏反應時，應優先考慮使用Q-switched雷射治療。
③非侵入式緊膚儀器產生緊實效果的機轉包括脂肪纖維縱隔收縮與SMAS筋膜層（superficial muscular aponeurotic system）收縮、膠原蛋白增生。
④如果使用酒精類消毒劑，手術區域在施行electrocautery手術前應晾乾至少90秒。
A. ①　　B. ②　　C. ③　　D. ④
item2:
Regarding the description of skin treatment, which of the following statements is incorrect?
①Deoxycholate is an FDA-certified detergent that can be used for chemical adipocytolysis.
②When patients have allergic reactions to tattoo pigments, Q-switched laser treatment should be given priority.
③The mechanism by which non-invasive skin tightening equipment produces a firming effect includes mediastinal contraction of fat fibers, contraction of the SMAS fascia layer (superficial muscular aponeurotic system), and collagen hyperplasia.
④If alcohol-based disinfectants are used, the surgical area should be allowed to dry for at least 90 seconds before performing electrocautery surgery.
A. ① B. ② C. ③ D. ④

item:
關於皮膚外科手術的描述，下列敘述何者錯誤？
①指甲手術時使用distal digital block麻醉，疼痛度較proximal digital block高，但是作用快速，適合用在全指甲拔除術。
②施行完靜脈內雷射手術之後，需要注射稀釋的lidocaine（腫脹液tumescent）在大隱靜脈周圍，來止痛與減少深部靜脈栓塞。
③指甲手術使用proximal digital block時，可以注射6毫升的局部麻醉藥，形成止血帶效應（tourniquet effect），來防止血流過多，影響手術視野。
④手術時，裝心臟節律器或植入式去顫器的病人應使用electrocautery方式止血。
A. ①③　　B. ②④　　C. ①②③　　D. ④　　E. ①②③④
item2:
Regarding the description of skin surgery, which of the following statements is incorrect?
① Distal digital block is used for anesthesia during nail surgery. The pain is higher than that of proximal digital block, but it works quickly and is suitable for total nail removal.
②After intravenous laser surgery, dilute lidocaine (tumescent fluid) needs to be injected around the great saphenous vein to relieve pain and reduce deep vein thrombosis.
③When proximal digital block is used for nail surgery, 6 ml of local anesthetic can be injected to form a tourniquet effect to prevent excessive blood flow and affect the surgical field of view.
④During surgery, patients with cardiac pacemakers or implantable defibrillators should use electrocautery to stop bleeding.
A. ①③ B. ②④ C. ①②③ D. ④ E. ①②③④

item:
關於皮膚外科手術的描述，下列敘述何者正確？
①FTSG（Full-thickness skin grafts）呈現黑色時，代表植皮已壞死，需要給予清創治療，才能加速癒合避免攣縮。
②STSG（Split-thickness skin grafts）使用meshing的好處包括減少血腫、增加存活率、減少攣縮。
③FTSG的傷口外觀與功能都比STSG好，適合使用在軟骨與肌腱上。
④相較於FTSG，STSG的優點是可以早期偵測腫瘤復發。
A. ①③　　B. ②④　　C. ①②③　　D. ④　　E. ①②③④
item2:
Regarding the description of skin surgery, which of the following statements is correct?
①When FTSG (Full-thickness skin grafts) appear black, it means that the skin graft has become necrotic and requires debridement treatment to accelerate healing and avoid contracture.
②The benefits of using mesh with STSG (Split-thickness skin grafts) include reducing hematoma, increasing survival rate, and reducing contracture.
③FTSG has better wound appearance and function than STSG, and is suitable for use on cartilage and tendons.
④ Compared with FTSG, the advantage of STSG is that it can detect tumor recurrence early.
A. ①③ B. ②④ C. ①②③ D. ④ E. ①②③④

item:
下列敘述何者錯誤？
①Povidone-Iodine塗抹後需要幾分鐘才能有殺菌作用，而且接觸血液會降低Povidone-Iodine的殺菌作用。
②Povidone-Iodine能使碘游離出來，破壞病原體細胞膜，產生殺菌作用。
③Chlorhexidine塗抹後幾乎立即有殺菌作用，而且殺菌效果可以持續幾個小時。
④Chlorhexidine有廣效的殺菌力，對格蘭氏陽性菌、格蘭氏陰性菌、病毒、黴菌與分枝桿菌均具殺菌作用。
A. ①③　　B. ②④　　C. ①②③　　D. ④　　E. ①②③④
item2:
Which of the following statements is wrong?
① It takes several minutes for Povidone-Iodine to have a bactericidal effect after application, and contact with blood will reduce the bactericidal effect of Povidone-Iodine.
② Povidone-Iodine can free iodine, destroy pathogen cell membranes, and produce bactericidal effects.
③Chlorhexidine has a bactericidal effect almost immediately after application, and the bactericidal effect can last for several hours.
④Chlorhexidine has a broad bactericidal effect on Gram-positive bacteria, Gram-negative bacteria, viruses, molds and mycobacteria.
A. ①③ B. ②④ C. ①②③ D. ④ E. ①②③④

item:
關於autoinflammatory disorders，下列敘述何者正確？
①Schnitzler syndrome的病人常合併有IgG gammopathy，也可能有lymphoproliferative disorder。
②Schnitzler syndrome的病人常出現發燒，關節痛，骨頭痛，淋巴結及肝脾腫大。

④TNF-α抑制劑是治療CAPS最有效的生物製劑。

item2:
Regarding autoinflammatory disorders, which of the following statements is correct?
①Patients with Schnitzler syndrome often have IgG gammopathy and may also have lymphoproliferative disorder.
②Patients with Schnitzler syndrome often experience fever, joint pain, bone headache, and enlarged lymph nodes and hepatosplenomegaly.
③Cryopyrin associated periodic syndrome (CAPS) will have symptoms of urticaria and responds well to antihistamines.
④TNF-α inhibitors are the most effective biological agents for treating CAPS.
A. ① B. ② C. ③ D. ④

item:
關於乾癬患者指甲變化，下列敘述何者正確？
①Psoriatic arthritis之患者nail involvement比例比單純psoriasis vulgaris者更高。
②Nail pitting最為常見。
③Oil spots最具有特異性。
④Splinter hemorrhage的成因類似皮膚上的Auspitz sign。

item2:
Regarding the nail changes in patients with psoriasis, which of the following statements is correct?
①Patients with Psoriatic arthritis have a higher proportion of nail involvement than those with simple psoriasis vulgaris.
②Nail pitting is the most common.
③Oil spots are the most specific.
④The cause of Splinter hemorrhage is similar to the Auspitz sign on the skin.
A. ①③ B. ②④ C. ①②③ D. ④ E. ①②③④

item:
關於sarcoidosis，下列敘述何者錯誤？
①Erythema nodosum是sarcoidosis最常見的非特異性皮膚表現，有可能伴隨全身性症狀如發燒或關節痛。

③Lupus pernio常出現在臉部及手指，有較高比例會出現全身性侵犯及合併呼吸道疾病。
④Antimalarial drugs可以用來治療皮膚或關節的sarcoidosis，TNF抑制劑也能用於治療sarcoidosis。

item2:
Regarding sarcoidosis, which of the following statements is incorrect?
①Erythema nodosum is the most common non-specific skin manifestation of sarcoidosis and may be accompanied by systemic symptoms such as fever or joint pain.
②If the patient has eye invasion, conjunctivitis is the most common.
③Lupus pernio often appears on the face and fingers, and has a higher rate of systemic invasion and respiratory disease.
④Antimalarial drugs can be used to treat sarcoidosis of the skin or joints, and TNF inhibitors can also be used to treat sarcoidosis.
A. ① B. ② C. ③ D. ④

item:
下列敘述何者正確？
①外用的Ruxolitinib是一種用於治療白斑的JAK1/2抑制劑。

③分節性白斑（segmental vitiligo）較早影響毛囊的黑色素細胞所以治療效果不佳。
④Interferon-α是造成白斑疾病的主要致病機轉。
A. ①③　　B. ②④　　C. ①②③　　D. ④　　E. ①②③④
item2:
Which of the following statements is correct?
①Topical Ruxolitinib is a JAK1/2 inhibitor used to treat vitiligo.
②JAK inhibitors mainly work by promoting the migration of melanocytes.
③ Segmental vitiligo affects the melanocytes of hair follicles earlier, so the treatment effect is not good.
④Interferon-α is the main pathogenic mechanism causing vitiligo disease.
A. ①③ B. ②④ C. ①②③ D. ④ E. ①②③④

item:
關於UVA及UVB photobiology的比較，下列敘述何者正確？
①最有效率促進合成皮膚vitamin D合成的光波長落在UVA的範圍內。
② UVA與immediate pigment darkening（20分鐘內）較相關; 而UVB與delayed melanogenesis較相關。
③UVA的致紅性（erythemogenic）大約超過UVB 1000倍。
④與drug-induced photosensitivity較相關的是UVA。
A. ①③　　B. ②④　　C. ①②③　　D. ④　　E. ①②③④
item2:
Regarding the comparison of UVA and UVB photobiology, which of the following statements is correct?
①The wavelength of light that most efficiently promotes the synthesis of vitamin D in synthetic skin falls within the UVA range.
② UVA is more related to immediate pigment darkening (within 20 minutes); while UVB is more related to delayed melanogenesis.
③ UVA is approximately 1,000 times more erythemogenic than UVB.
④ UVA is more related to drug-induced photosensitivity.
A. ①③ B. ②④ C. ①②③ D. ④ E. ①②③④

item:
色素失調症（Incontinentia Pigmenti）的皮膚病變通常經歷哪幾個階段？依照嬰幼兒到成人的順序由左至右排列。
①水疱期（vesiculobullous stage）、疣狀期（verrucous stage）、色素沉著期（hyperpigmentation stage）、萎縮疤痕期（atrophic scar stage）。
②疣狀期、水疱期、萎縮疤痕期、色素沉著期。
③色素沉著期、水疱期、疣狀期、萎縮疤痕期。
④水疱期、色素沉著期、疣狀期、萎縮疤痕期。
A. ①　　B. ②　　C. ③　　D. ④
item2:
What stages do skin lesions of Incontinentia Pigmenti usually go through? They are arranged from left to right in order from infant to adult.
①Vesiculobullous stage, verrucous stage, hyperpigmentation stage, atrophic scar stage.
② Wartlike stage, blister stage, atrophic scar stage, and pigmentation stage.
③Pigmentation stage, blister stage, verrucous stage, and atrophic scar stage.
④Blister stage, pigmentation stage, verrucous stage, and atrophic scar stage.
A. ① B. ② C. ③ D. ④

item:
一位年輕男性於兩週前去台灣東部露營，兩天前出現高燒、寒顫、肌肉酸痛等症狀，理學檢查發現右大腿內側有一黑色焦痂（eschar），關於進一步的檢查和處置，下列敘述何者正確？
①須考慮恙蟲病（Scrub typhus），為由恙蟲傳播的人畜共患病，致病原為Orientia tsutsugamushi，動物宿主以囓齒類為主。
②建議之治療為使用14天的doxycycline，目前尚無有效的疫苗。
③間接免疫螢光染色法（Indirect Fluorescent Antibody; IFA）為目前最常被使用診斷恙蟲病的方式，相隔二週以上的檢驗，其恙蟲病特異性抗體達4倍以上的上升即可診斷。
④高燒後約4至5天可能會出現紅色丘疹，由四肢向軀幹擴散。
A. ①③　　B. ②④　　C. ①②③　　D. ④　　E. ①②③④
item2:
A young man went camping in eastern Taiwan two weeks ago. Two days ago he developed symptoms such as high fever, chills, and muscle aches. A physical examination revealed a black eschar on the inner side of his right thigh. Regarding further examination and treatment, which of the following statements is correct?
① Scrub typhus must be considered. It is a zoonotic disease transmitted by Scrub typhus. The causative agent is Orientia tsutsugamushi, and the animal host is mainly rodents.
②The recommended treatment is to use doxycycline for 14 days. There is currently no effective vaccine.
③Indirect immunofluorescence staining (Indirect Fluorescent Antibody; IFA) is currently the most commonly used method for diagnosing scrub typhus. The diagnosis can be made if the scrub typhus-specific antibody rises more than 4 times in tests conducted more than two weeks apart.
④Red papules may appear about 4 to 5 days after a high fever, spreading from the limbs to the trunk.
A. ①③ B. ②④ C. ①②③ D. ④ E. ①②③④

item:
關於eosinophilic pustular folliculitis（EPF），下列敘述何者正確？
①和HIV相關的EPF常出現在頭頸部，上半身及四肢的遠端。
②嬰兒型EPF常出現在頭皮，血液中IgE常明顯升高。

item2:
Regarding eosinophilic pustular folliculitis (EPF), which of the following statements is correct?
① HIV-related EPF often occurs in the head and neck, upper body and distal limbs.
② Infantile EPF often appears on the scalp, and IgE in the blood is often significantly elevated.

④The concentration of TARC in blood is related to eosinophilia.
A. ① B. ② C. ③ D. ④

item:
關於subcorneal pustular dermatosis，下列敘述何者錯誤？
①皮膚經常表現在腋下、胯下及四肢屈側，也常出現在頭皮及黏膜。
