③第一線治療藥物為dapsone, sulfonamide。
④可能和pyoderma gangrenosum, ulcerative colitis, Crohn disease相關。
A. ①③　　B. ②④　　C. ①②③　　D. ④　　E. ①②③④
item2:
Regarding subcorneal pustular dermatosis, which of the following statements is incorrect?
①The skin often appears under the armpits, crotch and flexors of the limbs, and also often appears on the scalp and mucous membranes.
② Some patients have increased blood IgG, which may be combined with IgG monoclonal gammopathy.
③The first-line treatment drugs are dapsone and sulfonamide.
④May be related to pyoderma gangrenosum, ulcerative colitis, and Crohn disease.
A. ①③ B. ②④ C. ①②③ D. ④ E. ①②③④

item:
關於pyoderma gangrenosum，下列敘述何者錯誤？
①接受Granulocyte colony-stimulating factor（G-CSF）治療的病人，有可能會出現pyoderma gangrenosum。
②Pyoderma gangrenosum的發生可能與JAK的突變有關。
③可能和inflammatory bowel disease以及paraproteinemia，主要和IgG monoclonal gammopathy相關。
④TNF-α, IL-6在pyoderma gangrenosum的病人表現可能會上升。
A. ①　　B. ②　　C. ③　　D. ④
item2:
Regarding pyoderma gangrenosum, which of the following statements is incorrect?
①Patients receiving Granulocyte colony-stimulating factor (G-CSF) treatment may develop pyoderma gangrenosum.
②The occurrence of Pyoderma gangrenosum may be related to the mutation of JAK.
③May be related to inflammatory bowel disease and paraproteinemia, mainly related to IgG monoclonal gammopathy.
④TNF-α and IL-6 may increase in patients with pyoderma gangrenosum.
A. ① B. ② C. ③ D. ④

item:
關於chancroid，下列敘述何者錯誤？
①潛伏期為三至七週，很少超過十週。
②半數病人在發病數日至兩週後會發生淋巴腺炎。
③未經抗生素治療，90%的病人無法自然痊癒，且可能會有併發症。
④治癒後並無永久免疫性，所以接觸到病菌還是有可能被感染。
A. ①③　　B. ②④　　C. ①②③　　D. ④　　E. ①②③④
item2:
Regarding chaancroid, which of the following statements is incorrect?
①The incubation period is three to seven weeks, rarely exceeding ten weeks.
②Half of the patients will develop lymphadenitis a few days to two weeks after the onset of the disease.
③ Without antibiotic treatment, 90% of patients cannot recover naturally and may have complications.
④ There is no permanent immunity after recovery, so you may still be infected if you come into contact with germs.
A. ①③ B. ②④ C. ①②③ D. ④ E. ①②③④

item:
關於與人類最親近的陸生動物—貓狗對人類的抓傷和咬傷，下列敘述何者正確？
①與貓咬傷（cat bites）相比，狗的咬傷（dog bites）更常見且更容易造成傷口細菌感染。
②若傷口為貓咬傷所致，Bartonella henselae是主要的致病菌，常見於家畜的上呼吸道中。
③若考慮貓抓病（cat-scratch disease）的可能性，最常見的病原體為Pasteurella multocida，屬革蘭氏陰性菌，臨床常合併淋巴結腫大。
④若被貓或狗咬傷，應給予患者經驗性抗生素amoxicillin/clavulanic acid 7至10天，少數患者可能引發嚴重的系統性感染如中樞神經感染、菌血症。
A. ①　　B. ②　　C. ③　　D. ④
item2:
Regarding the scratches and bites caused by cats and dogs, the closest land animals to humans, which of the following statements is correct?
①Compared with cat bites, dog bites are more common and more likely to cause bacterial wound infection.
②If the wound is caused by a cat bite, Bartonella henselae is the main pathogenic bacteria and is commonly found in the upper respiratory tract of livestock.
③If the possibility of cat-scratch disease is considered, the most common pathogen is Pasteurella multocida, which is a Gram-negative bacterium and is often associated with swollen lymph nodes clinically.
④If bitten by a cat or dog, the patient should be given empiric antibiotics amoxicillin/clavulanic acid for 7 to 10 days. A small number of patients may develop serious systemic infections such as central nervous system infection and bacteremia.
A. ① B. ② C. ③ D. ④

item:
關於脂漏性皮膚炎（seborrheic dermatitis, SD），下列敘述何者錯誤？
①Infantile SD（ISD）易侵犯diaper or flexural areas，多在六個月至一歲內自行緩解。
②Parkinson disease及AIDS患者之SD更常見也較嚴重。
③高濕度及高溫環境因有助Malassezia生長，可使病情惡化。
④原本診斷為ISD之患者，若頭皮病灶呈現purpuric, scaly, crusted papules，skin folds及mucosa出現潰瘍，則應排除Langerhans cell histiocytosis。
A. ①　　B. ②　　C. ③　　D. ④
item2:
Regarding seborrheic dermatitis (SD), which of the following statements is incorrect?
①Infantile SD (ISD) is easy to invade diaper or flexural areas, and usually resolves on its own within six months to one year old.
②SD is more common and severe in patients with Parkinson disease and AIDS.
③High humidity and high temperature environment help the growth of Malassezia and can worsen the condition.
④In patients originally diagnosed with ISD, if the scalp lesions present purpuric, scaly, crusted papules, skin folds and mucosa ulcers, Langerhans cell histiocytosis should be excluded.
A. ① B. ② C. ③ D. ④

item:
關於異位性皮膚炎（atopic dermatitis）患者之病毒感染，下列敘述何者錯誤？
①比一般人更容易感染尋常疣（common wart）。
②Eczema herpeticum可從若干群聚小水疱擴散至全身，嚴重時可致命。
③感染到傳染性軟疣（molluscum contagiosum）時其臨床表現較一般人更嚴重。
④Eczema coxsackium則是以類似手足口病（hand, foot and mouth disease）之水疱或丘疹開始，進而侵犯原本濕疹之部位，嚴重時亦可致命。
A. ①　　B. ②　　C. ③　　D. ④
item2:
Regarding viral infection in patients with atopic dermatitis, which of the following statements is incorrect?
① More susceptible to common warts than the average person.
②Eczema herpeticum can spread from several clusters of small blisters to the whole body, and can be fatal in severe cases.
③When infected with molluscum contagiosum, the clinical manifestations are more severe than those of ordinary people.
④Eczema coxsackium starts with blisters or papules similar to hand, foot and mouth disease, and then invades the original eczema area, and can be fatal in severe cases.
A. ① B. ② C. ③ D. ④

item:
關於苔蘚樣糠疹（pityriasis lichenoides），下列敘述何者錯誤？
①Pityriasis lichenoides chronica病程緩慢，比pityriasis lichenoides et varioliformis acuta （PLEVA）更易留下疤痕。
②Febrile ulceronecrotic Mucha–Habermann disease（FUMHD）最為嚴重，可出現關節、腸胃及中樞神經症狀，甚至致死。
③治療可使用topical corticosteroids、口服erythromycin、tetracycline類抗生素及phototherapy。
④嚴重的PLEVA和FUMHD常須使用systemic corticosteroids才得以控制。
A. ①　　B. ②　　C. ③　　D. ④
item2:
Regarding pityriasis lichenoides, which of the following statements is incorrect?
①Pityriasis lichenoides chronica has a slow course and is more likely to leave scars than pityriasis lichenoides et varioliformis acuta (PLEVA).
②Febrile ulceronecrotic Mucha–Habermann disease (FUMHD) is the most serious, and can cause joint, gastrointestinal and central nervous system symptoms, and even lead to death.
③Treatment can use topical corticosteroids, oral erythromycin, tetracycline antibiotics and phototherapy.
④Severe PLEVA and FUMHD often require the use of systemic corticosteroids to control them.
A. ① B. ② C. ③ D. ④

item:
關於毛孔性紅糠疹（pityriasis rubra pilaris, classic adult type，PRP）、尋常性乾癬（psoriasis vulgaris）二者之比較，下列敍述何者錯誤？
①PRP常從頭臉頸開始擴及全身，乾癬則較少侵犯臉部。
②PRP平均三年內緩解，乾癬之病程多為長期慢性。
③病理下二者皆可見intraepithelial Munro microabscess。
④二者之治療選項皆包括topical Vitamin D3、oral retinoids及methotrexate。
A. ①　　B. ②　　C. ③　　D. ④
item2:
Regarding the comparison between pityriasis rubra pilaris (classic adult type, PRP) and psoriasis vulgaris, which of the following statements is wrong?
① PRP often starts from the head, face and neck and spreads to the whole body, while psoriasis rarely affects the face.
② PRP is relieved within three years on average, and the course of psoriasis is mostly long-term and chronic.
③ Both intraepithelial Munro microabscess can be seen pathologically.
④The treatment options for both include topical Vitamin D3, oral retinoids and methodotrexate.
A. ① B. ② C. ③ D. ④

item:
當使用外用類固醇藥膏治療dermatitis無效甚至惡化時，應先考慮診斷是否錯誤，也應考慮是否對該藥膏產生了過敏反應，下列敘述何者正確？
①對topical steroid藥膏過敏常因其中的添加物例如防腐劑和香料，而非steroid本身。
②可做patch test以釐清過敏來源是vehicle或是steroid。
③不同結構class間的steroids也可引起cross reactions。
④若不確定是否對該steroid過敏，可優先選擇class C的steroid，例如desoximethasone。
A. ①③　　B. ②④　　C. ①②③　　D. ④　　E. ①②③④
item2:
When using topical steroid ointment to treat dermatitis is ineffective or even worsens, you should first consider whether the diagnosis is wrong, and you should also consider whether there is an allergic reaction to the ointment. Which of the following statements is correct?
①Allergies to topical steroid ointments are often caused by the additives such as preservatives and fragrances, rather than the steroid itself.
②A patch test can be done to find out whether the source of allergy is vehicle or steroid.
③Steroids between different structural classes can also cause cross reactions.
④If you are not sure whether you are allergic to the steroid, you can give priority to class C steroids, such as desoximethasone.
A. ①③ B. ②④ C. ①②③ D. ④ E. ①②③④

item:
下列敘述何者錯誤？
①關於掌蹠角化症（palmoplantar keratodermas, PPK）腳底或手掌的厚皮，可以使用水楊酸藥膏，以密封（occlusive）療法來加強吸收。
②在Epidermolytic PPK的病人，可以考慮使用外用的calcipotriol。
③在Keratitis–ichthyosis–deafness（KID）syndrome的病人身上使用isotretinoin可能反而會造成疾病惡化（尤其可能引起角膜新生血管），因此這類病人盡量不要使用口服A酸治療。
④若要使用口服A酸在PPK病人身上，建議acitretin先以0.5 mg/kg/day的起始劑量開始，再依治療反應及病人耐受性逐漸往上增加劑量。
A. ①　　B. ②　　C. ③　　D. ④
item2:
Which of the following statements is wrong?
① Regarding the thick skin on the soles or palms of palmoplantar keratodermas (PPK), salicylic acid ointment can be used to enhance absorption with occlusive therapy.
②In patients with Epidermolytic PPK, topical calcipotriol may be considered.
③Using isotretinoin in patients with Keratitis–ichthyosis–deafness (KID) syndrome may actually worsen the disease (especially may cause corneal neovascularization), so these patients should try not to use oral A acid treatment.
④ If you want to use oral A acid in PPK patients, it is recommended to start with a starting dose of 0.5 mg/kg/day, and then gradually increase the dose according to the treatment response and patient tolerance.
A. ① B. ② C. ③ D. ④

item:
關於Darier disease，下敘述何者正確？
①在肢端由外傷所造成的出血性斑塊或水泡是最常見的症狀之一。
②易碎的指甲（nail fragility）、無痛性的縱向指甲裂開（longitudinal splits）、紅白橫向條紋（transverse bands）都是常見的指甲表現。
③可能的併發症包括eczema herpeticum及squamous cell carcinoma（SCC），後者可能跟human papillomavirus（HPV）16的存在有關。
④鋰鹽會加重Darier disease的症狀是因為增加表皮的sarco-and endoplasmic reticulum Ca2+ adenosine triphosphatase isoform 2（SERCA2）表現。
A. ①　　B. ②　　C. ③　　D. ④
item2:
Regarding Darier disease, which of the following statements is correct?
① Bleeding plaques or blisters on the extremities caused by trauma are one of the most common symptoms.
②Fragile nails (nail fragility), painless longitudinal nail splits (longitudinal splits), and red and white transverse bands are all common nail manifestations.
③Possible complications include eczema herpeticum and squamous cell carcinoma (SCC), the latter may be related to the presence of human papillomavirus (HPV) 16.
④Lithium salts will aggravate the symptoms of Darier disease because it increases the expression of sarco-and endoplasmic reticulum Ca2+ adenosine triphosphatase isoform 2 (SERCA2) in the epidermis.
A. ① B. ② C. ③ D. ④

item:
關於Dermatomyositis（DM），下列敘述何者錯誤？
①根據Sontheimer’s proposed diagnostic criteria, cutaneous DM之major criteria包含Heliotrope sign, Gottron papules, and shawl sign。
②與DM相關惡性腫瘤的臨床風險因子包含年紀大、男性、皮膚壞死、吞嚥困難及雷諾氏現象。
③Clinically amyopathic dermatomyositis（CADM）比classic DM具有較低的系統性疾病與惡性腫瘤風險。
④DM病人若出現calcinosis，其位置通常位於四肢（extremities），其可與systemic sclerosis作區別，因後者calcinosis出現位置通常位於指端（digital sites）。
A. ①③　　B. ②④　　C. ①②③　　D. ④　　E. ①②③④
item2:
Regarding Dermatomyositis (DM), which of the following statements is incorrect?
①According to Sontheimer’s proposed diagnostic criteria, the major criteria for cutaneous DM include Heliotrope sign, Gottron papules, and shawl sign.
②Clinical risk factors for DM-related malignancies include older age, male gender, skin necrosis, dysphagia, and Raynaud's phenomenon.
③Clinically amyopathic dermatomyositis (CADM) has a lower risk of systemic diseases and malignant tumors than classic DM.
④If calcinosis occurs in DM patients, its location is usually located on the extremities. It can be distinguished from systemic sclerosis because the location of calcinosis in the latter is usually located on the fingertips (digital sites).
A. ①③ B. ②④ C. ①②③ D. ④ E. ①②③④

item:
關於各種autoimmune/genetic diseases其所對應的epidermal and dermal protein targets，下列敘述何者正確？
①Desmoglein可能為pemphigus vulgaris, IgA pemphigus及striate palmoplantar keratoderma的主要target之一。
②Desmoplakin I/II可能為paraneoplastic pemphigus, diffuse palmoplantar keratoderma及skin fragility–wooly hair syndrome的主要target之一。
③Keratin 5 及keratin14為epidermolysis bullosa simplex的主要target之一。
④Desmocollin 1為epidermolysis bullosa acquisita的主要target之一。
A. ①③　　B. ②④　　C. ①②③　　D. ④　　E. ①②③④
item2:
Regarding the epidermal and dermal protein targets corresponding to various autoimmune/genetic diseases, which of the following statements is correct?
① Desmoglein may be one of the main targets of pemphigus vulgaris, IgA pemphigus and striate palmoplantar keratoderma.
②Desmoplakin I/II may be one of the main targets of paraneoplastic pemphigus, diffuse palmoplantar keratoderma and skin fragility–wooly hair syndrome.
③Keratin 5 and keratin14 are one of the main targets of epidermolysis bullosa simplex.
④Desmocollin 1 is one of the main targets of epidermolysis bullosa acquisita.
A. ①③ B. ②④ C. ①②③ D. ④ E. ①②③④

item:
關於Androgenetic alopecia（AGA），下列敘述何者錯誤？
①具有遺傳傾向的男性和女性的無疤痕性禿髮，為漸進性的毛囊縮小病程。
②發病可能發生在幼兒年齡toddler age之後的任何年齡，隨著年齡的增長，發病頻率會增加。
③多數情況下，診斷AGA不大需要施作皮膚病理組織切片檢查。
④主要治療目標是在疾病的早期、輕度至中度階段預防疾病進展或促進毛髮生長。
A. ①　　B. ②　　C. ③　　D. ④
item2:
Regarding Androgenetic alopecia (AGA), which of the following statements is incorrect?
①Scarless alopecia in men and women with genetic predisposition is a progressive disease of hair follicle shrinkage.
②The onset may occur at any age after toddler age, and the frequency of onset will increase with age.
③In most cases, skin pathological tissue biopsy is not required to diagnose AGA.
④The main treatment goal is to prevent disease progression or promote hair growth in the early, mild to moderate stages of the disease.
A. ① B. ② C. ③ D. ④

item:
下列敘述何者錯誤？
①Primary focal（essential）hyperhidrosis可影響手掌、腳底、腋窩、顱顏面、腹股溝，可因其他皮膚疾病（如eccrine nevus）造成。
②繼發性多汗症Secondary hyperhidrosis可能是由潛在的全身性疾病、藥物或兩者兼具引起的。
③無汗症Anhidrosis可能成為導致高熱、中暑或死亡的醫療緊急情況。
④Bromhidrosis常見引起氣味的短鏈脂肪酸是Ɛ-3-methyl-2-hexenoic acid。
A. ①　　B. ②　　C. ③　　D. ④
item2:
Which of the following statements is wrong?
①Primary focal (essential) hyperhidrosis can affect the palms, soles, armpits, craniofacial area, and groin, and can be caused by other skin diseases (such as eccrine nevus).
②Secondary hyperhidrosis may be caused by underlying systemic diseases, drugs, or both.
③Anhidrosis may become a medical emergency leading to high fever, heat stroke, or death.
④The short-chain fatty acid commonly causing odor in Bromhidrosis is Ɛ-3-methyl-2-hexenoic acid.
A. ① B. ② C. ③ D. ④

item:
下列哪一種病症在HIV陽性患者中，其臨床表現可能與持久性隆起性紅斑（Erythema Elevatum Diutinum, EED）相似？
①乾癬。
②皮膚念珠菌感染。
③卡波西氏肉瘤。
④蕁麻疹。
A. ①　　B. ②　　C. ③　　D. ④
item2:
Which of the following conditions may have clinical manifestations similar to Erythema Elevatum Diutinum (EED) in HIV-positive patients?
①Psoriasis.
②Skin Candida infection.
③Kaposi's sarcoma.
④ Urticaria.
A. ① B. ② C. ③ D. ④

item:
關於gonorrhea，下列敘述何者錯誤？
①男性病人睪丸疼痛和腫脹可能是唯一的臨床表現，女性病人高達五成沒有症狀。
②瀰漫性感染若未接受治療，關節炎可能產生永久性損害。
③新生兒主要為眼睛感染，生殖器感染並不尋常。
④治療藥物第一線建議為ceﬁxime和azithromycin併用。
A. ①　　B. ②　　C. ③　　D. ④
item2:
Regarding gonorrhea, which of the following statements is incorrect?
① Testicular pain and swelling may be the only clinical manifestations in male patients, while up to 50% of female patients have no symptoms.
②If diffuse infection is not treated, arthritis may cause permanent damage.
③Newborns mainly suffer from eye infections, and genital infections are unusual.
④The first line of treatment is recommended to be the combination of cefixime and azithromycin.
A. ① B. ② C. ③ D. ④

item:
關於皮膚免疫系統（cutaneous immune system），下列敘述何者正確？
①Natural killer cells不表現T-cell markers CD3。
②Plasmacytoid dendritic cells可藉由Toll-like receptors 7 and 9的表現來對抗病毒感染。
③Langerhans cells大約佔了表皮細胞數量的2%到4%，在電子顯微鏡下可見到網球拍樣的Birbeck granules。
④Neutrophils的生命週期長達7到10天，可藉由phagocytosis、degranulation或是釋放neutrophil extracellular traps（NETs）等機轉來清除致病原。
A. ①③　　B. ②④　　C. ①②③　　D. ④　　E. ①②③④
item2:
Regarding the cutaneous immune system, which of the following statements is correct?
①Natural killer cells do not express T-cell marker CD3.
②Plasmacytoid dendritic cells can fight viral infection through the expression of Toll-like receptors 7 and 9.
③Langerhans cells account for approximately 2% to 4% of the number of epidermal cells, and tennis racket-like Birbeck granules can be seen under an electron microscope.
④The life cycle of Neutrophils is as long as 7 to 10 days, and pathogens can be eliminated through mechanisms such as phagocytosis, degranulation or the release of neutrophil extracellular traps (NETs).
A. ①③ B. ②④ C. ①②③ D. ④ E. ①②③④

item:
下列敘述何者正確？
①Lichen nitidus和全身疾病沒有明顯相關。
②Lichen striatus和atopy體質無關。
③Matrix metalloproteinase 9（MMP-9）和lichen planus的基底層破壞相關，其濃度愈高，愈容易出現皮膚潰爛變化。
④Lichen striatus在epidermal-dermal junction浸潤的淋巴球主要是CD4 cells，而在真皮層及血管周圍的淋巴球主要是CD8 cells。
A. ①③　　B. ②④　　C. ①②③　　D. ④　　E. ①②③④
item2:
Which of the following statements is correct?
①Lichen nitidus has no obvious correlation with systemic diseases.
②Lichen striatus has nothing to do with atopy constitution.
③Matrix metalloproteinase 9 (MMP-9) is related to the destruction of the basal layer of lichen planus. The higher its concentration, the easier it is for skin ulceration to occur.
④The lymphocytes infiltrated by Lichen striatus in the epidermal-dermal junction are mainly CD4 cells, while the lymphocytes in the dermis and around blood vessels are mainly CD8 cells.
A. ①③ B. ②④ C. ①②③ D. ④ E. ①②③④

item:
Urticaria或angioedema相關藥物，下列敘述何者錯誤？
①Aspirin, NSAID引起urticaria的機會高，應該避免。
②COX2選擇性抑制劑引起urticaria的機會較低，較為安全。
③Angiotensin Converting Enzyme抑制劑會促進mast cells釋放mediators，也是常見引起urticaria及angioedema的藥物。
④Cetirizine, loratadine可以用在懷孕第二產期之後的病人。
A. ①　　B. ②　　C. ③　　D. ④
item2:
Urticaria or angioedema related drugs, which of the following statements is incorrect?
①Aspirin and NSAID have a high chance of causing urticaria and should be avoided.
②COX2 selective inhibitors have a lower chance of causing urticaria and are safer.
③Angiotensin Converting Enzyme inhibitors will promote the release of mediators from mast cells and are also common drugs that cause urticaria and angioedema.
④Cetirizine and loratadine can be used in patients after the second trimester of pregnancy.
A. ① B. ② C. ③ D. ④

item:
哪些是α1-抗胰蛋白酶缺乏症脂肪炎（alpha-1-antitrypsin deficiency panniculitis）的常見臨床特徵？
①紅斑、疼痛的皮下結節和斑塊。
②病變部位潰瘍。
③病灶出現在下肢。
④發燒和全身症狀。
A. ①③　　B. ②④　　C. ①②③　　D. ④　　E. ①②③④
item2:
What are the common clinical features of alpha-1-antitrypsin deficiency panniculitis?
①Erythema, painful subcutaneous nodules and plaques.
② Ulcer at the lesion site.
③The lesions appear in the lower limbs.
④Fever and systemic symptoms.
A. ①③ B. ②④ C. ①②③ D. ④ E. ①②③④

item:
關於scleredema與scleromyxedema，下列敘述何者正確？
①Scleredema的表現是急性發生的non-pitting皮膚硬塊，主要分佈在頸部、肩部及上背。
②Scleromyxedema的發生與monoclonal paraproteinemia跟甲狀腺亢進有關。
③在病理下，scleromyxedema的纖維母細胞（fibroblast）及mucin沉積主要分佈在深的真皮層中。
④Scleredema的有效治療包含治療相關疾病，ultraviolet A1 phototherapy（UVA-1）及methotrexate。
A. ①　　B. ②　　C. ③　　D. ④
item2:
Regarding scleredema and scleromyxedema, which of the following statements is correct?
①Scleredema is characterized by acute non-pitting skin lumps, mainly distributed on the neck, shoulders and upper back.
②The occurrence of Scleromyxedema is related to monoclonal paraproteinemia and hyperthyroidism.
③ Under pathology, fibroblast and mucin deposition of scleromyxedema are mainly distributed in the deep dermis.
④Effective treatments for Scleredema include treatment of related diseases, ultraviolet A1 phototherapy (UVA-1) and methodotrexate.
A. ① B. ② C. ③ D. ④

item:
關於Dysplastic melanocytic nevus（DN），下列敘述何者正確？
①Dysplastic nevus syndrome（DNS）的病患在青春期前後就可能發生超過100個以上的atypical nevus，而且可能在30幾歲就發生melanoma。
②DN好發於高度曝曬陽光的區域，如頭頸部。
③eruptive DN曾被報告出現在AIDS、腎臟移植及chronic myeloid leukemia的病患。
④DN進展為melanoma的危險因子包括DN的數目、melanoma的個人病史及家族史，但不包括陽光的暴露。
A. ①③　　B. ②④　　C. ①②③　　D. ④　　E. ①②③④
item2:
Regarding Dysplastic melanocytic nevus (DN), which of the following statements is correct?
①Patients with Dysplastic nevus syndrome (DNS) may develop more than 100 atypical nevus around puberty, and may develop melanoma in their 30s.
②DN tends to occur in areas highly exposed to sunlight, such as the head and neck.
③eruptive DN has been reported to occur in patients with AIDS, kidney transplantation, and chronic myeloid leukemia.
④Risk factors for DN to progress to melanoma include the number of DN, personal and family history of melanoma, but do not include sun exposure.
A. ①③ B. ②④ C. ①②③ D. ④ E. ①②③④

item:
關於Cutaneous squamous cell carcinoma（SCC）的分期及治療，下列敘述何者錯誤？
①Tumor直徑≤ 2cm為T2；直徑>2cm則為T3。
②針對局部low risk的SCC病灶，宜選擇standard excision（4-6mm margin）。
③根據NCCN guideline，出現在臉部area H的SCC較不會有local recurrence。
④Niacinamide及systemic retinoid對於nonmelanoma skin cancer（NMSC）具有chemoprevention的效果。
A. ①③　　B. ②④　　C. ①②③　　D. ④　　E. ①②③④
item2:
Regarding the staging and treatment of Cutaneous squamous cell carcinoma (SCC), which of the following statements is incorrect?
① Tumor diameter ≤ 2cm is T2; diameter > 2cm is T3.
②For local low-risk SCC lesions, standard excision (4-6mm margin) should be selected.
③According to the NCCN guideline, SCC appearing in area H on the face is less likely to have local recurrence.
④Niacinamide and systemic retinoid have chemoprevention effects on nonmelanoma skin cancer (NMSC).
A. ①③ B. ②④ C. ①②③ D. ④ E. ①②③④

item:
關於actinic keratosis（AK），下列敘述何者錯誤？
①大約有30%的AK病灶會進展成invasive squamous cell carcinoma（SCC）。
②Fitzpatrick type 1的人種比Fitzpatrick type 6的人種較容易發生AK。
③在sun-exposed area常同時出現多個病灶，此現象稱為field cancerization。
④大於60%的SCC是從AK病灶轉變而來。
A. ①　　B. ②　　C. ③　　D. ④
item2:
Regarding actinic keratosis (AK), which of the following statements is incorrect?
①About 30% of AK lesions will progress to invasive squamous cell carcinoma (SCC).
②People with Fitzpatrick type 1 are more likely to develop AK than people with Fitzpatrick type 6.
③Multiple lesions often appear in the sun-exposed area at the same time. This phenomenon is called field cancerization.
④ More than 60% of SCCs are transformed from AK lesions.
A. ① B. ② C. ③ D. ④

item:
Palmoplantar keratoderma是genodermatoses的臨床表現之一，下列何者除外？
①Dyskeratosis congenita.
②Autosomal recessive congenital ichthyosis.
③Hailey-Hailey disease.
④Darier’s disease.
A. ①　　B. ②　　C. ③　　D. ④
item2:
Palmoplantar keratoderma is one of the clinical manifestations of genodermatoses, except which of the following?
①Dyskeratosis congenita.
②Autosomal recessive congenital ichthyosis.
③Hailey-Hailey disease.
④Darier’s disease.
A. ① B. ② C. ③ D. ④

item:
35歲男性，過去健康，近日出現陰莖疼痛性潰瘍並伴有左側鼠蹊部疼痛性腫塊。理學檢查發現陰莖有一個邊緣不整、底部有黃灰色分泌物的潰瘍，底部壞死且易出血。下列何者最可能為此患者的診斷？
①梅毒(Syphilis)。
②軟性下疳(Chancroid)。
③淋巴肉芽腫性病(Lymphogranuloma venereum)。
④Donovanosis (Granuloma inguinale).
A. ①　　B. ②　　C. ③　　D. ④
item2:
A 35-year-old male, who was healthy in the past, recently developed a painful ulcer on his penis accompanied by a painful mass on the left groin. Physical examination revealed an ulcer with uneven edges and yellow-gray discharge at the base of the penis. The base was necrotic and easy to bleed. Which of the following is the most likely diagnosis for this patient?
①Syphilis.
② Soft chancre (Chancroid).
③Lymphogranuloma venereum.
④Donovanosis (Granuloma inguinale).
A. ① B. ② C. ③ D. ④

item:
關於梅毒的血清學檢查，下列敘述何者正確？
①非梅毒血清學檢查(non-treponemal tests)如RPR、VDRL在早期感染後2週會出現陽性。
②梅毒螢光抗體吸收試驗(FTA-ABS)於梅毒治療成功後會轉為陰性。
③非梅毒血清學檢查用在第三期梅毒的靈敏度超過80%。
④若出現高度懷疑梅毒但非梅毒血清學檢查為陰性時，應排除 prozone phenomenon。
A. ①③　　B. ②④　　C. ①②③　　D. ④　　E. ①②③④
item2:
Regarding serological testing for syphilis, which of the following statements is correct?
①Non-treponemal tests such as RPR and VDRL will appear positive 2 weeks after early infection.
②Fluorescent syphilis antibody absorption test (FTA-ABS) will turn negative after successful treatment of syphilis.
③The sensitivity of non-syphilis serological tests for tertiary syphilis exceeds 80%.
④If syphilis is highly suspected but non-syphilis serological tests are negative, prozone phenomenon should be ruled out.
A. ①③ B. ②④ C. ①②③ D. ④ E. ①②③④

item:
有關乾癬的致病機轉與生物製劑，下列敘述何者正確？
①Etanercept主要與soluble TNF結合，adalimumab與soluble and membrane bound TNF結合。
②Ustekinumab與IL12及IL23之p40 unit結合，會影響Th1 differentiation及Th17 and Th22 cells。
③乾癬因Tregs(例如CD4 + CD25 + subset)的抑制功能受損，無法壓制effector T cell 之proliferation。
④ Secukinumab與ixekizumab為IL17A antagonists，brodalumab可與 IL17 A/F結合。
A. ①③　　B. ②④　　C. ①②③　　D. ④　　E. ①②③④
item2:
Regarding the pathogenesis of psoriasis and biological agents, which of the following statements is correct?
①Etanercept mainly binds to soluble TNF, and adalimumab binds to soluble and membrane bound TNF.
② Ustekinumab binds to the p40 unit of IL12 and IL23, which affects Th1 differentiation and Th17 and Th22 cells.
③ In psoriasis, the inhibitory function of Tregs (such as CD4 + CD25 + subset) is impaired and cannot suppress the proliferation of effector T cells.
④ Secukinumab and ixekizumab are IL17A antagonists, and brodalumab can bind to IL17 A/F. 
A. ①③ B. ②④ C. ①②③ D. ④ E. ①②③④

item:
有關乾癬的指甲病變，下列敘述何者正確？
①乾癬的各種指甲病變以onychodystrophy與乾癬性關節炎有較強的相關性。
②Nail matrix相關的變化包括：oil spots, pitting, onychodystrophy (leukonychia, crumbling nail, red spots in lunula)。
③Nail bed相關的變化包括：salmon patches, splinter hemorrhage, subungual keratosis。
④乾癬的指甲病變以leukonychia最具特異性(specific for psoriasis)。
A. ①③　　B. ②④　　C. ①②③　　D. ④　　E. ①②③④
item2:
Regarding psoriasis nail lesions, which of the following statements is correct?
① Various nail lesions of psoriasis, including onychodystrophy, have a strong correlation with psoriatic arthritis.
② Nail matrix related changes include: oil spots, pitting, onychodystrophy (leukonychia, crumbling nail, red spots in lunula).
③Nail bed related changes include: salmon patches, splinter hemorrhage, subungual keratosis.
④The nail lesions of psoriasis are most specific to leukonychia (specific for psoriasis).
A. ①③ B. ②④ C. ①②③ D. ④ E. ①②③④

item:
有關異位性皮膚炎，下列敘述何者正確？
①表皮細胞多有thymic stromal lymphopoietin (TSLP) and IL33，會誘導Th2 cell differentiation，其皮膚多表現 IL4, IL5, IL13, IL25, IL31, IL33等 type 2 cytokines。
②Filaggrin deficiency可以呈現ichthyosis vulgaris, keratosis pilaris, and hyperlinear palms等臨床表現。
③可以考慮"proactive therapy"使疾病獲得更佳的控制：例如在先前有病灶但已正常處，每週使用兩次外用fluticasone、或每週使用三次tacrolimus ointment。
④異位性皮膚炎病患抽血檢測 allergen specific IgE，如果是陰性反應，對於排除過敏原有高度的價值。
A. ①③　　B. ②④　　C. ①②③　　D. ④　　E. ①②③④
item2:
Regarding atopic dermatitis, which of the following statements is correct?
① Epidermal cells mostly contain thymic stromal lymphopoietin (TSLP) and IL33, which can induce Th2 cell differentiation. The skin mostly expresses IL4, IL5, IL13, IL25, IL31, IL33 and other type 2 cytokines.
②Filaggrin deficiency can present clinical manifestations such as ichthyosis vulgaris, keratosis pilaris, and hyperlinear palms.
③ "Proactive therapy" can be considered to achieve better control of the disease: for example, where there were previous lesions but have become normal, use topical fluticasone twice a week, or use tacrolimus ointment three times a week.
④Atopic dermatitis patients take blood tests to test for allergen specific IgE. If the reaction is negative, it is highly valuable for ruling out allergens.
A. ①③ B. ②④ C. ①②③ D. ④ E. ①②③④

item:
以下那些疾病預後良好可能自行改善，不一定需積極治療？
①Lichen nitidus.
②Lichen striatus.
③Localized granuloma annulare.
④Lupus pernio.
A. ①③　　B. ②④　　C. ①②③　　D. ④　　E. ①②③④
item2:
Which of the following diseases have a good prognosis and may improve on their own without necessarily requiring active treatment?
①Lichen nitidus.
②Lichen striatus.
③Localized granuloma annulare.
④Lupus pernio.
A. ①③ B. ②④ C. ①②③ D. ④ E. ①②③④

item:
關於angioedema，下列敘述何者錯誤？
①通常沒有合併wheal發生的recurrent angioedema 和bradykinin相關。
②Type II hereditary angioedema的C1 inhibitor濃度和活性都降低。
③如果Acquired angioedema是因為過度消耗C1 inhibitor，C1q也會降低。
④Icatibant可以用來治療angioedema急性發作。
A. ①　　B. ②　　C. ③　　D. ④
item2:
Regarding angioedema, which of the following statements is incorrect?
①Recurrent angioedema that usually occurs without merging wheal is related to bradykinin.
②The concentration and activity of C1 inhibitor of Type II hereditary angioedema are reduced.
③If Acquired angioedema is due to excessive consumption of C1 inhibitor, C1q will also decrease.
④Icatibant can be used to treat acute attacks of angioedema.
A. ① B. ② C. ③ D. ④

item:
關於臨床疾病和致病毒素的配對，下列敘述何者正確？
①Toxic shock syndrome – toxic shock syndrome toxin 1.
②Bullous impetigo – exfoliatin type A.
③Scarlet fever – streptococcal pyrogenic exotoxins A.
④Staphylococcal scaled skin syndrome – staphylococcal enterotoxins A.
A. ①③　　B. ②④　　C. ①②③　　D. ④　　E. ①②③④
item2:
Regarding the pairing of clinical disease and causative toxins, which of the following statements is correct?
①Toxic shock syndrome – toxic shock syndrome toxin 1.
②Bullous impetigo – exfoliatin type A. 
③Scarlet fever – streptococcal pyrogenic exotoxins A. 
④Staphylococcal scaled skin syndrome – staphylococcal enterotoxins A. 
A. ①③ B. ②④ C. ①②③ D. ④ E. ①②③④

item:
一名28歲男性出現發燒症狀，隨後出現膿疱性皮疹，分布於臉部、軀幹及四肢，包括手掌與腳底。他表示近期曾前往猴痘(M痘)流行地區，並與野生動物有接觸。關於M痘病毒感染，下列敘述何者正確？
① M痘的皮疹呈離心性分布(centrifugal distribution)，較常從臉部和軀幹開始。
② M痘的水疱及膿疱大多在3天內出現，7天內結痂脫落。
③淋巴結腫大是M痘常見的臨床特徵，有助於與天花(smallpox)做鑑別。
④病灶進行電子顯微鏡檢查是首選診斷方式，因其具高度敏感性與特異性。
A. ①③　　B. ②④　　C. ①②③　　D. ④　　E. ①②③④
item2:
A 28-year-old man developed fever, followed by a pustular rash, which was distributed on the face, trunk, and limbs, including the palms and soles of the feet. He stated that he had recently traveled to an area where monkeypox (Mpox) is endemic and had contact with wild animals. Regarding Mpox virus infection, which of the following statements is correct?
① The rash of M-acne has a centrifugal distribution, most often starting on the face and trunk.
② Most of the blisters and pustules of acne appear within 3 days, and the scabs will fall off within 7 days.
③ Lymph node enlargement is a common clinical feature of M-pox and helps to differentiate it from smallpox.
④Electron microscopy of lesions is the preferred diagnostic method because of its high sensitivity and specificity.
A. ①③ B. ②④ C. ①②③ D. ④ E. ①②③④

item:
關於Kasabach-Merritt phenomenon（KMP），下列敘述何者錯誤？
①主要成因為慢性凝血因子的消耗。
②Tufted angioma可能產生此現象，infantile hemangioma則不會產生。
③抽血可見低血小板，Hb下降、fibrinogen減少、D-dimer 上升。
④Kaposiform hemangioendothelioma若涉及超過一個解剖區域是產生KMP的危險因子。
A. ①　　B. ②　　C. ③　　D. ④
item2:
Regarding the Kasabach-Merritt phenomenon (KMP), which of the following statements is incorrect?
① Mainly caused by the consumption of chronic coagulation factors.
② Tufted angioma may produce this phenomenon, but infantile hemangioma does not.
③Blood drawing shows low platelets, decreased Hb, decreased fibrinogen, and increased D-dimer.
④If Kaposiform hemangioendothelioma involves more than one anatomical area, it is a risk factor for the production of KMP.
A. ① B. ② C. ③ D. ④

item:
關於皮膚Melanoma，下列敘述何者正確？
①大部分的Melanoma是由既有的良性痣癌化產生。
②若在足底Melanoma的理學檢查發現同側鼠蹊部淋巴腫大，應安排腫大淋巴結的excisional biopsy。
③Melanoma of unknown primary一般而言預後較相同期別的Melanoma佳。
④皮膚Melanoma遠端轉移最常見的器官為肺臟、肝臟以及腦。
A. ①③　　B. ②④　　C. ①②③　　D. ④　　E. ①②③④
item2:
Regarding skin Melanoma, which of the following statements is correct?
①Most Melanoma is caused by the canceration of existing benign moles.
② If physical examination of Melanoma on the sole of the foot reveals enlarged lymph nodes in the groin of the ipsilateral side, an excisional biopsy of the enlarged lymph nodes should be arranged.
③Melanoma of unknown primary generally has a better prognosis than Melanoma of the same stage.
④The most common organs for distant metastasis of cutaneous Melanoma are the lungs, liver, and brain.
A. ①③ B. ②④ C. ①②③ D. ④ E. ①②③④

item:
關於amyloidosis，下列敘述何者錯誤？
①在AL amyloidosis，病人血液常有高濃度的immunoglobulin light chain，可能合併multiple myeloma。
②Doxycycline可以抑制形成mature fibrils，以及抑制 MMP-9，可以用來治療amyloidosis。
③在nodular amyloidosis，需要檢查病人是否有合併Sjögren’s disease，也有可能發展成systemic amyloidosis。
④在AL amyloidosis，amyloid主要沉積在真皮內中型至大型血管壁，是典型的診斷特徵。
A. ①③　　B. ②④　　C. ①②③　　D. ④　　E. ①②③④
item2:
Regarding amyloidosis, which of the following statements is incorrect?
①In AL amyloidosis, patients often have high concentrations of immunoglobulin light chain in their blood, which may be combined with multiple myeloma.
②Doxycycline can inhibit the formation of mature fibrils and inhibit MMP-9, and can be used to treat amyloidosis.
③In nodular amyloidosis, it is necessary to check whether the patient has Sjögren’s disease, which may also develop into systemic amyloidosis.
④In AL amyloidosis, amyloid is mainly deposited in the walls of medium to large blood vessels in the dermis, which is a typical diagnostic feature.
A. ①③ B. ②④ C. ①②③ D. ④ E. ①②③④

item:
關於皮膚骨化及鈣化，下列敘述何者正確？
①皮膚骨化可以在沒有合併組織異常或鈣化之下發生。
②Metastatic鈣化經常出現在結締組織疾病，其鈣化沉積好發在上肢以及易受傷或活動之處。
③Sodium thiosulfate可以促進鈣螯合，可以用來治療calciphylaxis。
④Dystrophic鈣化較常合併成人型皮肌炎，其病程越長，出現的比例越高。
A. ①③　　B. ②④　　C. ①②③　　D. ④　　E. ①②③④
item2:
Regarding skin ossification and calcification, which of the following statements is correct?
①Skin ossification can occur without associated tissue abnormalities or calcification.
②Metastatic calcification often occurs in connective tissue diseases, and its calcification deposits tend to occur in the upper limbs and areas prone to injury or activity.
③Sodium thiosulfate can promote calcium chelation and can be used to treat calciphylaxis.
④Dystrophic calcification is more commonly associated with adult dermatomyositis. The longer the course of the disease, the higher the incidence rate.
A. ①③ B. ②④ C. ①②③ D. ④ E. ①②③④

item:
下列敘述何者正確？
①職業性皮膚病以接觸性皮膚炎最常見，包括刺激性接觸性皮膚炎(ICD)與過敏性接觸性皮膚炎(ACD)；ICD與type I hypersensitivity有關，ACD與type IV hypersensitivity 有關，臨床上ICD的案例多於ACD。
②Acute ICD可見crescendo phenomenon，ACD可見decrescendo phenomenon；此現象有助於貼膚試驗的判讀。
③Non-immunological contact urticaria之治療，nonsteroidal anti-inflammatory medications 的效果優於H1 antihistamines。
④診斷 contact urticaria的方式包括open test, regular patch test, skin prick test。
A. ①　　B. ②　　C. ③　　D. ④
item2:
Which of the following statements is correct?
① Contact dermatitis is the most common occupational skin disease, including irritant contact dermatitis (ICD) and allergic contact dermatitis (ACD); ICD is related to type I hypersensitivity, and ACD is related to type IV hypersensitivity. There are more clinical cases of ICD than ACD.
②The crescendo phenomenon can be seen in Acute ICD, and the decrescendo phenomenon can be seen in ACD; this phenomenon is helpful for the interpretation of the skin patch test.
③In the treatment of Non-immunological contact urticaria, nonsteroidal anti-inflammatory medications are more effective than H1 antihistamines.
④Diagnostic methods for contact urticaria include open test, regular patch test, and skin prick test.
A. ① B. ② C. ③ D. ④

item:
下列敘述何者錯誤？
①Bullous diabeticorum 經常進展到全身大面積影響，需要給予口服類固醇加以控制。
②甲狀腺亢進的病人容易出現tendon xanthoma, plantar xanthoma。
③Thyroid dermopathy可以出現在身體任何部位，和myxedema相關，和合併免疫疾病的嚴重度則無關。
④Necrobiosis lipoidica 經常出現在下肢，也有可能出現在軀幹和上肢。如果出現潰瘍變化也有可能合併squamous cell carcinoma。
A. ①③　　B. ②④　　C. ①②③　　D. ④　　E. ①②③④
item2:
Which of the following statements is wrong?
① Bullous diabeticorum often progresses to affect large areas of the body, requiring oral steroids to be controlled.
②Patients with hyperthyroidism are prone to tendon xanthoma and plantar xanthoma.
③Thyroid dermopathy can appear in any part of the body, is related to myxedema, and has nothing to do with the severity of combined immune diseases.
④Necrobiosis lipoidica often appears in the lower limbs, and may also appear in the trunk and upper limbs. If ulcer changes occur, it may also be combined with squamous cell carcinoma.
A. ①③ B. ②④ C. ①②③ D. ④ E. ①②③④

item:
下列敘述何者正確？
①Osler nodule是由於immune complex沉積在血管造成，病理表現為perivasculitis或necrotizing vasculitis，是endocarditis的特異性皮膚表現。
②Antineutrophilic cytoplasmic antibody（ANCA）-associated vasculitis主要影響中型到大型血管，不只在皮膚也會有肺部表現。
③Clubbing finger常出現在心血管及肺部疾病，包括congestive heart failure，肺癌的病人，也可能出現在肝臟疾病的病人。
④Yellow nail syndrome指甲會增厚，出現onycholysis，常和肝功能異常，膽道阻塞有關。
A. ①　　B. ②　　C. ③　　D. ④
item2:
Which of the following statements is correct?
①Osler nodule is caused by the deposition of immune complex in blood vessels. Its pathological manifestation is perivasculitis or necrotizing vasculitis, which is a specific skin manifestation of endocarditis.
② Antineutrophilic cytoplasmic antibody (ANCA)-associated vasculitis mainly affects medium to large blood vessels, not only in the skin but also in the lungs.
③Clubbing finger often appears in patients with cardiovascular and pulmonary diseases, including congestive heart failure, lung cancer, and may also appear in patients with liver disease.
④Yellow nail syndrome causes thickening of nails and onycholysis, which is often related to abnormal liver function and biliary obstruction.
A. ① B. ② C. ③ D. ④

item:
關於graft-versus-host dermatosis（GVHD），下列敘述何者錯誤？
①慢性GVHD病人可能表現白斑，圓禿等自體免疫疾病。
②慢性GVHD的風險因子包括年紀較大，男性捐贈者/女性接受者，和骨髓幹細胞（和周邊血幹細胞相比）。
③GVHD病人如果無法使用系統性免疫抑制劑，可以使用phototherapy (UVA1)來治療皮膚硬化病灶。
④慢性GVHD的成因主要是Th1反應，Th2則參與急性及慢性GVHD。
A. ①③　　B. ②④　　C. ①②③　　D. ④　　E. ①②③④
item2:
Regarding graft-versus-host dermatosis (GVHD), which of the following statements is incorrect?
①Patients with chronic GVHD may present with vitiligo, alopecia areata and other autoimmune diseases.
②Risk factors for chronic GVHD include older age, male donor/female recipient, and bone marrow stem cells (compared to peripheral blood stem cells).
③If GVHD patients cannot use systemic immunosuppressants, phototherapy (UVA1) can be used to treat skin sclerosis lesions.
④The cause of chronic GVHD is mainly Th1 response, while Th2 is involved in acute and chronic GVHD.
A. ①③ B. ②④ C. ①②③ D. ④ E. ①②③④

item:
關於neurofibromatosis，下列敘述何者正確？
①數目多的café-au-lait spots代表較嚴重的neurofibromatosis表現，其部位和後續neurofibroma出現的位置相關。
②Plexiform neurofibroma多半在中年以後出現，如果突然長大或出現疼痛，要考慮惡性變化。
③Neurofibroma大部分沒有症狀，不會癢，如果位在dorsal root或大條神經時會導致嚴重疼痛。
④病人可能出現的惡性腫瘤包括malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumor，pheochromocytoma及leukemia。
A. ①③　　B. ②④　　C. ①②③　　D. ④　　E. ①②③④
item2:
Regarding neurofibromatosis, which of the following statements is correct?
① A large number of café-au-lait spots represents more severe neurofibromatosis, and its location is related to the location of subsequent neurofibroma.
②Plexiform neurofibroma mostly appears after middle age. If it grows suddenly or causes pain, malignant changes should be considered.
③Neurofibroma is mostly asymptomatic and does not itch. If it is located at the dorsal root or a large nerve, it will cause severe pain.
④ Malignant tumors that patients may develop include malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumor, pheochromocytoma and leukemia.
A. ①③ B. ②④ C. ①②③ D. ④ E. ①②③④

item:
下列敘述何者正確？
①Acquired ichthyosis可以在內分泌，感染，自體免疫疾病出現，也可能和惡性腫瘤相關，如mycosis fungoides，CD30+ lymphoid proliferative disease，Hodgkin disease。
②Multicentric reticulohistiocytosis病人在臉部及手部會出現丘疹，結節，以及破壞性關節炎，也可能合併癌症，需要做仔細檢查。
③Necrolytic migratory erythema可以出現在皮膚皺摺處，也會出現在口腔黏膜，可以合併glucagonoma或pseudoglucagonoma syndrome。
④Bazex syndrome (acrokeratosis paraneoplastica)可以合併palmoplantar keratoderma，對systemic retinoid治療效果佳。
A. ①③　　B. ②④　　C. ①②③　　D. ④　　E. ①②③④
item2:
Which of the following statements is correct?
①Acquired ichthyosis can occur in endocrine, infection, autoimmune diseases, and may also be related to malignant tumors, such as mycosis fungoides, CD30+ lymphoid proliferative disease, and Hodgkin disease.
②Patients with Multicentric reticulohistiocytosis will develop papules, nodules, and destructive arthritis on the face and hands. They may also be complicated by cancer and require careful examination.
③Necrolytic migratory erythema can appear in skin folds and oral mucosa, and can be combined with glucagonoma or pseudoglucagonoma syndrome.
④Bazex syndrome (acrokeratosis paraneoplastica) can be combined with palmoplantar keratoderma, which has good therapeutic effect on systemic retinoid.
A. ①③ B. ②④ C. ①②③ D. ④ E. ①②③④

item:
關於雷射的安全性，下列何者正確？
①雷射對於眼睛的傷害，主要是來自於thermal damage，photochemical damage和mechanical injury。
②波長380nm以下的雷射會被retina吸收，而波長大於380nm的雷射則會被cornea吸收。
③戴雷射防護眼鏡可保護操作者被雷射光照射皮膚後反射（reflection）所傷。
④對於膚色較深的患者，可以使用較高的能量密度（fluence）、較長的脈衝持續時間、較長的波長可降低治療時皮膚受傷的風險。
A. ①③　　B. ②④　　C. ①②③　　D. ④　　E. ①②③④
item2:
Regarding laser safety, which of the following is true?
① Laser damage to the eyes mainly comes from thermal damage, photochemical damage and mechanical injury.
② Lasers with wavelengths below 380nm will be absorbed by retina, while lasers with wavelengths greater than 380nm will be absorbed by cornea.
③ Wearing laser protective glasses can protect the operator from injuries caused by the reflection of laser light on the skin.
④For patients with darker skin, higher energy density (fluence), longer pulse duration, and longer wavelength can be used to reduce the risk of skin injury during treatment.
A. ①③ B. ②④ C. ①②③ D. ④ E. ①②③④

item:
關於自體免疫或遺傳疾病(autoimmune/genetic diseases)，所對應的表皮與真皮的protein targets，下列敘述何者正確？
①Desmoglein 1為pemphigus foliaceus, IgA pemphigus及striate palmoplantar keratoderma的主要target之一。
②Desmoplakin I/II為paraneoplastic pemphigus, striate palmoplantar keratoderma及lethal acantholytic epidermolysis bullosa的主要target之一。
③Laminin 332為junctional epidermolysis bullosa的主要target之一。
④Plakophilin 1為skin fragility and ectodermal dysplasia的主要target。
A. ①③　　B. ②④　　C. ①②③　　D. ④　　E. ①②③④
item2:
Regarding autoimmune/genetic diseases and the corresponding protein targets in the epidermis and dermis, which of the following statements is correct?
①Desmoglein 1 is one of the main targets of pemphigus foliaceus, IgA pemphigus and striate palmoplantar keratoderma.
②Desmoplakin I/II is one of the main targets of paraneoplastic pemphigus, striate palmoplantar keratoderma and lethal acantholytic epidermolysis bullosa.
③Laminin 332 is one of the main targets of junctional epidermolysis bullosa.
④Plakophilin 1 is the main target of skin fragility and ectodermal dysplasia.
A. ①③ B. ②④ C. ①②③ D. ④ E. ①②③④

item:
關於靜脈曲張的硬化治療(sclerotherapy)，下列敘述何者錯誤？
①注射硬化劑導致Deep vein thrombosis的原因是單一注射部位的注射劑量過大(>1 毫升)，以及使用了泡沫硬化劑，導致硬化劑進入深層靜脈系統。
②若注射硬化劑時不慎注入動脈，會出現持續性劇烈的灼熱感和皮膚蒼白，並在幾分鐘內發展成邊緣分明的發紺(cyanosis)。
③發生動脈內注射時，如果使用的是Sodium tetradecyl sulfate (STS)，建議注射1%到 3% procaine以使其失去活性。
④高風險的動脈內注射區域包括popliteal fossa, dorsal foot和lateral malleolus。
A. ①　　B. ②　　C. ③　　D. ④
item2:
Regarding sclerotherapy for varicose veins, which of the following statements is incorrect?
① The causes of deep vein thrombosis caused by sclerosing injection are that the injection dose at a single injection site is too large (>1 ml) and the use of foam sclerosing agent, which causes the sclerosing agent to enter the deep vein system.
② If the sclerosing agent is accidentally injected into the artery, a persistent and severe burning sensation and pale skin will occur, and develop into cyanosis with sharp edges within a few minutes.
③When intra-arterial injection occurs, if sodium tetradecyl sulfate (STS) is used, it is recommended to inject 1% to 3% procaine to inactivate it.
④ High-risk intra-arterial injection areas include popliteal fossa, dorsal foot and lateral malleolus.
A. ① B. ② C. ③ D. ④

item:
關於痤瘡(acne)的治療，下列何者正確？
①口服tetracycline可能抑制胎兒的骨骼生長，因此病患若懷孕不能開立使用，小於九歲之病患也不建議使用。
②口服isotretinoin能有效抑制皮脂分泌，達到治療痤瘡之效，然而多數病患在停藥後2-4個月後，皮脂分泌量將回復正常。
③Isotretinoin可能引起血脂異常，尤其是三酸甘油脂(triglyceride)，建議在病患開始服用後定期抽血檢驗，若第8周時檢查數值正常，對於沒有風險因子的病患可以不用再追蹤後續triglyceride數值。
④長期使用口服A酸造成的高血脂症與動脈粥狀硬化、心血管事件風險的增加有關。
A. ①③　　B. ②④　　C. ①②③　　D. ④　　E. ①②③④
item2:
Regarding the treatment of acne, which of the following is correct?
① Oral tetracycline may inhibit fetal bone growth, so it cannot be prescribed to patients who are pregnant, and it is not recommended for patients younger than nine years old.
② Oral isotretinoin can effectively inhibit sebum secretion and achieve the effect of treating acne. However, in most patients, sebum secretion will return to normal 2-4 months after stopping the drug.
③Isotretinoin may cause dyslipidemia, especially triglyceride. It is recommended that patients take regular blood tests after starting to take it. If the test value is normal at the 8th week, patients without risk factors do not need to track the subsequent triglyceride value.
④Hyperlipidemia caused by long-term use of oral A acid is associated with an increased risk of atherosclerosis and cardiovascular events.
A. ①③ B. ②④ C. ①②③ D. ④ E. ①②③④

item:
關於下列敘述，何者錯誤？
①約20%的新生兒可能出現neonatal acne，Malassezia sympodialis被認為和neonatal acne的生成有關，因此可使用ketoconazole cream治療。
②Chloracne常以inflammatory papulopustules or large nodules來表現，病灶常出現於臉部，但不常出現在皺褶處如腋下及鼠蹊部。
③1-7歲的孩童很少會長acne，若出現要檢查病患有無hyperandrogenism的徵象。
④Perioral dermatitis好發於老年男性，治療上應避免使用類固醇。
A. ①③　　B. ②④　　C. ①②③　　D. ④　　E. ①②③④
item2:
Which of the following statements is incorrect?
①About 20% of newborns may develop neonatal acne. Malassezia sympodialis is considered to be related to the development of neonatal acne, so ketoconazole cream can be used to treat it.
②Chloracne often manifests itself as inflammatory papulopustules or large nodules. The lesions often appear on the face, but less often in folds such as armpits and groin.
③Children aged 1-7 years old rarely develop Acne. If symptoms occur, the patient should be checked for signs of hyperandrogenism.
④Perioral dermatitis is more likely to occur in older men, and the use of steroids should be avoided in treatment.
A. ①③ B. ②④ C. ①②③ D. ④ E. ①②③④

item:
關於hypermelanosis之疾病，下列敘述何者正確？
①Addison disease引起的hyperpigmentation和ACTH overproduction相關，其hyperpigmentation常發生於日光曝曬處、受傷處、會陰部及palmar creases。
②Prurigo pigmentosa常以對稱的erythematous papulovesicles表現，分布於胸部、上背部及頸部，後續會發展成reticulate hyperpigmentation，dapsone的治療反應不佳。
③Riehl melanosis臨床上以gray-brown或blue reticulate hyperpigmentation來表現，常分布於臉部及頸部，可能和反覆接觸contact sensitizer如fragrances有關。
④Erythema dyschromicum perstans和lichen planus pigmentosus臨床上都以blue-gray macules來表現，但前者病灶較常出現在photo-exposed area，後者病灶則較常出現在photo-protected area。
A. ①③　　B. ②④　　C. ①②③　　D. ④　　E. ①②③④
item2:
Regarding the disease hypermelanosis, which of the following statements is correct?
① Hyperpigmentation caused by Addison disease is related to ACTH overproduction. Hyperpigmentation often occurs in sun-exposed areas, injured areas, perineum and palmar creases.
②Prurigo pigmentosa often manifests as symmetrical erythematous papulovesicles, distributed on the chest, upper back and neck, and will subsequently develop into reticulate hyperpigmentation, which does not respond well to dapsone treatment.
③Riehl melanosis clinically manifests as gray-brown or blue reticulate hyperpigmentation, often distributed on the face and neck, and may be related to repeated exposure to contact sensitizers such as fragrances.
④Erythema dyschromicum perstans and lichen planus pigmentosus both present clinically as blue-gray macules, but the former’s lesions more often appear in the photo-exposed area, while the latter’s lesions more often appear in the photo-protected area.
A. ①③ B. ②④ C. ①②③ D. ④ E. ①②③④

item:
下列敘述何者正確？
①Acne fulminans的第一線治療是類固醇，通常會建議systemic steroid給予2-4周後再給予isotretinoin。
②使用systemic steroid兩周後即可能引起steroid folliculitis，相較於acne vulgaris，steroid folliculitis病灶較常處於相同stage，且較常長在軀幹，較少影響臉部。
③長期使用抗生素穩定控制之痤瘡若臨床出現惡化要懷疑gram-negative folliculitis。
④Gram-negative folliculitis須根據培養結果選擇合適之抗生素治療，不適合使用口服isotretinoin。
A. ①③　　B. ②④　　C. ①②③　　D. ④　　E. ①②③④
item2:
Which of the following statements is correct?
①The first-line treatment for Acne fulminans is steroids. It is usually recommended to give systemic steroids for 2-4 weeks before giving isotretinoin.
② Steroid folliculitis may occur after two weeks of using systemic steroid. Compared with Acne vulgaris, steroid folliculitis lesions are more often at the same stage, more often located on the trunk, and less likely to affect the face.
③Gram-negative folliculitis should be suspected if clinical deterioration occurs in acne stably controlled by long-term antibiotic use.
④Gram-negative folliculitis must be treated with appropriate antibiotics based on culture results, and oral isotretinoin is not suitable.
A. ①③ B. ②④ C. ①②③ D. ④ E. ①②③④

item:
76 歲男性，左顳部術後2.2 cm 缺損擬行局部皮瓣修復；患者亦有心臟去顫器。下列何者錯誤？
①在Superficial temporal fascia以上淺層脂肪層解剖與剝離，可降低臉部運動神經受損風險。
②顏面神經顳支(temporal branch)於跨越顴弓(zygomatic arch)中段時最表淺、最易損傷。
③傷口縫合時應沿皮膚放鬆張力線(relaxed skin tension lines)。
④手術時，裝心臟節律器或植入式去顫器的病人應避免使用electrocautery方式止血。
A. ①　　B. ②　　C. ③　　D. ④
item2:
A 76-year-old man, a 2.2 cm left temporal defect was planned to undergo local flap repair after surgery; the patient also had a defibrillator. Which of the following is incorrect?
①Dissection and peeling of the superficial fat layer above the superficial temporal fascia can reduce the risk of facial motor nerve damage.
②The temporal branch of the facial nerve is the most superficial and most easily damaged when it crosses the middle part of the zygomatic arch.
③When suturing the wound, relax the skin tension lines along the skin.
④ During surgery, patients with cardiac pacemakers or implantable defibrillators should avoid using electrocautery to stop bleeding.
A. ① B. ② C. ③ D. ④

item:
關於屈公熱(chikungunya)，下列敘述何者正確？
①可傳播病毒的病媒蚊主要為埃及斑蚊(Aedes aegypti)及白線斑蚊(Aedes albopictus)。
②染病者可能出現maculopapular eruption，通常疹子在7-10天後消退，臨床上須和其他mosquito-borne illness做鑑別診斷，如登革熱。
③病患可能合併其他症狀，如發燒、關節痛、肌肉痛及腸胃不適。
④皮膚表現極少有pigmentary changes。
A. ①③　　B. ②④　　C. ①②③　　D. ④　　E. ①②③④
item2:
Regarding chikungunya, which of the following statements is correct?
①The main vector mosquitoes that can transmit the virus are Aedes aegypti and Aedes albopictus.
②Infected patients may develop maculopapular eruption. The rash usually subsides after 7-10 days. Clinical differential diagnosis must be made with other mosquito-borne illnesses, such as dengue fever.
③Patients may have other symptoms, such as fever, joint pain, muscle pain and gastrointestinal discomfort.
④Skin manifestations rarely include pigmentary changes.
A. ①③ B. ②④ C. ①②③ D. ④ E. ①②③④

item:
關於白斑，下列敘述何者錯誤？
①白斑病人若出現以下四種徵象Koebner phenomenon, trichrome lesions, confetti-like depigmentation, inflammatory lesions，通常代表病灶仍存有疾病活性。
②Segmental vitiligo會較早影響到毛囊的melanocyte而出現poliosis。
③位在glabrous skin的白斑主要透過marginal repigmentation，因此通常需要較長的治療時間。
④白斑病患有較高的機會合併有其他自體免疫疾病，如type 1 diabetes, autoimmune thyroiditis，且因皮膚缺乏黑色素保護，有較高的機會出現melanoma。
A. ①　　B. ②　　C. ③　　D. ④
item2:
Regarding vitiligo, which of the following statements is incorrect?
① If a patient with vitiligo shows the following four signs: Koebner phenomenon, trichrome lesions, confetti-like depigmentation, and inflammatory lesions, it usually means that the lesions still have disease activity.
②Segmental vitiligo will affect the melanocyte of hair follicles earlier and cause poliosis.
③White spots on glabrous skin are mainly caused by marginal repigmentation, so they usually require a longer treatment time.
④Vitiligo patients have a higher chance of coexisting with other autoimmune diseases, such as type 1 diabetes, autoimmune thyroiditis, and because the skin lacks melanin protection, there is a higher chance of developing melanoma.
A. ① B. ② C. ③ D. ④

item:
關於皮膚流行病學及公共衛生學的描述，下列何者正確？
①在研究乾癬病人是否較有癌症風險時，抽煙是重要的Confounding factor，因為抽煙已知與乾癬有相關，且抽煙也已知與癌症風險相關。
②使用carbamazepine引起TEN，在有基因HLA-B1502的人風險高，沒有這個HLA-B1502 Allele的話，就不會發生TEN。因此，有HLA-B1502 allele與使用Carbamazepine發生TEN，是高度相關，且屬於因果關係。
③以Cohort study來研究某外用藥物對乾癬是否比系統性藥物較為有效時，由於較輕嚴重度的病人，會被選擇以使用外用藥物治療，而較嚴重的病人會傾向選擇使用系統性藥物，這種Systemic errors，在臨床試驗研究設計上，是屬於Information bias。
④在研究HHV-8 抗原染色在Merkel cell carcinoma時，其結果如下，則這個抗原染色的negative predictive value是30/30+20。
A. ①　　B. ②　　C. ③　　D. ④
item2:
Regarding the description of skin epidemiology and public health, which of the following is correct?
① When studying whether psoriasis patients have a higher risk of cancer, smoking is an important founding factor, because smoking is known to be related to psoriasis, and smoking is also known to be related to cancer risk.
② The risk of TEN caused by the use of carbamazepine is high in people with the gene HLA-B1502. Without this HLA-B1502 Allele, TEN will not occur. Therefore, there is a high correlation between the presence of HLA-B1502 allele and the occurrence of TEN using Carbamazepine, and it is a causal relationship.
③When a Cohort study is used to study whether a certain topical drug is more effective than systemic drugs for psoriasis, patients with milder severity will be chosen to use topical drugs, while patients with more severe symptoms will tend to use systemic drugs. This kind of Systemic errors is Information bias in clinical trial research design.
④When studying HHV-8 antigen staining in Merkel cell carcinoma, the results are as follows, then the negative predictive value of this antigen staining is 30/30+20.
A. ① B. ② C. ③ D. ④

item:
關於acute generalized exanthematous pustulosis (AGEP), generalized fixed drug eruption (FDE)，和drug reaction with systemic symptoms (DRESS)，下列敘述何者正確？
①從吃藥到藥物疹發作時間generalized FDE<AGEP<DRESS。
②DRESS和AGEP通常都會有fever和lymphadenopathy。
③AGEP呈現nonfollicular sterile pustules。
④三者皆有systemic involvement。
A. ①③　　B. ②④　　C. ①②③　　D. ④　　E. ①②③④
item2:
Regarding acute generalized exanthematous pustulosis (AGEP), generalized fixed drug eruption (FDE), and drug reaction with systemic symptoms (DRESS), which of the following statements is correct?
①The time from taking medicine to the onset of drug rash is generalized FDE<AGEP<DRESS.
②DRESS and AGEP usually have fever and lymphadenopathy.
③AGEP presents nonfollicular sterile pustules.
④All three have systemic involvement.
A. ①③ B. ②④ C. ①②③ D. ④ E. ①②③④

item:
關於eosinophilic diseases，下列敘述何者正確？
①Myeloproliferative hypereosinophilic syndrome的預後比lymphocytic hypereosinophilic syndrome差。最常見的死因是restrictive cardiomyopathy造成的congestive heart failure。
②Papuloerythroderma of Ofuji好發於老年男性，特色是deck-chair sign，通常不會癢。
③Kimura disease好發於亞洲男性，會伴隨eosinophilia及IgE上升，病理會看到fibrosis。
④Wells syndrome最常見的系統性症狀是發燒。
A. ①③　　B. ②④　　C. ①②③　　D. ④　　E. ①②③④
item2:
Regarding eosinophilic diseases, which of the following statements is correct?
①The prognosis of Myeloproliferative hypereosinophilic syndrome is worse than that of lymphocytic hypereosinophilic syndrome. The most common cause of death is congestive heart failure caused by restrictive cardiomyopathy.
②Papuloerythroderma of Ofuji is more likely to occur in older men. It is characterized by deck-chair sign and usually does not itch.
③Kimura disease is more common in Asian men and is accompanied by an increase in eosinophilia and IgE, and fibrosis is seen in pathology.
④The most common systemic symptom of Wells syndrome is fever.
A. ①③ B. ②④ C. ①②③ D. ④ E. ①②③④

item:
下列敘述何者錯誤？
①Actinic prurigo onset好發於中老年男性，病灶大都在forehead, chin, cheeks, ears和forearms等sun­exposed的區域。
②Polymorphic Light Eruption (PMLE)患者在接受phototesting檢查時，其UVA及UVB-induced minimal erythema dose (MED)的數值通常在正常範圍內。
③Chronic actinic dermatitis患者於phototesting的UVA及UVB-induced MED是明顯升高的。
④Actinic prurigo是對ultraviolet radiation敏感所誘發的，他們在接受phototest檢查時，通常會呈現對UVA及/或UVB的異常反應，尤其更常呈現對UVA的異常反應。
A. ①③　　B. ②④　　C. ①②③　　D. ④　　E. ①②③④
item2:
Which of the following statements is wrong?
① Actinic prurigo onset is more likely to occur in middle-aged and older men, and the lesions are mostly in sunexposed areas such as the forehead, chin, cheeks, ears and forearms.
②When patients with Polymorphic Light Eruption (PMLE) undergo phototesting, their UVA and UVB-induced minimal erythema dose (MED) values are usually within the normal range.
③Chronic actinic dermatitis patients have significantly higher UVA and UVB-induced MED in phototesting.
④Actinic prurigo is caused by sensitivity to ultraviolet radiation. When they undergo phototest, they usually show abnormal reactions to UVA and/or UVB, especially abnormal reactions to UVA.
A. ①③ B. ②④ C. ①②③ D. ④ E. ①②③④

item:
關於Kawasaki disease，下列敘述何者正確？
①急性期皮膚的表現多樣，包括麻疹樣疹、標靶樣病灶、猩紅熱樣疹和水疱性病灶。
②指緣和腹股溝脫皮是在開始發燒後2-3週出現。
③口部典型症狀是嘴唇紅腫乾裂和草莓樣舌，但通常沒有口腔潰瘍。
④皮膚病灶的切片中可看到中小型血管發炎。
A. ①　　B. ②　　C. ③　　D. ④
item2:
Regarding Kawasaki disease, which of the following statements is correct?
① Skin manifestations in the acute phase are diverse, including morbilliform rash, target-like lesions, scarlet fever-like rash, and vesicular lesions.
②Peeling of the finger edges and groin appears 2-3 weeks after the onset of fever.
③Typical oral symptoms are red, swollen, chapped lips and strawberry-like tongue, but there are usually no oral ulcers.
④ Inflammation of small and medium-sized blood vessels can be seen in sections of skin lesions.
A. ① B. ② C. ③ D. ④

item:
台灣在冬天或寒流來時偶爾可見chilblain之患者，它和chilblain lupus erythematosus (CLE) 在臨床和病理頗為相似，但仍有許多相異處。關於CLE之敘述，下列何者錯誤？
①在非寒冷季節病灶仍持續。
②LE患者指/趾部最常見的病灶之一。
③在臉部和頭部常有典型之discoid LE病灶。
④超過半數的患者將發展為systemic LE。
A. ①　　B. ②　　C. ③　　D. ④
item2:
Patients with chilblain are occasionally seen in Taiwan in winter or when cold waves come. It is clinically and pathologically similar to chilblain lupus erythematosus (CLE), but there are still many differences. Regarding the description of CLE, which of the following is wrong?
①The lesions still persist in non-cold seasons.
②One of the most common lesions on the fingers/toes of patients with LE.
③Typical discoid LE lesions are often found on the face and head.
④More than half of patients will develop systemic LE.
A. ① B. ② C. ③ D. ④

item:
關於paraneoplastic pemphigus (PNP)，下列敘述何者正確？
①病理變化包括acantholysis, lichenoid or vacuolar interface change。
②血中可偵測到針對desmogleins 1 & 3, desmoplakins 1 & 2, envoplakin, periplakin及bullous pemphigoid Ag 1之抗體。
③Direct immunofluorescence 之變化主要是IgG and C3 bind to cell surface of epithelium，也可見basement membrane zone之沉積。
④口腔炎(stomatitis)是最早出現的症狀，如果患者沒有口腔炎，則不應將PNP列入鑑別診斷中。
A. ①③　　B. ②④　　C. ①②③　　D. ④　　E. ①②③④
item2:
Regarding paraneoplastic pemphigus (PNP), which of the following statements is correct?
①Pathological changes include acantholysis, lichenoid or vacuolar interface change.
② Antibodies against desmogleins 1 & 3, desmoplakins 1 & 2, envoplakin, periplakin and bullous pemphigoid Ag 1 can be detected in the blood.
③The changes in Direct immunofluorescence are mainly due to IgG and C3 binding to cell surface of epithelium, and deposition in the basement membrane zone can also be seen.
④ Stomatitis is the earliest symptom. If the patient does not have stomatitis, PNP should not be included in the differential diagnosis.
A. ①③ B. ②④ C. ①②③ D. ④ E. ①②③④

item:
關於指甲手術，下列何者正確？
①Median distal block麻醉執行較容易與快速，但不適合用於complete nail avulsion (全指甲移除)相關術式。
②使用tourniquet止血，不超過20分鐘是比較安全的作法。
③Distal nail matrix punch biopsy若直徑超過3mm易造成指甲變形之副作用。
④Subungual hematoma佔露出的指甲面積大於 25%，應安排影像學檢查是否有指骨骨折。
A. ①③　　B. ②④　　C. ①②③　　D. ④　　E. ①②③④
item2:
Regarding nail surgery, which of the following is true?
①Median distal block anesthesia is easier and faster to perform, but it is not suitable for complete nail avulsion (total nail removal) related procedures.
② It is safer to use tourniquet to stop bleeding for no more than 20 minutes.
③Distal nail matrix punch biopsy may cause side effects of nail deformation if the diameter exceeds 3mm.
④ If Subungual hematoma accounts for more than 25% of the exposed nail area, imaging examination should be arranged to see if there is a phalangeal fracture.
A. ①③ B. ②④ C. ①②③ D. ④ E. ①②③④

item:
關於皮膚手術常見麻醉藥物使用，下列何者錯誤？
①局部麻醉藥劑常見分為兩類Amide和Ester group，Amide類藥物由肝臟代謝後腎臟排出，肝功能異常病患須謹慎使用。
②麻醉藥中加入epinephrine其血管收縮效果可使麻藥效果與安全性提升，然而病患若有同時使用β-blocker類藥物則須注意嚴重高血壓之風險。
③Amide類藥物注射於酸性環境與發炎組織中，麻醉效果優於注射於非發炎組織，因此皮膚膿瘍引流常被使用。
④EMLA用於局部麻醉，當使用於表皮屏障功能缺損(impaired skin barrier)患者，應注意有methemoglobinemia風險。
A. ①　　B. ②　　C. ③　　D. ④
item2:
Regarding the common use of anesthetic drugs in skin surgery, which of the following is wrong?
①Local anesthetics are commonly divided into two categories: Amide and Ester group. Amide drugs are metabolized by the liver and excreted by the kidneys. Patients with abnormal liver function must use them with caution.
② The vasoconstrictive effect of epinephrine added to anesthetics can improve the effectiveness and safety of anesthetics. However, patients must be aware of the risk of severe hypertension if they use β-blocker drugs at the same time.
③Amide drugs are injected into acidic environments and inflamed tissues, and the anesthetic effect is better than those injected into non-inflamed tissues. Therefore, skin abscess drainage is often used.
④EMLA is used for local anesthesia. When used in patients with impaired skin barrier function, attention should be paid to the risk of methemoglobinemia.
A. ① B. ② C. ③ D. ④

item:
關於tuberous sclerosis complex (TSC)，下列敘述何者正確？
①Confetti hypopigmentation經常出現在臉部和軀幹，是診斷TSC的major criteria。
②Fibroma可以出現在指甲旁或口腔內，兩個以上的指甲纖維瘤或口腔纖維瘤皆是診斷TSC的major criteria。
③病人如果有TSC1突變會有較嚴重的表現，需要使用口服mTOR抑制劑治療。
④外用sirolimus (rapamycin)可以抑制mTOR活性來治療皮膚的angiofibroma。
A. ①③　　B. ②④　　C. ①②③　　D. ④　　E. ①②③④
item2:
Regarding tuberous sclerosis complex (TSC), which of the following statements is correct?
①Confetti hypopigmentation often appears on the face and trunk and is the major criteria for the diagnosis of TSC.
②Fibroma can appear next to the nails or in the oral cavity. Two or more nail fibromas or oral fibromas are major criteria for diagnosing TSC.
③If patients have TSC1 mutations, they will have more severe symptoms and need to be treated with oral mTOR inhibitors.
④Topical sirolimus (rapamycin) can inhibit mTOR activity to treat skin angiofibroma.
A. ①③ B. ②④ C. ①②③ D. ④ E. ①②③④

item:
關於porphyria，下列敘述何者正確？
①Uroporphyrinogen decarboxylase (UROD)缺陷會出現在porphyria cutaneous tarda (PCT)和hepatoerythropoietic porphyria (HEP)。
②634nm螢光會在erythropoietic protoporphyria (EPP)和X-linked protoporphyria (XLP)出現。
③糞便中coproporphyrin III量增加可以出現在hereditary coproporphyria (HCP)和variegate porphyria (VP)。
④光敏感性合併水泡表現可以出現在congenital erythropoietic porphyria (CEP)。
A. ①③　　B. ②④　　C. ①②③　　D. ④　　E. ①②③④
item2:
Regarding porphyria, which of the following statements is correct?
①Uroporphyrinogen decarboxylase (UROD) deficiency occurs in porphyria cutaneous tarda (PCT) and hepatoerythropoietic porphyria (HEP).
②634nm fluorescence will appear in erythropoietic protoporphyria (EPP) and X-linked protoporphyria (XLP).
③ Increased amounts of coproporphyrin III in feces can occur in hereditary coproporphyria (HCP) and variegate porphyria (VP).
④ Photosensitivity combined with blistering manifestations may occur in congenital erythropoietic porphyria (CEP).
A. ①③ B. ②④ C. ①②③ D. ④ E. ①②③④

item:
關於hair shaft disorders，下列敘述何者錯誤？
①Netherton syndrome患者可能表現 trichorrhexis nodosa, trichorrhexis invaginata或 pili torti。
②Loose anagen syndrome好發於2-6歲小朋友，可能以sporadic發生或autosomal dominant遺傳，trichogram顯示70%是anagen hair且hair pull test大多為陰性。
③Wooly hair與KRT74 (keratin 74) gene變異相關，患者可能表現trichorrhexis nodosa的特徵。
④Pili annulati在光學顯微鏡下的特徵是flattened, twisted hair occurring at irregular intervals。
A. ①③　　B. ②④　　C. ①②③　　D. ④　　E. ①②③④
item2:
Regarding hair shaft disorders, which of the following statements is incorrect?
①Patients with Netherton syndrome may present with trichorrhexis nodosa, trichorrhexis invaginata or pili torti.
②Loose anagen syndrome is more likely to occur in children aged 2-6 years old. It may occur as a sporadic or autosomal dominant inheritance. Trichogram shows that 70% of the syndrome is anagen hair and most of the hair pull tests are negative.
③Wooly hair is related to KRT74 (keratin 74) gene mutation, and patients may show characteristics of trichorrhexis nodosa.
④Pili annulati is characterized by flattened, twisted hair occurring at irregular intervals under an optical microscope.
A. ①③ B. ②④ C. ①②③ D. ④ E. ①②③④

item:
關於皮膚表徵與相關drug abuse的配對，下列敘述何者正確？

②Puffy hand syndrome, high pruritus: Methylenedioxymethamphetamine (MDMA) abuse.

④Ecstasy pimples: heroin abuse.

item2:
Regarding the pairing of skin symptoms and related drug abuse, which of the following statements is correct?
①Madarosis: cocaine, heroin, methamphetamine abuse.
②Puffy hand syndrome, high pruritus: Methylenedioxymethamphetamine (MDMA) abuse.
③Snorter’s warts: cocaine abuse.
④Ecstasy pimples: heroin abuse.
A. ①③ B. ②④ C. ①②③ D. ④ E. ①②③④

item:
關於懷孕時期的皮膚疾病/變化，下列敘述何者錯誤？
①Intrahepatic cholestasis of pregnancy, atopic eruption of pregnancy和pemphigoid (herpes) gestationis都與fetal risk相關，可能會造成preterm delivery、fetal distress/death等危害。
②Pustular psoriasis of pregnancy好發在初產婦，且很少於後續懷孕再次發生。
③Atopic eruption of pregnancy是懷孕時期最常見的 pruritic disorder ，好發於懷孕晚期(third trimester)。
④Polymorphic eruption of pregnancy的DIF (Direct immunofluorescence)檢查可能出現 granular C3, IgM, or IgA deposits at the dermoepidermal junction or around blood vessels的變化。
A. ①③　　B. ②④　　C. ①②③　　D. ④　　E. ①②③④
item2:
Regarding skin diseases/changes during pregnancy, which of the following statements is incorrect?
①Intrahepatic cholestasis of pregnancy, atopic eruption of pregnancy and pemphigoid (herpes) gestationis are all related to fetal risk and may cause preterm delivery, fetal distress/death and other hazards.
②Pustular psoriasis of pregnancy is more likely to occur in first-time mothers and rarely occurs in subsequent pregnancies.
③Atopic eruption of pregnancy is the most common pruritic disorder during pregnancy, and it often occurs in the third trimester.
④DIF (Direct immunofluorescence) examination of Polymorphic eruption of pregnancy may show changes in granular C3, IgM, or IgA deposits at the dermoepidermal junction or around blood vessels.
A. ①③ B. ②④ C. ①②③ D. ④ E. ①②③④

item:
以下何者為high-risk squamous cell carcinoma (SCC)，表示有較高的機率產生局部復發或轉移？
①耳殼上1公分SCC，病理組織切片下分化良好。
②小腿前脛0.8公分，病理組織切片下為desmoplastic SCC。

④腳背0.5公分，病理組織切片下分化良好。
A. ①③　　B. ②④　　C. ①②③　　D. ④　　E. ①②③④
item2:
Which of the following is high-risk squamous cell carcinoma (SCC), indicating a higher probability of local recurrence or metastasis?
①1 cm SCC on the ear shell, well differentiated under pathological tissue sections.
②The front tibia of the calf is 0.8 cm, and the pathological tissue section shows desmoplastic SCC.

item:
一名68歲男性因肛門周圍持續9個月的紅色搔癢斑塊前來皮膚科門診就診。病灶的皮膚切片結果顯示為extramammary Paget's disease (EMPD)。進一步檢查，包括大腸鏡與骨盆影像檢查，發現肛門緣約6公分處有一個中度分化的直腸adenocarcinoma，最終診斷為繼發於肛門直腸腺癌的secondary EMPD，下列公告何者正確？
①此病灶最有可能的組織免疫染色結果為 CK7(+) CK20(+) GCDFP-15(-) MUC2(+)。
②建議使用PET-CT偵測是否有nodal micrometastasis。
③可以用CEA做為疾病追蹤的指標。
④一般而言此類病患的預後較primary EMPD好。
A. ①③　　B. ②④　　C. ①②③　　D. ④　　E. ①②③④
item2:
A 68-year-old man came to the dermatology clinic because of red itchy patches around the anus that had lasted for 9 months. The skin biopsy results of the lesions showed extramammary Paget's disease (EMPD). Further examinations, including colonoscopy and pelvic imaging, revealed a moderately differentiated rectal adenocarcinoma about 6 cm from the anal verge. The final diagnosis was secondary EMPD secondary to anorectal adenocarcinoma. Which of the following announcements is correct?
①The most likely tissue immunostaining results of this lesion are CK7(+) CK20(+) GCDFP-15(-) MUC2(+).
② It is recommended to use PET-CT to detect whether there is nodal micrometastasis.
③CEA can be used as an indicator for disease tracking.
④ Generally speaking, the prognosis of this type of patients is better than that of primary EMPD.
A. ①③ B. ②④ C. ①②③ D. ④ E. ①②③④

item:
關於Langerhans cell histiocytosis (LCH)，下列敘述何者正確？
①組織免疫染色下可見 CD1a/S100B/CD207-positive之細胞，且過半數的病人有BRAF-V600E point mutation。
②Diabetes mellitus是LCH最常合併之內分泌疾病。
③造血系統、肝臟、脾臟屬於high-risk organ，若有LCH病灶整體預後較差。
④若針對只有侵犯皮膚的LCH，可以給予外用類固醇治療，通常會有很好的療效。
A. ①③　　B. ②④　　C. ①②③　　D. ④　　E. ①②③④
item2:
Regarding Langerhans cell histiocytosis (LCH), which of the following statements is correct?
①CD1a/S100B/CD207-positive cells can be seen under tissue immunostaining, and more than half of the patients have BRAF-V600E point mutation.
②Diabetes mellitus is the most common endocrine disease associated with LCH.
③The hematopoietic system, liver, and spleen are high-risk organs. If there are LCH lesions, the overall prognosis is poor.
④If LCH only invades the skin, topical steroid treatment can be given, which usually has good curative effect.
A. ①③ B. ②④ C. ①②③ D. ④ E. ①②③④

item:
45歲男性，右小腿發現一黑色腫瘤，經excisional biopsy證實為nodular melanoma Breslow thickness 3 mm, BRAF mutation陽性。針對此病患之敘述何者錯誤？
①建議excisional margin 2 cm加上術中前哨淋巴結切片。
②手術後發現前哨淋巴結腫瘤轉移，建議接受淋巴結廓清術 (complete lymph node dissection) 可以增加此病患之disease free survival。
③因前哨淋巴結腫瘤轉移，宜接受adjuvant therapy如immune check point inhibitor。
④此病患追蹤的過程中發現遠端皮膚轉移，若轉移的病灶可藉由手術切除則應盡量切除。
A. ①　　B. ②　　C. ③　　D. ④
item2:
A 45-year-old man was found to have a black tumor on his right calf. Excisional biopsy confirmed it to be nodular melanoma Breslow thickness 3 mm and positive for BRAF mutation. What is wrong with the description of this patient?
① It is recommended to have an excisional margin of 2 cm plus intraoperative sentinel lymph node sectioning.
② Tumor metastasis to the sentinel lymph node is found after surgery. It is recommended to undergo complete lymph node dissection to increase the disease-free survival of this patient.
③Due to sentinel lymph node tumor metastasis, it is appropriate to receive adjuvant therapy such as immune check point inhibitor.
④During the follow-up of this patient, distal skin metastases were found. If the metastases can be removed surgically, they should be removed as much as possible.
A. ① B. ② C. ③ D. ④

item:
關於infantile hemangioma之治療，下列何者錯誤？
①合併PHACE (posterior fossa anomalies, hemangioma, arterial anomalies, cardiac anomalies, and eye anomalies) syndrome之病患亦可接受systemic propranolol治療，但建議劑量增加的速度應較一般病患緩慢。
②低血糖是使用propranolol治療infantile hemangioma可能的副作用。
③Systemic corticosteroid的效果較propranolol差。
④較大且有潰瘍之病灶應在開始治療時就使用較高劑量propranolol以加速潰瘍癒合。
A. ①③　　B. ②④　　C. ①②③　　D. ④　　E. ①②③④
item2:
Regarding the treatment of infantile hemangioma, which of the following is incorrect?
①Patients with PHACE (posterior fossa anomalies, hemangioma, arterial anomalies, cardiac anomalies, and eye anomalies) syndrome can also be treated with systemic propranolol, but it is recommended that the dose increase rate should be slower than that of ordinary patients.
②Hypoglycemia is a possible side effect of using propranolol to treat infantile hemangioma.
③Systemic corticosteroid is less effective than propranolol.
④ For larger lesions with ulcers, higher doses of propranolol should be used at the beginning of treatment to accelerate ulcer healing.
A. ①③ B. ②④ C. ①②③ D. ④ E. ①②③④

item:
關於Merkel cell carcinoma，下列敘述何者正確？
①Merkel cell polyoma virus陽性之病患可以用viral oncoprotein antibody來追蹤疾病是否復發。
②所有Merkel cell carcinoma皆可以在組織免疫染色下見到cytokeratin-20 perinuclear dot pattern。
③手術切除primary lesion時，若無法取得足夠的safety margin，可以選擇excision with narrow margin加上adjuvant radiotherapy或chemotherapy。
④Merkel cell carcinoma with unknown primary與已知原發腫瘤且分期相似的患者並無預後上的差異。
A. ①　　B. ②　　C. ③　　D. ④
item2:
关于Merkel cell carcinoma, 下列叙述何者正确?
①Patients who are positive for Merkel cell polyoma virus can use viral oncoprotein antibody to track whether the disease has recurred.
②The cytokeratin-20 perinuclear dot pattern can be seen in all Merkel cell carcinomas under tissue immunostaining.
③When surgically resecting the primary lesion, if sufficient safety margin cannot be obtained, you can choose excision with narrow margin plus adjuvant radiotherapy or chemotherapy.
④There is no difference in prognosis between Merkel cell carcinoma with unknown primary and patients with known primary tumors and similar stages.
A. ① B. ② C. ③ D. ④
